<color=black>•</color> Invincibility: On taking lethal damage, HP remains at 1 for 5s (once every 10s).</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. HP Recovery ×3
2. Devour CD reduced to 15s</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color> When Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit (or their subspecies) are both present, Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God/Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God no longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit/Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit gains a 90% damage reduction.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Big Mouth Flower + Cherry Peach Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Do any supreme leader lack charisma? Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom once relied on fear alone, until Charm Confuse Mushroom taught it a better lesson. Terror became fascination, fascination became obedience. True domination is not won on battlefields, but in minds. Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom now rules not as an executioner, but as a mastermind, echoing the legends of a certain psychic device that promised a world ruled by a single will. I am Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom. Obey me.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom deals immense damage, simultaneously hypnotizing and slowing down zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/0.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each hit adds 20 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Has a chance to turn zombies with Toughness < 40% into hypnotized Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit Sentinels.
<color=black>•</color> Creates an explosion in the tile where the hypnotized zombie is located, dealing 450 damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack speed ×3
2. Rigid Corpses take damage equal to 30% of their current HP each time they are defrozen</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Big Spray Mushroom + Cold Ice Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Emperor Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun Light Emperor Fruit, a photosynthesis master, revolutionized light energy-mass conversion, minimizing energy loss through recycling. He humbly credits the pioneers: "I'm just standing on the shoulders of giants."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Emperor Fruit produces Sun every time it is injured.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Tapping on it:
- Spends 500 Sun.
- Restores his Toughness to full.
- Summons a Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit 1 tile ahead.
- Little Devil Rigid Corpseroves an existing Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit by enlarging its size and damage (higher base damage yields less bonus, down to 60%).
- After not tapping for 1s, the existing Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit will roll forward, crushing zombies. Damage per 0.02s is 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively.<color=black>
•</color> Regardless of the damage type, each damage it receives will reduce a set 50 Toughness. Produces 15 Sun after every such hit.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Sun Light Emperor Fruit: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sun Light Tough Fruit + Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Black Steel Ground Spike King
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After being baptized by fire and ice, Black Steel Ground Spike King became as hard as steel, but its temperament also became erratic. This change is likely due to the steel that condensed in its mouth, making it reluctant to speak.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Black Steel Ground Spike King can deal immense damage while also tanking multiple tires.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×2/1s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Possesses the characteristics of Ground Spike King. Recovers 500 Toughness every 15s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×5 | Black Steel Ground Spike Tough Fruit Subspecies Unlocked
2. Gains a 95% Damage Reduction</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Ground Spike King + Fire Flame Ground Spike King</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter is dangerous and should not be approached. It is a forbidden force in the world." Despite the frightening tales circulating among the plants, Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter is not as it seems. In fact, it is one of the friendliest plants. However, the zombies turned to ashes would disagree.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destruction incarnate. Fires rounds of destruction to decimate those unlucky enough to face its wrath.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Fires Doom Shells that ignore Type 2 armor in rounds of 4. Fires an Ultimate Doom Shell that deals 1800 damage once every 4 rounds of bullets and then rests for 4.5s after the Ultimate Doom Shell is shot. Ultimate Doom Shells deal splash damage over a large area after dealing the initial single-target damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Effects also apply to SP variants</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Machine Gun Shooter + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The little puff-shrooms who once shouted, "We are going to join the army!" have matured into veterans with resolute eyes. Wherever and whenever, the Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom Company is committed to ensuring that the mission is accomplished.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can be stacked three times to shoot 12 icicles at once!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4×3/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each hit adds 5 Cryo points. Icicles deal 4 times more damage to frozen enemies. Each icicle can pierce 2 times.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Increased penetration to infinite times, the first 5 hits of horizontal shots each split into 2 new bullets at ±15°, dealing (20 × split count)% more damage.
2. Increased damage to Frozen and chill-immune zombies by 12x | Sun Light Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Machine Gun Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom×3</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>No one knows where Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor is from, but one thing's for sure: He was not responsible for the dinosaurs. Not at all!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Why the heck is there a meteor on my lawn!?

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×5/1s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>+20 Damage per Lumos Level.</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System: </color><color=#8B0000>+5% Damage per Magnetic plant in the same system.
Both systems can increase the damage of the stars by up to a max of 300.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Summons a meteor every 15s, dealing 1800 damage upon impact. Splits into multiple stars that home in on zombies and deal 100 damage each. Inherits aircraft-downing ability from Magnet Force Sage Person Palm and can also shoot down tridents.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack Interval → 0.5s
2. Lv1: Base damage ×2 and damage cap (300) increased to 3000; Lv2: Base damage ×3, damage cap removed</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> With at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors summon a Helios Meteor instead, and the Mini Sun from Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable no longer disappears and deals 5× damage.
<color=black>•</color> Helios Meteor: (1800 + 1800 × Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors) × (1 + 0.2 × Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables) Damage, and drops 1250 Sun.</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> With at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, the Mini Moon from Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable no longer disappears. Each Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable channels a beam into the Mini Moon, which merges them into a single concentrated beam.
<color=black>•</color> Beam Damage: 100 × (channeling plants) every 0.02s, always locking onto the zombie with the highest max HP. Damage scales linearly over time when focusing a single target.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Foreign Peach + Magnet Force Sage Person Palm</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Nuclear deterrence is beneficial. Someday, zombies will stop attacking out of fear of my self-detonation," Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom claimed confidently. Sadly, all the radiation did was turn it into a grotesque monstrosity vaguely resembling a legendary mutated cephalopodic calamity that flattened cities. Still, it was evident that Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom failed to understand that zombies wouldn't initiate a Cold War just because of some cold breeze.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays deadly fumes all around, bringing ultimate destruction. Beware!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>(100+100×8)×4/1.9s</color>
<color=black>Damage Range: </color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>5×3</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 5 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Sprays spores, which then explode (both deal penetrating damage). An explosion occurs upon death, dealing 1800 cremator damage and freezing all zombies on the screen.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Explosion damage on death → 1M
2. Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Big Spray Mushroom + Cold Ice Worry Gloom Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Magnet Force Mushroom's power remains unmatched," said Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon. "After all, composite armor, electromagnetic catapults, and plasma guns came nearly a century after aircraft carriers." Other plants envied Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon's high-tech gear, but only Magnet Force Mushroom knew his power came from a Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor meteorite.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns laser drones that home in on enemies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>200/1.5s (Drone)
200/1s (Wingman)
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System:</color> <color=#8B0000>When part of a Magnetic System with a Multi Skill Energy South Melon or any Metal-infused South Melon (including the Play Doll South Melon part of Armed Equipped South Melon), gains their special traits. Additionally, assimilates all but one Multi Skill Energy South Melon in the same system into a Ultra Extreme Laser South Melons every 30s (first time 10s).</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Always has a Ultra Extreme Laser Without Person Machine wingman with him when he appears. Generates a Ultra Extreme Laser Without Person Machine on top of a tile around a 3×3 area every 30s (first time 10s).
<color=black>•</color> Reflects 100 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Wingmen Amount → 3
2. Wingmen & drones damage ×3</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=35>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force 3 Leaf Grass > Super Tier South Melon</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Laser Without Person Machine
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Thanks to Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon, now we have an entire arsenal of hi-tech equipment! Take a look at these beauties: Composite alloy armor, electromagnetic rotor, and plasma railgun... Wait, NO!!! THAT WAS MY FAVORITE VASE!!!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ultra Extreme Laser Without Person Machines shoot piercing lasers to attack.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>200/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Rather than seeking his best friend's protection, this plant prefers to protect him. With a hard, gem-like body and steadfast gaze forged by Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit's own soul, he endured the trials of ice and fire. Though his body may wear down one day, he's determined to keep other plants safe.</color></size></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>The Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit has four times the defense of a normal Tall Tough Fruit.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Restores 1500 Toughness every 15s.
<color=black>•</color> Tall plant. Anti-crush, taking a maximum of 200 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color> When one Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit receives damage, it is shared and divided among all Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruits and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruits on the lawn.
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 10% lost HP when affected by Cold Ice Mushrooms or Fire Burst Spicy Peppers.
<color=black>•</color> Blocks Air Ball Rigid Corpses from passing, forcing them onto the ground.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Max HP Cap ×3
2. Redirects damage dealt to adjacent plants in the same lane to itself</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color>  When Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit (or their subspecies) are both present, Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God/Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God no longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit/Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit gains a 90% damage reduction.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit + Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After overcoming past struggles, Ultra Extreme Thrower now aims for a calm life. "All I want now is to watch classic movies and live in peace."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Capable of rapid-fire and spread-fire volleys of projectiles.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/2s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> 42% chance of rapid-firing. Has an equal chance to spread-fire in a number equal to the number of zombies in its lane. 
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles deal an additional 5×(target Poison value) damage and inflict 1 Poison point.
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles then split into garlic cabbage, garlic kernel (25% garlic butter), and garlic melon upon impact.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Spread-fire is now guaranteed
2. Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison the zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Thrower + Garlic West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Clad in icy armor and dark as a warning, each shot from Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery brings destruction. Rigid Corpses hit by it need not prepare—nothing will remain after the flash.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Possesses earth-shattering power.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Main Blast: 1800 in a 3×3 area. 
<color=black>•</color> Additional: 1800 + 30% of the Rigid Corpses' max HP across the entire screen.
<color=black>•</color> Side Gun: 360×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time: </color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Infuses all plants across the field with Cold Ice Mushroom (prioritized)/Destroy Eradicate Mushroom (except South Melons and Flower Pots). 
<color=black>•</color> Side cannon inflicts Chill and adds 10 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Main Blast damage ×4
2. Reload Time → 12s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Cannon Artillery + Cold Ice Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Green Treasure Rock Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>From its appearance, you can tell that Green Treasure Rock Umbrella has a knack for business. "That's right, my hat of emerald was a trade item I exchanged with someone from a place full of blocks..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A combination of Super Tier Protect Guard Umbrella and Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Has the traits of both its ingredients.
<color=black>•</color> Receives 75% less damage from Tridents.
<color=black>•</color> Bouncing projectiles now increases their damage by 100%.
<color=black>•</color> Also allows projectiles to hit zombies in the two adjacent lanes.
<color=black>•</color> Inherits Alchemist Ultimate ability, but can instantly kill zombies below 50% max HP.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:<color=#8B0000>
1. Bounced projectiles additional Damage 100% → 300%
2. Activates ultimate automatically free of charge if zombies are near, 7.5s cooldown | Red Treasure Rock Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Protect Guard Umbrella + Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Charm Queen Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The subjects of the Charm Emperor Mushroom are captivated by the Charm Queen Mushroom's mysterious power. "She's not just my advisor; she's the force that keeps our kingdom thriving. Her magic isn't just powerful—it's explosive", the Charm Emperor Mushroom declared. In truth, the Charm Queen Mushroom simply delights in blowing up any unruly dissenters who dare resist her charm.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons exclusively explosive zombies to fight for you!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Charm Emperor Mushroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> The same as Charm Emperor Mushroom, but only summons Cherry Peach Shooter Read Newspaper Rigid Corpse/Machine Instrument Sea Pig Rigid Corpse/Cherry Peach Machine Gun Shooter Newspaper/Gatling Explode-o-rider zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Immediately summons a zombie when an Charm Emperor Mushroom dies in a 3×3 range.
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Summon Interval → 10s | Charm Queen Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked
2. Can now summon corresponding Ultimate Rigid Corpses</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000> Charm Confuse Mushroom <-> Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Ash Ember 3 Line Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The flames consume his broken body, each breath a torment, yet the Ash Ember 3 Line Shooter stands tall. He believes the fire within will achieve eternal glory in one final, grand explosion.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ash Ember 3 Line Shooter awaits his rebirth.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Loses attack capabilities after being thoroughly burnt.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Singe Black 3 Line Shooter + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper

plants.name: Bath Fire 3 Line Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>No one knows if fire truly brings rebirth to plants—it's just a legend. Those who chased it turned to ash, until he became the new legend. "I don't know how many times I must endure the flames to succeed, but for them, I have to."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>From fire reborn!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>160×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Ignites the whole lawn upon entry.
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles inflict the Enflamed debuff and pierce 2 times.
<color=black>•</color> Its damage is doubled after passing through an Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict the debuff
2. Phoenix peas can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions | Fly Fire 3 Line Shooter Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Ash Ember 3 Line Shooter + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme 5 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Ultra Extreme 5 Leaf Grass has mastered electromagnetism with Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor. "It's not rocket science—left-hand force, right-hand electricity", it boasted. "And don't forget the moving magnet—trust the smartest plant around!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ultra Extreme 5 Leaf Grass pulls stars, accelerates them and launches at zombies at maximum force.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor.
<color=black>•</color> Storage Limit - 60 | Acceleration Time - 1.5s | Damage ×3 | Projectile Speed ×2</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach <-> 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dressed in plain clothes with a gaudy gold tooth, one word from him sends others fleeing. "Big Garlick me, I've had enough of the spotlight. Standing out doesn't suit me anymore—I just want a quiet, simple life."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cousin to the ultimate defensive plant on land.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1000/1.75s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits garlic properties, and shoots projectiles that poison zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God. Inherits all its traits but shoots Toxic Big Garlic Bombs with 300 AoE damage that stack 1 Poison point and apply Big Garlic Butter effect instead.
<color=black>•</color> No longer heals from cherry explosions but still immune.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Heal amount ×3
2. Devour CD reduced to 15s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet <-> Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Magnet Burst South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry? South Melon? Or a hybrid born of fusion? The Ultra Extreme Magnet Burst South Melon doesn't bother with such details. For him, Halloween is all about handing out juicy cherries to the good kids and cherry bombs to the naughty ones—nothing else matters. </color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blast-proof pumpkin.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon. Inherits other traits but no longer spawns Ultra Extreme Laser Without Person Machines or assimilates Multi Skill Energy South Melons, instead spawns self-destructing wingmen every 30s that seek out zombies and explode like a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet.
<color=black>•</color> Absorbs damage from cherry explosions to heal from them and protect plants in itself from cherry explosions.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Wingmen Amount → 3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm <-> Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color></color>

plants.name: Red Treasure Rock Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Many question the relationship between Green Treasure Rock Umbrella and Red Treasure Rock Umbrella. "We're brothers!" Aegis confidently declares, thumping its canopy. "My dear elder brother is just going through a rough patch emotionally."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Reflects projectiles from zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Green Treasure Rock Umbrella's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Green Treasure Rock Umbrella.
<color=black>•</color> Loses the ability to buff lobbed projectiles and attract tridents. Instead, gains a 90% Damage Reduction and the ability to reflect projectiles (except tridents) from zombies.</color></color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:<color=#8B0000>
2. Activates ultimate automatically free of charge if zombies are near, 7.5s cooldown | Red Treasure Rock Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower <-> West Melon Thrower

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>With the power of love and friendship, even a rotting zombie with an unbeating heart would become our best friend and greatest ally! Well, that and a copious amount of suspicious mind-altering spores powered by magnets of all things that are <b>DEFINITELY<b> safe for human contact. Well, for now at least...
- TetsuDaPlanta (@tetsuchris)</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charisma maxima.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/2s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles have a 1-tile splash radius with no falloff and have a chance to hypnotize zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Rigid Corpses that try to bite it are hypnotized instead.
<color=black>•</color> Feeding it metal objects grants 1 charge level for 30s, up to 2 charges.
<color=black>•</color> At Charge Level 1, it fires 2 shots per attack. At Charge Level 2, 4 shots. At Charge Level 3, 6 shots.
<color=#666699>Magnetic System:</color> Each plant in the same Magnetic System provides a 5% damage boost to its shots.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Hypnotization Toughness threshold increased from 50% to 100%
2. Attack Interval → 1s, Charge Level will not drop below 2 and can be fed metal to reach Charge Level 3 for 5 mins</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Charm Confuse Mushroom + Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit possesses immense power despite its size. He fears no zombies. However, it has its troubles, as block people with diamond pickaxes often come to knock on its head.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Has extremely high Toughness and can block Diggers.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit.
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> When one Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit receives damage, it is shared and divided among all Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruits and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruits on the lawn.
<color=black>•</color> Anti-crush, taking a maximum of 200 damage each time.
<color=black>•</color> Blocks Mine Worker Rigid Corpses. Forces them to emerge early.
<color=black>•</color> Releases a small potato explosion for every 1000 damage received (before damage reduction), dealing 500 damage to zombies in a small area.<size=36>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tall Tough Fruit <-> Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Magic Way Cat Tail Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I think it's better to use animal hair to keep myself above water than relying on, for example, a swim ring!" Magic Way Cat Tail Grass stands by her belief. Hmm... If you think this is due to her poor academic skills and inability to stay afloat on the river, you're right. How could a cat possibly swim! Though she refuses to be categorized randomly.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons drones to attack every time she defeats a zombie.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>160×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Summons a drone every time she kills a zombie. The drone lasts for 3s, firing 60 nettle spikes that deal 160 damage each and cannot target flying zombies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Drone Attack Damage ×3
2. Regular Attack Damage ×5 | Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek Subspecies Unlocked</color><size=36>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cat Tail Grass + Cat Melon

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk rarely interacts with people. It's not due to arrogance, but because people keep asking whether the fire on his body is hot or cold, and whether he can create hot ice or cold fire. These questions bore him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Becomes stronger the more Toughness it loses.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120×3/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Other plants cannot absorb damage for Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk. Each shot fired inflicts 50 damage to self until Toughness is reduced to 500. 
<color=black>•</color> Shots knock back zombies and pierce twice, with power halved per pierce. 
<color=black>•</color> Fires faster as Toughness decreases and reaches maximum speed of 0.25s at 1/3 Toughness. If Toughness is further reduced, attack damage increases. Damage is capped at 480 at 0 Toughness.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
2. Increases projectile damage and knockback ×3</color><size=36>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom > Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desk

plants.name: Illusion Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone wonders how Illusion Eradicate Mushroom subdues massive creatures to serve her. Endless destruction should bring silence... When questioned, she sits alone atop a tower, sipping her dreamy brew: "Oblivion? No, I simply grant them rebirth within illusions."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turn the tide of battle!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Hypnotizes all zombies in range (same as Destroy Eradicate Mushroom) and makes them explode upon death like Destroy Eradicate Mushrooms.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. All Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosions are now craterless | Greed Desire Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked
2. Now spawns 3 extra Hypnotized Gargantuars and Snow Sled Vehicle Rigid Corpses when it explodes</color><size=36>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Charm Confuse Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom

plants.name: Sun Light Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Production is also part of the fight!" said Sun Light Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom, wiping its sweat. Its platoon has been reorganized into the 'Sunshine Bay Construction Corps,' but their fighting spirit remains undiminished.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates a large amount of sun for you.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> Shots no longer slow but instead drop 5 sun on hitting the 1st and 2nd zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Each subsequent pierce deals 20 more damage but requires 5 sun per hit (does not consume Sun if the total amount of Sun is below 15k).
<color=black>•</color> Synergizes with the sun value doubling Odyssey Modifier and dropped suns are worth 15 each when the modifier is active.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Increased penetration to infinite times, the first 5 hits of horizontal shots each split into 2 new bullets at ±15°, dealing (20 × split count)% more damage.
2. Sun Light Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom <-> Towards Sun Flower

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Compared to the composed demeanor of Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter, Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom has a much shorter temper, especially when someone calls her a "Gray Egg". She often yells "Quietus!" and charges into the fray.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Continuously fires Destroy Eradicate Mushroom attacks at zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s (0.25s Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter.
<color=black>•</color> Each attack will shorten the attack interval by 0.1s, to a minimum of 0.25s. Explodes when zombies get near.
<color=black>•</color> Fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 16 attacks, dealing 1800 damage, and then rests for 4.5s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter <-> Little Courage Mushroom

plants.name: Black Steel Ground Spike Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Black Steel Ground Spike Tough Fruit loves hugs. "A warm embrace can soothe even the rowdiest of zombies," he says. And sure enough, every zombie he's hugged is now lying peacefully on the lawn... completely still.
plants.info:
<size=36>Defends against zombies and vehicles with its spikes.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Black Steel Ground Spike King's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Black Steel Ground Spike King.
<color=black>•</color> Reflects 100 (500 after unlock condition Modifier) damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color> Received damage is capped at 1000.
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 1500 Toughness every 15s.
<color=black>•</color> Can puncture tires, dealing 50% of the maximum Toughness to the vehicle zombie and repelling them.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×5 | Black Steel Ground Spike Tough Fruit Subspecies Unlocked
2. Gains a 95% Damage Reduction</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Conversion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>Ground Spike King <-> Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Though still a small child, Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch returned from abroad with a showman's flair. His "turn a stone into gold" trick had audiences roaring with delight. Backstage, as he stirred a mysterious drink, he smirked and whispered, "It's kind of magic, actually."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turns all straight-shooting bullets into coin bullets!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Converts all ordinary straight-shooting bullets encountered into 2 Silver Coins and 1 Gold Coin.
<color=black>•</color> Gold Coins will move in a straight line. Silver Coins will split to the top and bottom rows initially then join the Gold Coins in the middle row after 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color> Silver Coins will deal 50% of the original bullet's damage and return 10 coins when hitting zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Gold Coins will deal 100% of the original bullet's damage and return 30 coins when hitting zombies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. 1% Damage increase to Coin projectiles for every 1000 Coins you have
2. Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch's projectiles now deal splash damage | Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower Subspecies Uunlocked</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump + Suck Gold Magnet</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Sage Person Palm
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Sage Person Palm is one of the top hairstylists in town, revolutionizing botanical fashion with every masterpiece she crafts. "Real style takes real work," she says, twirling a carving knife between her fingers. Hammers and chisels may not be traditional hairstyling tools, but for her, they're essential for "fixing" even the most stubborn strands.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Doom-hypno Ice Spikes. When planted, unleashes a barrage of Doom-hypno Ice Spikes.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each projectile inflicts chill and adds 20 Cryo points. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom. 
<color=black>•</color> Attacks pierce infinitely, prioritizes air units.
<color=black>•</color> Has a chance to hypnotize zombies and cause explosive damage—same effect as Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> When planted, scatter-shoots at most 80 Doom-Hypno Spikes, targeting both air and ground enemies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Attack damage ×3
2. Rigid Corpses take damage equal to 30% of their current HP each time they are defrozen</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Conversion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom <-> Sage Person Palm</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Sun God—lord of light and warmth, the eternal ruler of the heavens. Wherever he treads, darkness fades, and life flourishes under his radiant embrace. Suspended high above the firmament, his indomitable glow pierces the void, casting away despair and igniting hope in all who bask in his presence.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons a Mini Sun to attack zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×5/2s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Inherits the traits of Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower.
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Mini Sun every 30s. The Mini Sun lasts for 15s and deals 60+(40×Amount of Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables) damage to all zombies every 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color> When Sun exceeds 15k, consumes 200 Sun to inflict triple the damage each time the Mini Sun damages zombies.
<color=black>•</color> When the Mini Sun is present, the drop rate of Sun in the level is greatly increased (once every 0.75s).</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins; if there is no Mini Sun on the field, summon it immediately. Otherwise, extend the duration of the Mini Sun by 15s. Only one Mini Sun can exist at a time.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. When Sun exceeds 15k, each attack consumes 0.5% of the excess to boost projectile damage by 20 per 1 Sun spent
2. Mini Sun deals 3× damage</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> With at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors summon a Helios Meteor instead, and the Mini Sun from Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable no longer disappears and deals 5× damage.
<color=black>•</color> Helios Meteor: (1800 + 1800 × Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors) × (1 + 0.2 × Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables) Damage, and drops 1250 Sun.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Gold Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower</color>

plants.name: Multi Skill Energy South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After a full-scale mechanical overhaul, Multi Skill Energy South Melon was a fortress on wheels. Composite armor? Check. Iron reinforcements? Double check. Tactical interface? You bet. Everything was perfect... until he caught a glimpse of his reflection. A crab. They turned him into a crab. "Guys, seriously?! A little heads-up would've been nice!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin with many functions.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color>
<color=#8B0000>Metal Plant. Has a multitude of traits.
<color=black>•</color> Immune to Jack-in-the-Box explosions and protects the plants inside as well.
<color=black>•</color> Forces Mine Worker Rigid Corpses to come out of the ground early.
<color=black>•</color> Halves damage from Cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color> You can use metal objects on it to heal it by 500.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers: </color>
<color=#8B0000>1. On entry, grants all connected Magnetic Plants a Shield equal to 30 × number of Magnetic Plants
2. Now counts twice towards the number of Magnetic Plants</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom > Magnet Force South Melon</color>

plants.name: Sun Energy Flower Pot
plants.introduce: Deep in the garden, where the sun always shines, Sun Energy Flower Pot stands in quiet devotion. He doesn't chatter, nor does he boast—he simply gives, weaving sunlight into golden coins, waiting patiently for you to grow as radiant as he is.
plants.info:
<size=36>Can quickly generate a lot of Sun and Coins.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Produces 50 Sun and 300 Coins every n=(Current Sun/1000) Seconds, where 3 ≤ n ≤ 15.
<color=black>•</color> Inherits Gold Flower Pot's Ultimate-syncing ability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Upgrade costs from Silver Flower Pots to Gold Flower Pots will not exceed 8000
2. Coins exceeding the maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: </color><color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower > Gold Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once the beloved director of the Plant Orphanage, she was more than just a caretaker—she was family. Her broad leaves were the perfect playground for young sprouts, offering shade, comfort, and joy. Though those days have passed, her kindness remains. "Oh? Would you like to try this marshmallow, my boy?" she asks, her warmth as enduring as ever.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots lasers to attack zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Energy Limit: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Search Range: </color><color=#8B0000>(2×Lumos Level+1) Rows</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> It has all the traits of Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella.
<color=black>•</color> Fires lasers to attack zombies, dealing 100% damage every second. Prioritizes air zombies, and deals ×3 damage to air targets. Can attack up to 4 zombies at a time.
<color=black>•</color> Every 2s, consumes up to 10% max energy to heal up to 2 injured plants in a 3×3 area for 5% max HP (max 500). Healing increases by 100% per Lumos Level beyond 1.
<color=black>•</color> When two Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrellas are positioned one above and one below, they will link together, and their detection range will expand to cover the entire screen. In this state, the two Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrellas can simultaneously attack up to 6 zombies, and their damage is doubled. Additionally, if exactly 6 zombies are being attacked, a 3×3 explosion will occur at the location of a random zombie every 6s, dealing 300% of the attack power as damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Energy Limit ×10, Recovery Speed ×20, Healing Speed ×2 | Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
2. Normal Attack Damage ×3, Explosion Damage ×10, Attack Interval → 2s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Flow Light Sage Person Palm + Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Greed Desire Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"They told her not to open it. Naturally, she opened it." Greed Desire Mushroom ran a finger along the ornate lid, gilded and humming faintly with temptation. Whispers spilled from within—hunger, envy, ambition—all begging to be set free. With a smile too knowing to be innocent, she lifted the seal. What emerged wasn't hope. It was profit. "Welcome, little monster," she whispered, as the abyss stirred and a new fortune clawed its way out.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>She can summon Mini-boss zombies!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Illusion Eradicate Mushroom's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Illusion Eradicate Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Mini-boss Rigid Corpse depending on the scene:
Day: Professor Cherryz | Night: Giga Football Striker | Pool: Jackson Worldwide | Fog: Skystrider Mecha | Roof Day: Pozeidon | Roof Dusk: Clown Jill-in-the-Box | Roof Night: Ultra Machine Instrument Tough Fruit
<color=black>•</color> At the same time, summons its ordinary Odyssey variant on all rows.
<color=black>•</color> Defeating the Mini-boss Rigid Corpse gives you a ton of Sun, Coins, and points.
<color=black>•</color> Defeating an ordinary Odyssey variant gives you 1 Surprise Happy Gift Box.
<color=black>•</color> It can only be summoned once per round. This plant will not spawn from a Surprise Happy Gift Box.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Greed Desire Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom <-> Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Originally developed as a rapid-fire prototype for the Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter, Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter was recently upgraded to fire real cherry rounds to combat the zombie surge—earning explosive acclaim.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides enhanced firepower when coordinated with shooter plants directly below.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Hovering plant and Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter.
<color=black>•</color> If the plant directly below attacks faster than every 1.5s, its attack synchronizes with that plant's.
<color=black>•</color> Maximum number of Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooters on the lawn: (number of lanes×2)</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Explosive cherries from plants ×3 damage
2. Attack Interval halved</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter and Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> When Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter and Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom are on the same tile, they perform coordinated attacks, and the former gains 0.05 energy while the latter gains 0.1 energy. Energy drains at 0.3 per second. For the first 7 whole points of energy, each increases the number of shots fired during coordinated attacks by 1. Energy above 7 increases the 8th bullet’s damage by ×(1 + excess point).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Conversion Recipe:<color=#8B0000> Shovel <-> 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Fire God Bounce Bounce Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Napalm-Shroom isn’t just fire on the battlefield—his BBQ skills are legendary. His dream? To host the greatest barbecue party ever, with every plant and zombie in town invited.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs Napalm melons that split on impact and leave behind an inferno.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/6s + 30/0.02s (Inferno)</color>
<color=#720026>Enflamed Debuff: </color><color=#8B0000>Each melon creates an inferno zone that lasts for 2.5s.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Range: 4 tiles; Manual launch: full board. After launching a Napalm melon, rests for 1.5s, then charges up for at least 6 seconds, increasing damage to 1+(charge time in seconds×50%) to a max of 30s.
<color=black>•</color> Attacks pierce all armor and split into 2 additional Napalm melons that target nearby zombies with the same damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Charging speed and max charging duration ×3
2. Inferno zone duration ×2</color>
plants.cost: <size=34>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Melon + Olive Big Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Greed Desire Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Since sailin' back from the Abyss, Ultra Extreme Greed Desire Water Grass be a changed beast - fiercer, greedier, an' twice as hearted. Captain o' the cursed ship, the Raidin' Goldplant, he bears two hearts, one torn from his own breast, t'other plundered from a fallen rival, and clutches a gilded giftbox stuffed with plunder from the Seven Seas. Touch his hearts or his treasure, an' yer ship sinks straight to Davy Jones' Locker.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Greedy overlord of the seven seas, capable of squeezing every last drop of value from zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×3/1.5s + Insta-kill (Drown) × ∞</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Retains all traits of Super Tier Water Grass, but can drag zombies underwater an infinite amount of times (up to once per second).
<color=black>•</color> Rigid Corpses hit by its projectiles turn golden—when they die, they grant ×3 Odyssey points. Max bonus: +2000 points per wave.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Plants deal 5% more attack damage for every 1000 points owned (up to +300%)
2. The Odyssey shop now has a 30% discount on Modifiers</color>
plants.cost:
<size=33>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Twin Gold Goblet Flower > Super Tier Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Iron Bean Little Team
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Iron Bean Little Spray Mushrooms' worst fear finally came true—they really did get stuck to a Magnet Force Mushroom, and no one's been able to pull them off. But maybe it’s a blessing in disguise. With all the materials the Magnet Force Mushroom collected, they've upgraded their gear and become a true "Steel Battalion."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A multi-purpose squad skilled in rapid fire, anti-air, and sniping!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80×4/1s (Machine gun); 240/2s (Flak cannon); 400/3s (Sniper)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Metal plant. 
<color=black>•</color> Machine gun rounds knock back targets and deal additional damage based on the current HP of their Type 2 armor.
<color=black>•</color> The flak cannon targets only air units in its lane, dealing knockback and same-tile splash damage.
<color=black>•</color> The sniper attack shares the same traits as Snipe Strike Shooter.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Sniper always headshots with a 1/3 chance to trigger rapid-fire, but attack CD increased to 7.5s
2. Flak cannon knockback ×2, splash damage ×3 | Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost:
<size=34>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom > Iron Bean Little Spray Mushroom×3</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He was born at the dawn of the universe, his age beyond reckoning. From the primordial void, he plucked three stars to orbit him as moons—treasures not even black holes could steal. Now, the old one finds joy in toying with this cosmic keepsake, as ancient as he is.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hurls ultra-dense black holes that collapse into explosions, releasing all the absorbed energy.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/2 s (Mini Butter)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Metal plant.
<color=black>•</color> 75% chance to launch Mini Butter, shrinking non-miniboss zombies' size and HP to 70%. If shrinking fails, the target is stunned for 1.5s. Instantly kills imp-class zombies.
<color=black>•</color> 25% chance to launch an Ultimate Black Hole that lasts 2s, slows nearby zombies, and absorbs Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice' projectiles in a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color> Each bullet absorbed adds 2s to its duration, up to 7.5s. When it vanishes, it triggers a large explosion (Cherry Peach Explode Bullet-sized) that deals 320 + 60% of stored damage. If it lasted over 5s, the explosion radius significantly increases.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Ultimate Black Hole can absorb all projectiles
2. Ultimate Black Hole's absorption radius ×2</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice and Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> Hail melons from Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice always lob Ultimate Black Holes.
<color=black>•</color> Singularity: Lasts for 3.5s and deals 1800 Cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius when it collapses.
<color=black>•</color> When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower > Jade Rice Little Thrower×3</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Mushroom King
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Magnet Force Mushroom King commands iron with thunder and thunder with magnetic fields. He grants his people eternal magnetism and built a kingdom of electricity. Yet beyond his military conquests and political achievements, he still suffers headaches in the search for a queen with the opposite charge.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Extremely magnetic, quickly absorbs metal objects and turns them into explosive cherries.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Inherits the traits of Flow Light Magnet Force Mushroom, metal object absorption CD: 0.5s.
<color=black>•</color> Can pull the pogo sticks from Little Ugly Jump Jump Kings and convert them into Jack-in-the-Boxes; also pulls (insta-kills) Mini Kirovs and converts them into Jack-in-the-Boxes.
<color=black>•</color> Deals 300 damage every 0.5s to 1 Super Tier 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpse or Black Olive Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpse within range.
<color=black>•</color> Launches absorbed metal after 3s, dealing the same damage and AoE as explosive cherries; with full-map targeting and anti-air capability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack Range ×2 | Magnet Force Mushroom Queen Subspecies Unlocked
2. Absorbs 3 Metal Objects at once, damage to Super Tier 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpses or Black Olive Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpses ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Flow Light Magnet Force Mushroom + Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Tough Fruit journeys through countless parallel worlds of the multiverse and has seen numerous wonders — from a Sphinx that plays eerie music in forgotten deserts, to a skybound ruin where a three-headed idol once stirred; from the glowing meteorites near the Tiberium shores to armored strongholds stamped with Z-Tech. He wanders through dreams, just beyond the grasp of memory. The past fades — but here, he's quite ready for another adventure.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cosmic Tough Fruit with time rewinding and extraordinary invulnerability abilities.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice, anti-crush and takes no more than 1000 damage per hit.
<color=black>•</color> Rewinds to HP from 3s ago after taking 4000 damage and becomes invulnerable for 2s. Within 10s after a rewind, each rewind beyond the third time costs 500 HP (Rewinds within this 10s window do not reset the timer).
<color=black>•</color> 33% chance to ignore incoming damage. Has a 25% chance to teleport biters to the rightmost tile in his lane (10s cooldown).
<color=black>•</color> If HP falls below toughness, restores HP equal to 1× Toughness after 30 consecutive seconds without taking damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower <-> Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Laser Artillery Desk
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He left behind the ceaseless minigun for a railgun that fires with precise, silent power—channeling electromagnetic force sharp enough to remind some of Academy City's famed Railgun and a certain relentless shooter cloaked in black.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes HP to fire pulse rays with infinite penetration.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×5/3s</color>
<color=black>Search Range: </color><color=#8B0000>±10° Horizontal Sector</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk, attacks pierce infinitely and can target air.
<color=black>•</color> If Toughness is greater than 500, each attack consumes 100 Toughness. Other plants cannot absorb damage for Ultra Extreme Laser Artillery Desk.
<color=black>•</color> Attack power scales linearly as Toughness drops, up to a max of 900.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
2. Increases projectile damage and knockback ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter <-> Snipe Strike Shooter</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>At the heart of the tundra stands the Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce, guardian of the frozen wilds. For years, it has endured unyielding winters, its branches heavy with frost, crowned with delicate lotus blooms. Even when playful newcomers etch runes across its bark, it remains steadfast and unshaken.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold gathers on spruce leaves, and lotuses bloom in the trees.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/0.02s (lasts 5s)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/15/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Cold Ice Mushroom/blizzard respectively. Passively gains 1 ice charge every 5s.
<color=black>•</color> Fires a boreal reaper saw every 1.5s that turns into a homing shot on hit, with each instance of attack applying Deep Chill, adding 1 Cryo Point, and granting 1 ice charge.
<color=black>•</color> When ice charge exceeds 50, it depletes to 0 every 5s to heal all plants in a 3×3 area for (ice charge ÷ number of plants)×(0.3×shield + 0.7×HP).
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Boreal reaper saws now last for 15s
2. Healing is no longer split among plants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Cloud Spruce + Lily Flower Cloud Spruce</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Star Torch
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Star Torch may burn brighter than any flame, but it was futuristic cuisine that truly lit up the competition. At the Culinary Clash's grand finale, he shared his trophy with Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Tough Fruit, whose time-travel snacks left the judges starstruck. Even the judge McCornics called it "out of this world."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Fire Torch Tree Stump blazing with Foreign Peach flames, boasting extreme ignition power and granting star projectiles homing capabilities.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch.
<color=black>•</color> No longer spawns Fire Burst Squash Melones. Every 51 projectiles affected spawns a Fire Burst Foreign Peach in front.
<color=black>•</color> Ignites star projectiles (except spicy stars) for ×2 damage, but with original traits removed (except Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor stars' aircraft downing ability), granting global homing with anti-air priority.
<color=black>•</color> Explosive cherries become Explode-o-Stars: ×2 damage, global homing with anti-air priority.
<color=black>•</color> Affects other projectiles like Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch. Triggers Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect on death.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Projectiles required to spawn a Spicy plant are halved
2. Ignites the lane immediately when spawning a Spicy plant is not possible</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon <-> Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After witnessing the how much destructive power she could bring with her nuclear detonation and the nuclear winter that followed, Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower decided to restrain her core reactor and applied for a quieter role as an electricity-free street light. Her constant Cherenkov glow was perfect for it. Unfortunately, zombies kept showing up, and she turned out to be very qualified for emergency use.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Road Lantern Flower sealed with radioactive frost, releasing cold fusion reactions that become stronger with Lumos.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>600/3s</color>
<color=black>Range: </color><color=#8B0000>3×5, can target air</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Attacks apply Deep Chill and add 30 Cryo Points.
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000> Damage increases by 100% × Lumos level.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom. Switching form does not trigger on-death effects.
<color=black>•</color> Inherits traits of Road Lantern Flower.
<color=black>•</color> When targeted by an Ultra Extreme Laser Artillery Desk, refracts the beam into three beams at 0° and ±10°: applies Chill, each hit creates a 1-tile explosion dealing 5% of the initial beam's damage
<color=black>•</color> Can store Lumos energy from Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooters, up to 1000. When a Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooters in a 3×3 area attacks, it consumes (1 + current energy/10) energy to enhance its laser: applies Chill, adds Cryo Points equal to energy spent, and creates a 0.74-tile explosion dealing 50% of the laser's damage.
<color=black>•</color> On death, triggers Cold Ice Mushroom effect and grants 10 Lumos levels to all plants for 10s.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Lumos addition on death ×3
2. Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter and Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color> Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooters can send energy to Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flowers in other lanes. Lumos energy cap increases to 100k. Above 10k energy, enters Overcharge mode (attacks and gains extra Lumos energy every 0.02s). At max energy, collapses into a supermassive blackhole, rapidly pulls in and consumes non-boss zombies, then erupts in a blinding burst that deals 1M damage to all zombies 100 times.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Worry Gloom Mushroom <-> Road Lantern Flower</color>

plants.name: Sun Energy Sleep Lily
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Her devotion to the Sun God flows louder than a raging river. Sun Energy Sleep Lily was eventually dismissed from the Sun Guard for being way too noisy—but that hasn’t stopped her from preaching His glory to every creature beneath the waves. So deep in her zeal, she hasn’t noticed one thing: she’s been blocking all the sunlight from reaching the lakebed.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Golden Sleep Lily that can quickly produce copious amounts of Sun and Coins.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode with Sun Energy Flower Pot</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Produces 50 Sun and 300 Coins every n=(Current Sun/1000) Seconds, where 3 ≤ n ≤ 15.
<color=black>•</color> Inherits Gold Flower Pot's Ultimate-syncing ability.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
2. Coins exceeding the maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Shovel <-> Shovel</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Lantern Cage Giant Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Lantern Cage Giant Mouth Flower wasn't sure how he ended up on land after a deep-sea haul, but he's made himself right at home. "Why go back to the sparse, dark depths when zombies are always on the menu?" he growls. Legend says his appetite is so huge, the gourmet contests could no longer afford their electric bill—guess he's their new emergency power source.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A giant chomper attracting zombies with light—a master of luring, devouring, and digesting.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>5 + (Sum Toughness of Rigid Corpses)^0.33s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000> Each Lumos level reduces digestion time by 10s to a minimum of 5s.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Anti-crush. Takes a maximum of 8k damage each hit.
<color=black>•</color> Can swallow all non-miniboss zombies in a 1.5 tile range.
<color=black>•</color> Using a Big Mouth Flower seed packet on it reduces digest time by 10s.
<color=black>•</color> Upon successful digestion, pulls nearby zombies from adjacent lanes to its lane and heals to full HP.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack range ×2
2. Provides 2 Lumos levels to a 5×5 area during digestion</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Lantern Cage Big Mouth Flower > Giant Size Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Little Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Big brother, big sister, am I not cute?" Ultra Extreme Little Thrower winks at every passerby. "Buy a garlic, please." He works hard at his sales pitch. Why would such a small child be out selling garlic? "Grandpa's movies are too boring, and our house is so full of garlic we can't even store it anymore," he explains.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs mini garlics, which split on impact, with a chance for rapid-fire or spread-fire.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Thrower</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/2s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Inherits rapid-fire and spread-fire chances from Ultra Extreme Thrower.
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles no longer do splash damage, and each splits into a mini-garlic-cabbage, a mini-garlic-kernel (1/4 chance for mini-garlic-butter) and a garlic-melon slice.
<color=black>•</color> These projectiles behave like their non-garlic mini counterparts (See Jade Rice Little Thrower, West Melon Little Thrower and Roll Heart Vegetable Little Thrower) and each grants 1 Poison point, boosting damage by (5×Poison points).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Spread-fire is now guaranteed
2. Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison the zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>×3 + West Melon Thrower <-> Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Born from the fire that forged the stars, Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery burns as creation once did — not to spread without end, but to end all things. When his final blaze fades, only the silence after the first spark will remain.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches cobs of pure lava and heat.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3600 (3×3)/36s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Infuses all plants in the blast area (3×3) with Cherry Peach Explode Bullet (prioritized)/Fire Burst Spicy Pepper (except South Melons and Flower Pots).
<color=black>•</color> Blasts inflict Enflamed Debuff and then does damage.
<color=black>•</color> Blasts split into multiple volcanic bombs on impact, the number increases with more zombies hit (at least 6). Volcanic bombs deal splash damage at half the power of the main blast.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Volcanic Bombs Damage ×3
2. Now triggers Thermonuclear Detonations when main blasts strike Cherry Peach Explode Bullets or Fire Burst Spicy Peppers (Cherry Peach Explode Bullet: Releases 10 Cherry Peach Explode Bullet effects in the surrounding area; Fire Burst Spicy Pepper: Releases 10 Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effects across the entire field. Each deals damage equal to (blast damage × 18))</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Sun Light Emperor Fruit and Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color> Click on a reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery while holding an Ultra Extreme Fire Flame Emperor Fruit with the Glove to make all reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery on the field perform a synergized attack towards the sky. This shot does not cause Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillerys to reload. Every 8th shot calls down an Inferno Meteor that repeats the following cycle 11 times: deals 80× the Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery's blast damage and applies Enflamed to all zombies on screen, and triggers a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect with the same damage on all lanes.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper > Fire Flame Cannon Artillery</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Solarnova is princess of the Solaria Kingdom and a world-famous pop idol. Her hit single Dance of the Blazing Sun is so popular that even Dr. Edgar is rumored to own a copy.
