Despite her fame, she's approachable and loves meeting her subjects and fans, but just don't get too close, or her warmth might burn you.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates sun at extreme speed while melting down nearby projectiles. When active (eyes open), she unleashes searing solar flares; when inactive (winking), she stores radiant energy to be released later.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>50/3s</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Generates Sun and consumes nearby plant projectiles to absorb energy (1 damage = 1 energy). Energy is capped at Attack damage ×4; excess energy is converted to Sun (1 projectile = 5 Sun).
<color=black>•</color> When energy exceeds Attack damage, fires a solar shot that explodes on impact, dealing 100% Damage in a small area.
<color=black>•</color> Using a Coffee Bean toggles active/inactive modes. Does not attack in inactive mode.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. When a solar shot hits a zombie, it causes nearby projectiles to explode as well, dealing 10% attack damage
2. Energy cap ×3, Sun storage amount ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Towards Sun Flower + Gold Towards Sun Flower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>She is the Moon Goddess, embodiment of calm and healing. Wherever her light falls, wounds quietly mend and all things are bathed in gentle restoration. Hanging high above the night sky, she balances yin and yang with tidal power, granting endless vitality.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Periodically summons mini-Moons to heal the battlefield. By the light of the Moon.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×5/1.5s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles +100 Damage per Lumos Level (bonus damage up to +500).</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable.
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Mini Moon every 30s. The Mini Moon lasts for 15s and heals all plants for 50×(number of Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetables on the lawn) HP per second. This effect is tripled on the plant with the lowest HP percentage.
<color=black>•</color> If a Mini Sun is also present, healing effects are doubled.
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage increased by 3× per Lumos Level
2. Mini Moon heals 3×</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> With at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, the Mini Moon from Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable no longer disappears. Each Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable channels a beam into the Mini Moon, which merges them into a single concentrated beam.
<color=black>•</color> Beam Damage: 100 × (channeling plants) every 0.02s, always locking onto the zombie with the highest max HP. Damage scales linearly over time when focusing a single target up to 5×.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower <-> Road Lantern Flower</color>

plants.name: Death God Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Death God Big Mouth Flower stands as judge at the end of all things. In his jaws every offering is measured: the unworthy are stripped away, the pure are given new form, and the balance is upheld without mercy; from his maw comes a verdict no soul can escape.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Click to channel destruction into rebirth for the plants ahead, while turning curses back upon their casters.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800×2/30s (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Does not target zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Manual activation. Triggers a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper blast and a craterless Doom explosion in the tile directly ahead.
<color=black>•</color> If there is a plant (excluding pots and drones) in the tile in front, it is destroyed with a 50% chance to drop its seed packet. If the plant is cursed, the drop is guaranteed and the curse caster loses 15% max HP.
<color=black>•</color> Also spawns a Rigid Corpse Soul of the zombie with the highest HP on the tile in front.
<color=black>•</color>Toughness equals the original zombie. Disappears after 10s. All final damage it receives is transferred to and split among the zombies of the same type. Transfer to mini-boss zombies is halved.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Seed packet drop is now guaranteed
2. Rigid Corpse Soul damage transfer ×2 | Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Big Mouth Flower + Destroy Eradicate Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon is obsessed with recreating cosmic nebulae in the garden. So if you ever see one forming out there, run. That's not a nebula, it's a massive cumulonimbus of melons waiting to fall.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rapidly hurls cryo-melons through temporal vortices, and when charged, can summon a nebula rift that rains down countless more.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/0.35s (no falloff splash damage)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Attacks apply Chill, add 20 Cryo Points and deal 4× damage to frozen zombies.
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> No longer a catapult plant.
<color=black>•</color> Each direct base attack hit grants 1 energy stack.
<color=black>•</color> When energy meter exceeds 50, manually click to consume 30 energy and summon a nebula rift; if energy meter exceeds 100, the nebula rift doubles its projectile output.
<color=black>•</color> There can only be 1 nebula rift active at once. Each lasts 10s, drifting across the screen from left to right and raining down hail-melons.
<color=black>•</color> If the cryo-melon hits a zombie already in chronoshift, applies chronoshift to up to 2 other zombies in the splash area (3 if buffed by West Melon Flower Pot), prioritizing non-chronoshifted targets.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. For the first 5s, the nebula rift focuses on the zombie with the lowest HP, narrowing its attack range to 3 columns around the target
2. Lobbed Cryo-melons Damage ×6, but Splash Radius -50%; Rigid Corpses immune to Chronoshift will still take damage equal to (Elapse Time)% of their HP</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice and Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> Hail melons from Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice always lob Ultimate Black Holes.
<color=black>•</color> Singularity: Lasts for 3.5s and deals 1800 Cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius when it collapses.
<color=black>•</color> When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Ice Melon + Super Time Space West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Burst Flame Cat Tail Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The river is her carefully arranged stage, each ripple a string on her instrument. When zombies wade into the water, Ultra Extreme Burst Flame Cat Tail Grass begins her performance, fireballs as prelude, heatbeams as climax, and ashes as the finale, composing a requiem for her foes.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Holds the power of the everlasting fire, the kindler of fireballs and heatbeams that blast zombies into ash.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable (River Route)</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×2/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Attacks home in on targets across the screen and prioritize flying zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Attacks inflict Enflamed and then cause single-target knockback and explosive cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1 energy stack per round of attack. Gains 60 HP and 60 energy stacks when affected by Fire Burst Spicy Pepper or Cherry Peach Explode Bullet.
<color=black>•</color> At 240 energy, consumes all energy to fire piercing heatbeams at ±15° that deal damage every 0.15s, each hit applying the same effects as her homing shots but with 6× damage and half knockback. Lasts 3s; cannot gain energy during this time.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Heatbeam damage frequency ×2
2. Regular shots' damage ×3</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper > Fire Flame Cat Tail Grass</color>

plants.name: Core Burst Cherry Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The quarrel between two hot-tempered cherries finally ended with theoretical advancements. The brothers agreed that "annihilation" was the most fitting term. "What an explosive annihilation…" "No, it's not supposed to be an explosion but an expansion!" Oh well, the argument started again.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Unleashes a massive big bang, spawning debris that deal piercing damage and leaving behind nuclear radiation.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Explodes into 36 nuclear debris of equal damage and creates a Radiation Zone of the same size as a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion.
<color=black>•</color> Only one Radiation Zone can exist at a time. Lasts 7s, dealing (attack × remaining duration) damage every 0.5s; damage ×3 against unarmored zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Nuclear debris pierce twice. On hit, cause Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion (no crater) and Cherry Peach Explode Bullet explosion of equal damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
2. Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooters, Explosive Cherries, Explosive Squash Melones, Explosive Stars, or Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris when they hit zombies | Core Burst Squash Melon Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet > Destroy Eradicate Cherry Peach</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Sea Demon Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>It rises from the bottomless abyss, bringing tides to the surface. Its followers span sky, land, and sea. Plants praise it as the battlefield’s ruler; zombies forewarn it will drag the world into darkness. Its own thoughts, however, remain unknown.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A resilient ocean overlord whose summoned minions drag zombies into the deep.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable (River Route)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Anti-crush, received damage is capped at 200.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1 energy stack per projectile hit. Gains 5 when fed a Sea Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes 1 energy when damaged, reducing that damage to 1.
<color=black>•</color> Every 15s, knocks back nearby zombies and inflicts 1 Tangle point.
<color=black>•</color> Every 15s, summons 1 Tangler minion that grabs zombies and instantly drowns them; against mini-bosses, deals (5% of their max HP * remaining grabs) as damage.
<color=black>•</color> Changes form when certain seed packets are used on it, restoring 1k HP and gaining 5 energy stacks; after 2s, summons the corresponding minions: 
<color=#0077b6>	- Cold Ice Mushroom Form:</color> Base damage cap is now 20. Every base attack/every time it's affected by an Cold Ice Mushroom, grants a Shield worth of 300 HP to all other plants in its lane.
<color=black>	- Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Form:</color> Single-use. Summons a Doom Tangler that strikes the highest-HP zombie for damage equal to 50% of its max HP, then triggers a craterless Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion.
<color=#ff10f0>	- Charm Confuse Mushroom Form:</color> Hypnotized zombies on the field now absorb damage for it. Summons Hypno Tanglers that only target Hypnotized zombies, drowning them and transforming them into Hypnotized Bombelugas.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Tangler minions can grab and drown up to 3 zombies (or deal ×3 damage) and reward 10 energy stacks for each zombie drowned
2. Fires 3 base attack projectiles at once</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sea Mushroom Group + Sea Demon Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After installing the latest magnetic suspension devices, the Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team finally became a precision strike team. Due to technical limitations, they can no longer use heavy weapons and must rely on machine guns, but their resolve to hit zombies with speed and freedom remains unchanged.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A highly mobile Iron Bean Little Spray Mushroom unit, ready to follow orders and strike across the field.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Iron Bean Little Team's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80 (240 after unlock condition Modifier)×3/0.16s</color><color=#8B0000></color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Iron Bean Little Team.
<color=black>•</color> Clicking the 3 Leaf Grass Controller allows deployment of a Buck-strike unit in any chosen tile to its left. Hold Ctrl to deploy all units simultaneously.
<color=black>•</color> When there are zombies in the chosen tile or its adjacent tiles, the Buck-strike unit fires small Iron Peas, causing knockback and additional damage equal to the target's Type 2 armor HP.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Attack damage ×3
2. Attack damage ×3 | Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom <-> 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Fly Fire 3 Line Shooter
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's time to live up to my name," said the Fly Fire 3 Line Shooter. For years he was trapped on the ground, but now he can finally soar like a true phoenix. Though slightly frustrated that the Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter beat him to it, conquering the skies is still a joy.

-Written by Medineer Gaming</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spreads wings like a phoenix and rides the wind.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Bath Fire 3 Line Shooter's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>160×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Bath Fire 3 Line Shooter.
<color=black>•</color> Flying plant. Projectiles inflict the Enflamed debuff and pierce 2 times.
<color=black>•</color> On death, triggers Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect in the same lane and 2 adjacent lanes.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict the debuff
2. Phoenix peas can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions | Fly Fire 3 Line Shooter Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Shovel <-> 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Sun Light Emperor Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>To push photosynthesis research even further, Ultra Extreme Sun Light Emperor Fruit began a deeper study of chloroplasts. "Clearly, chloroplasts do far more than most plants imagine," says Ultra Extreme Sun Light Emperor Fruit. "They not only increase photosynthetic efficiency, but also promote the growth and mitosis of bowling balls."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stores energy from Sun, using heavier Nuts to drop massive amounts of sun and snowball the profit.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Sun Light Emperor Fruit's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Promotion of Sun Light Emperor Fruit, inherits its other traits.
<color=black>•</color> Tapping on it:
- Spends 500 Sun.
- Restores his Toughness to full.
- Gains 10 Solar charges.
- Summons 2 Bowling Sun Light Tough Fruits that roll at ±45° angles forward and ricochet on hit. These each deal a one-time damage equal to the summoner's HP and drop 5 sun n times, where n equals the number of hits so far.
- Summons a Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit 1 tile ahead.
- Little Devil Rigid Corpseroves an existing Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit by enlarging its size, knockback and damage (higher base damage yields less bonus, down to 60%).
- After not tapping for 1s, the existing Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit will roll forward, crushing and knocking back zombies. Damage per 0.02s is 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. Also drops 15 Sun each time it hits a new zombie.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1 Solar charge every time your Sun increases.
<color=black>•</color> When Solar charge meter reaches 100, automatically consumes 100 Solar charges to summon a Giant Size Sun Light Tough Fruit improved 5 times.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Sun Light Emperor Fruit: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Promotion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Sun Light Emperor Fruit</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Grenade Bullet Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Grenade Bullet Artillery represents the peak of cold ordnance design: distributed warheads, guided escorts, and relentless frostfire. He advances without haste, ending battles not with fury, but with absolute zero.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches bone-chilling clusterbombs for saturated bombardment.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator) ×40</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time: </color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery.
<color=black>•</color> Conversions between Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Grenade Bullet Artillery and Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery reset remaining reloading time of both to 36s.
<color=black>•</color> Manually click to fire 4 Oblivion Clusterbombs which spawn 36 additional Minishells. Minishells prioritize targeting zombies on the field, with a higher chance to strike zombies near the aimed position.
<color=black>•</color> Oblivion Clusterbombs damage the full-screen; Minishells' splash radius is 1.5 tiles. On hit, both apply Freeze for 5s before dealing damage, and permanently reduce zombie speed by 0.005×, up to a maximum reduction to 0.9×.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage ×4
2. Reload Time → 12s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower <-> West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Core Burst Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Core Burst Squash Melon always glares straight ahead with a scowl, wearing the same bad temper even while eating or sleeping. Though this makes his allies uneasy, compared to those two noisy brothers, he is actually quite friendly.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Holds the immense power of universe-contraction, but while on standby, its potential gradually decays to zero.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Core Burst Cherry Peach's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>2 tiles to the left; 3 tiles to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Core Burst Cherry Peach.
<color=black>•</color> On landing, triggers a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom blast with 3600 damage, with the crater remaining at the jump-off position, releases a ring of 36 pieces of Nuclear Debris each dealing the same damage and creates a Radiation Zone lasting [7 - 0.25 × (Core Burst Squash Melon's time on the lawn)] seconds, down to 0s.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
2. Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooters, Explosive Cherries, Explosive Squash Melones, Explosive Stars, or Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris when they hit zombies | Core Burst Squash Melon Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet <-> Squash Melon</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Burst Break Mortar Strike Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Burst Break Mortar Strike Artillery is a cosmologist. Unlike his colleagues, he believes the universe is not a fire that burns out and collapses, but a continuously active existence. To prove this theory, he created high-heat cabbages that can be preserved long-term on Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrellas as a model. The model failed to convince his peers, but achieved unexpected success on the battlefield against zombies.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs cabbages for explosive and incendiary damage.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×n/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery.
<color=black>•</color> Conversion to Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery resets remaining reloading time to 36s.
<color=black>•</color> When attacking, lobs one Pyro Cabbage at each zombie (up to 10) in the forward area of his lane and the 2 adjacent lanes.
<color=black>•</color> Pyro Cabbages apply Enflamed on hit, then trigger an explosion with a 1-tile radius, identical to that of Explosive Cherries.
<color=black>•</color> Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella or Green Treasure Rock Umbrella in front in of his lane can also intercept Pyro Cabbages that would have been thrown to adjacent lanes and boost them.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Pyro Cabbages Damage ×3
2. Attacks have a 10% chance to trigger Cherry Peach Explode Bullet and Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effects at the barrel position and ignore the target limit of 10</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower <-> Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As zombie numbers continued to rise, how to stay popular among zombies became a hot topic. "Relying on traditional communication alone is no longer enough," says Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon. "I will use a brand-new radio-wave microphone to deliver my music and feelings to a wider audience of zombies." With this move, she ushered in a new trend in zombie culture.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charisma aeterna.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> Rigid Corpses that try to bite it are hypnotized instead.
<color=black>•</color> Captures 1 non-flying, non-miniboss hypnotized zombie that passes through, preventing it from leaving the tile and having it absorb damage for the Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon.
<color=black>•</color> Deals damage equal to 0.1× max HP per second to the captured hypnotized zombie and gains 4 energy stacks.
<color=black>•</color> When energy stack is ≥0/50/100, Charge Level is at 1/2/3, draining 1/2/2 energy per second respectively. Charge Level is locked behind a Modifier.
<color=black>•</color> At charge levels 1/2/3, every 15/10/6s, hypnotizes 1 non-flying, non-miniboss zombie within a 1.5-tile radius. On success, the plant inside the shell gains a damage boost of (60% × Charge Level) for 1s. Every time a Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon activates this effect, Ultra Extreme Laser South Melons and Ultra Extreme Magnet Burst South Melons in the same Magnetic system resonate and trigger the same effect simultaneously.
<color=black>•</color> While a Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom is inside, the Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom always benefits from the same damage boost of (60% × Charge Level).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage to captured hypnotized Rigid Corpses halved</color>
<color=#8B0000>2. Charge Level 3 unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Shovel <-> Glove the Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom onto a South Melon</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Emperor Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Heliology is dead!" cries Fire Flame Emperor Fruit, so enraged that he nearly overturns his own laboratory. "They were all lying to me, Towards Sun Flower, Sun Light Mushroom, even Fire Red Lily." Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable considers stepping in to ask what happened, but seeing the lab in ruins and countless bowling nuts rolling across the floor, decides it is better to wait until Fire Flame Emperor Fruit cools off.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>On taking damage, consumes Sun to gain HP. Spends HP to create Giant Inferno-nuts that can tear through Enflamed zombies.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Sun Light Emperor Fruit's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Sun Light Emperor Fruit.
<color=black>•</color> HP can exceed Toughness with no upper limit. Excess HP decays at a rate of (10% of Total HP per second).
<color=black>•</color> When taking non-crushing damage, can consume 15 Sun to negate the damage and gain 50 HP.
<color=black>•</color> Reflects 20 damage when bitten and applies Enflamed debuff.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 3000 HP when affected by Fire Burst Spicy Pepper (including initially).
<color=black>•</color> Click to spend 500 health to spawn 1 Giant Inferno-nut in the tile in front. It begins rolling 1s after the last click. Before it rolls off, further clicks increase the existing Giant Inferno-nut's size and damage. Damage per 0.02s is 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. The Giant Inferno-nut does ×2 to Enflamed zombies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Fire Flame Emperor Fruit: Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower <-> Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Fire Flame Emperor Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Light energy, thermal energy, kinetic energy, mass… all of it is transforming within me." Ultra Extreme Fire Flame Emperor Fruit is driven by grand ambition, forging a path never walked before - unifying all forms of energy into one. For this great mission, he is willing to give up everything, even the annual summer beach ice-cream gathering.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stores energy drawn from fire and flesh, using even stronger Nuts to send zombies "rolling away."

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Sun Light Emperor Fruit's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Promotion of Fire Flame Emperor Fruit, inherits its other traits; Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Sun Light Emperor Fruit.
<color=black>•</color> HP can exceed Toughness with no upper limit. Excess HP decays at a rate of (10% of Total HP per 3s).
<color=black>•</color> When taking non-crushing damage, can consume 15 Sun to negate the damage and gain 50 HP and 2 Infernal charges.
<color=black>•</color> Also gains 10 Infernal charges when affected by Fire Burst Spicy Pepper (including initially).
<color=black>•</color> Click to spend 500 health to gain 10 Infernal charges and spawn 1 Giant Inferno-nut in the tile in front. It begins rolling 1s after the last click. Before it rolls off, further clicks increase the existing Giant Inferno-nut's size, damage and knockback. Damage per 0.02s is 600/1200/1644 for 1/2/3 taps respectively. The Giant Inferno-nut does ×2 to Enflamed zombies.
<color=black>•</color> When Infernal charge meter reaches 100, automatically consumes 100 Infernal charge to summon a Giant Inferno-nut improved 5 times.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Fire Flame Emperor Fruit: Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Sun Light Emperor Fruit and Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color> Click on a reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery while holding an Ultra Extreme Fire Flame Emperor Fruit with the Glove to make all reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery on the field perform a synergized attack towards the sky. This shot does not cause Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillerys to reload. Every 8th shot calls down an Inferno Meteor that repeats the following cycle 11 times: deals 80× the Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery's blast damage and applies Enflamed to all zombies on screen, and triggers a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect with the same damage on all lanes.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower <-> Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>
Promotion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Fire Flame Emperor Fruit</color>

plants.name: Squash Oil Emperor Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash Oil Emperor Spike works at a large butter-processing factory, where the heavy, monotonous labor leaves him so exhausted that he sticks out his tongue every day. After work, all he wants is to lie down at home and rest, but zombies keep coming like flies, forcing him back into battle. Unfortunately, the fighting is just as dull as his day job: a never-ending butter conveyor line.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A sticky, slippery "road of Zomzomphus."

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Ignored by vehicles and immune to most types of damage; takes 10 damage when smashed by Gargantuars.
<color=black>•</color> Attacks knock back but no longer pops tires.
<color=black>•</color> Every 3 total hits, applies 1 second of Butter stun to one zombie.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Squash Oil Emperor Spike's Butter stun duration ×3 | Squash Oil Emperor Pot Subspecies Unlocked
2. Now makes zombies on it to continuously slide to the right</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon Ground Spike + Yellow Oil Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silence. Deep, cold silence. The ashes of what was once thriving crackle faintly. Nothing remains; only lifeless cinders as far as the eye can see. A light breeze brushes across the barren field. This land is scorched now. This is the end.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires Irradiated Shells that inflict extra effects based on status debuffs.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Doom Gatling's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Promotion of Doom Gatling, inherits its other traits.
<color=black>•</color> Fires Irradiated Shells that ignore Type 2 armor in rounds of 4 and applies Irradiated debuff. Fires an Ultimate Irradiated Shell that deals 1800 damage once every 4 rounds of bullets and then rests for 4.5s after the Ultimate Irradiated Shell is shot. Ultimate Irradiated Shells deal splash damage over a large area twice.
<color=black>•</color> Depending on the target's debuffs, gains the following effects:
- Chilled: Freezes the target for 1s and multiplies the damage of this hit by 4.
- Enflamed: Triggers an Enflamed explosion dealing the same damage as this hit.
 - Poisoned: Deals extra damage equal to (hit damage × 0.5 × [Poison value]).
<color=black>•</color> Only Ultimate Irradiated Shell's second explosion triggers the effects above. See Remaining Ember Tree Stump's entry for extra interactions between Irradiated and other debuffs.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Promotion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom > Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom has been growing her hair out for a while now. A lot of people ask how the crack in her helmet got there. She always answers, "Oh, that was on purpose. It lets my hair show."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires special Irradiated Shells that enhance Irradiated's combo with other status debuffs.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Auto-Unlocked After Obtaining Doom Gatling's 2 Modifiers</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>300/1.5s (0.25 Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Promotion of Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom, inherits its other traits; Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Shooter.
<color=black>•</color> Fires Irradiated Shells. Fires an Ultimate Irradiated Shell every 16 attacks, dealing 1800 damage, and then rests for 4.5s.
<color=black>•</color> When frightened, resets attack speed and triggers a craterless Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect (does not self-destruct).
<color=black>•</color> Depending on the target's debuffs, gains the following effects:
- Chilled: Chilled duration increased by 25%.
- Enflamed: Damage bonus increased by an additive 40%, stackable with other increases.
 - Poisoned: Triggers Poison effects twice.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:
</color><color=#8B0000>1. No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to SP variants
2. Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to SP variants</color>

<color=black>Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter and Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 15k.
<color=black>•</color> When Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter and Ultra Extreme Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom are on the same tile, they perform coordinated attacks, and the former gains 0.05 energy while the latter gains 0.1 energy. Energy drains at 0.3 per second. For the first 7 whole points of energy, each increases the number of shots fired during coordinated attacks by 1. Energy above 7 increases the 8th bullet’s damage by ×(1 + excess point).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter <-> Little Courage Mushroom</color>
Promotion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom > Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We're a band of wizards from the Frost Magic Tower. Just look at these fluffy scarves. Nothing's warmer than this, not even lightning magic." Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leeks wiggle their long bunny ears… As for why they have bunny ears at all, that question has baffled taxonomists everywhere.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Channels team power to unleash chain lightning and help Magic Way Cat Tail Grass summon drones.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Magic Way Cat Tail Grass's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Attack Range: </color><color=#8B0000>5×5</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Magic Way Cat Tail Grass.
<color=black>•</color> Tapping a Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek designates it as the Team Leader, as indicated by its lightning orb sparkling. Only one Leader can exist at a time; all others become Members.
<color=black>• Team Leader:</color> Strikes zombies with electricity. On hit, it can arc up to 5 times to other zombies (the same zombie can become a non-consecutive target too) within a 2.2-tile radius. Arcs deal 50% the original damage. Damaged zombies have their DR value reduced by 3 (mini-bosses by 1), down to 0.
<color=black>• Members:</color> Do not attack. Each Member increases the Leader's attack damage by 1.5× and increases the number of arcs by 3.
<color=black>•</color> When the electric arc kills a zombie, a random Magic Way Cat Tail Grass on the field summons a nerfed Drone that fires only 20 straight-shot bullets, each dealing 160 damage.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:
<color=#8B0000>1. Summoned Drone is no longer nerfed and fires 60 shots normally
2. Attack Damage ×3 | Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cat Tail Grass <-> Flash Lightning Ocean Leek</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Mushroom Queen
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Magnet Force Mushroom Queen has spent her whole life trying to harness the power of stars themselves to help her fellow magnetic friends. Starting off small, at least in her mind, she has been successful in linking the power of the Sun to the power of any magnetic system she desires to join; effortlessly providing sustenance to her allies without expecting much in return. Her final goal is to harness the power of a galaxy, and become so efficient in transforming energy that she can unite the plants and zombies. She would also like to find a partner, possibly becoming the queen of a kingdom with a certain other plant...</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses the power of light and magnetism to rapidly produce Metal Objects, while granting damage bonuses and healing to magnetic plants.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Magnet Force Mushroom King's Modifier</color><color=black>
Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Magnet Force Mushroom King.
<color=black>•</color> Produces a random metal object every 30s (10s for initial production) and recovers 500 HP on production. Drag a metal object on it and it will produce 25 Sun. 
<color=black>•</color> Produced metal object is automatically given to Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom, Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom or Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom directly in front.
<color=black>•</color> Metal production speed is increased by (1 + 0.15 × [Lumos Level] + 0.05×n), where n is the Number of Magnetic Connections in the same System, up to a maximum of 4×.
<color=black>•</color> When producing Metal, grants every other plant in its Magnetic System a 3% attack bonus for 30s. If a plant is not at full HP, restores 500 HP for it; otherwise, spawns a random Metal Object at that plant's location. The number of Metal Objects generated by this effect does not exceed (3 + n/3).</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Metal Production CD halved | Magnet Force Mushroom Queen Subspecies Unlocked
2. Heal amount ×3, extra Metal Object production limit (3 + n/3) → (5 + n/2)</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet <-> Towards Sun Flower</color>

plants.name: Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Coldness is the Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella's defining trait. She calls herself an avenger, precisely locking onto every zombie burdened with sin and firing arrows she names Judgment. Though her icy demeanor frightens and alienates young plant sprouts, she has quietly donated to the Plant Orphanage for ten years without fail. That familiar building always reminds her of the happy life she once had.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Scatters chilling light and fires homing ice spikes; can consume energy to switch to a high-damage single-target mode.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrella's Modifier</color><color=black>
Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color><color=black>
Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrella. Inherits Road Lantern Flower's traits.
<color=black>•</color> Targets her own lane and the 2 adjacent lanes. Prioritizes the nearest zombie in range; can target air units.
<color=black>•</color> Fires ice spikes at the target: deals ×2 damage to chilled targets and ×4 damage to frozen targets; also projects a cryo-beam that applies Chill for 5s.
<color=black>•</color> For the first 10 Lumos levels, each level increases projectile damage by 20.
<color=black>•</color> Scatter Mode: Can target up to 6 enemies. Gains 1 energy per attack cycle. Switches to Focus Mode at 40 energy.
<color=black>•</color> Focus Mode: Targets only 1 enemy. Consumes 2 energy per attack cycle and multiplies projectile damage by 6. Reverts to Scatter Mode when energy is depleted.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Damage in Scatter Mode increases linearly up to ×4, Damage in Focus Mode ×4 | Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
2. Cryo-beam in Focus Mode now applies Freeze for 1s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower <-> Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's time to become a BIG Foreign Peach!" Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peach shouts excitedly every time he's lifted into the air by a Gardening Glove. Even though his armor is cobbled together from leftover meteor fragments, hardly enough to support his dream of flight, he enjoys every moment of it. Just don't tell him he looks like a crab, or a bug.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Integrates the traits of multiple magnetic Foreign Peach variants.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Multi Skill Energy South Melon</color><color=black>
Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>160×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Multi Skill Energy South Melon.
<color=black>•</color> Cannot be targeted by zombies and is ignored by zombies. Immune to crush.
<color=black>•</color> Fires quasar projectiles that deal full splash damage in a 1-tile radius (single lane) with no falloff.
<color=black>•</color>Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors within the same magnetic system as Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peachs fire one additional quasar projectile when attacking, dealing damage equal to the Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peach's attack power.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. On entry, resets and grants connected Magnetic Plants an additional Attack buff of 0.5% × number of Magnetic Plants
2. Now counts twice towards the number of Magnetic Plants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>South Melon <-> Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>He burns with a violet, icy chill. Some plants say he is constantly crying; Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom simply calls it "breathing."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Accumulates soul energy to save plants in moments of crisis and unleash surges of ice and fire.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color><color=black>
Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>64k</color><color=black>
Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Enters the field with 1 soul charge. Can hold a max of 3 soul charges. Gains 1 charge for every 500 zombies that die on either side.
<color=black>•</color> When a plant takes fatal damage, consumes 1 charge to leave it at 1 HP, then:
- Restores 50% of max HP to all plants on the field
- Triggers a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect once in every lane (not affected by damage reduction)
- Triggers an Cold Ice Mushroom effect once
<color=black>•</color> Upon death, triggers a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect once in every lane (not affected by damage reduction), then triggers an Cold Ice Mushroom effect once.</color>
<color=black>•</color> The maximum number of Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushrooms that can be on the lawn at once is [(number of map rows) + 2].
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Soul charge cap increased to 10, now gains 1 soul charge whenever a Mini-boss dies
2. When using a soul charge, also grants 1s of invincibility to all plants</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom + Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Squash Oil Emperor Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash Oil Emperor Pot works at the factory, coating little Squash Melones in layers of butter, and has saved up a full year of vacation. But when he finally set foot on the island he had long dreamed of, he found more tourists there than zombies- so many that he nearly melted like butter. Forced to abandon the trip, he chose instead to stay home and bake his favorite buttercup cake.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Uses a few "slippery" tricks to make zombies struggle to move.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Squash Oil Emperor Spike's Modifier</color><color=black>
Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300 (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Squash Oil Emperor Spike. Short plant.
<color=black>•</color> Increases the butter chance for Jade Rice Thrower plants on it from 25% to 50%.
<color=black>•</color> Can generate mini Butter Squash Melones (only one can exist at a time for each Cornposter). The mini Butter Squash Melon leaps toward the nearest zombie up to 1.5 tiles, then lands, applying a 1-second butter stun to each zombie it crushes. It can bounce up to 6 times before disappearing.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Squash Oil Emperor Pot's Butter stun duration ×3 | Squash Oil Emperor Pot Subspecies Unlocked
2. Butter Chance for the plant above 50% → 100%</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Shovel <-> Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Amidst the crackling of fireworks, the old year departs, and the warm spring breeze brings new life. The Spring Festival is the happiest time for all plants. The only minor incident involved the Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon; while setting off fireworks, he accidentally ignited the stage of Towards Sun Flowers that were performing "Gong Xi Fa Cai".</color>
plants.info:
Breathes fire, summons dragons, and blasts zombies away in a lively spectacle.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>200</color>
<color=#3D1400>Range: </color><color=#8B0000>5 Tiles Forward</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Breathes fire every 4s that covers a 5 tile range, dealing fire damage every 0.02s to all zombies it hits (including flying enemies) and triggering knockback and a small cherry explosion every 0.2s.
<color=black>•</color> When they stop breathing, Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon will summon a mini flying Fierce Flame Burst Bamboo that knocks zombies back and triggers a small cherry explosion to every zombie it hits every 0.02s. Can target flying enemies.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Explosion frequency ×2
2. Each zombie hit by Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon's fire breath increases the damage of the next hit of that same attack by 1%, stacking up to 400%</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fierce Flame Burst Bamboo + Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>In the snowy plains, you'll often see the Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block poking through thick snow. It's the winter vitality of the plains, growing a little more each day. As a sidenote, he absolutely loves drawing faces Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce while he naps.</color>
plants.info:
Forms a tough armor, standing firm against strong foes.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce</color>
<color=#3D1400>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce. Other plants cannot absorb damage for Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block.
<color=black>•</color> Immune to crush, knockback, freeze from Snowballs or Blizzards. Restores 1% max HP when hit by Snowball, Snow Fork, or Blizzard effects.
<color=black>•</color> When HP/Shield is below 1× Toughness, restores 10% Toughness per 1.5s and gains a Shield equal to 10% toughness.
<color=black>•</color> On contact with zombies with less than 10× its own HP, deals 10× Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block's own HP in damage and takes 1× its own HP as self-damage.
<color=black>•</color> Records incoming damage. While record damage > 0, takes 1% Toughness damage every 0.02s and deducts the same amount from the record. If record damage > 1M, this damage is increased. Cold Ice Mushroom effect clears the record.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Now receives only 1/3 incoming damage
2. HP and Shield recovery ×2</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower <-> Winter Bamboo Road Block</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Ice God Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Ultra Extreme Ice God Destroy Eradicate Mushroom perfectly embodies the meaning of "paradox." Despite being mostly ice, it loves summer, especially strolling on the beach and soaking up the sun. It's very frustrated that it can't get a tan.</color>
plants.info:
Freezes time and generates ice particle streams that continuously wipe out enemies. Consumes Destroy Eradicate Mushrooms to reach the next level.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable With Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3600 (Cremator)</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's Subspecies. Does not explode automatically.
<color=black>•</color> Click on it once to select a detonation spot. Click again to select. Explosion releases Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect at the target spot, applies 30s of Chronoshift, temporarily freezes the level (delaying the next zombie wave), and spawns 5 sets of vertical portals lasting 10s each. Some effects scale with energy level.
<color=black>•</color> Starts out at 1 energy level. Using a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom on it increases the level by 1, up to 3.
-At energy level 1: 1 ice particle stream per portal, freezes the level for 1s;
-At energy level 2: Explosion damage ×3, 2 ice particle stream per portal, freezes the level for 3s;
-At energy level 3: Explosion damage ×3, 5 ice particle stream per portal, freezes the level for 10s, deals 10× attack to the zombie with the highest HP at the detonation epicenter tile, returns 1 Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon seed packet, and is extremely unstable: if not manually detonated 10s after appearance, explodes in place.
<color=black>•</color> Ice particle streams deal 10 damage every 0.02s to zombies on contact, apply Chill and 1s of Chronoshift, and increase elapsed Chronoshift time by 1s. Can target air. When they disappear with the portals, deal cremator damage in a 1.5-tile radius and apply 10s Freeze.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Now only creates one set of portals, but they spawn ×10 ice particle streams
2. Rigid Corpses immune to Chronoshift will still take damage equal to (Elapse Time)% of their HP</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower <-> Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower pulses with an greedy warmth, casting golden beams that make even the dullest plants sparkle. Its light shines generously, hiding its true intention that it wants to claim the world's riches for itself. Those who linger beneath its glow might feel fortune, but disaster is what awaits them.</color>
plants.info:
Provides Lumos for a large area and boosts plant lasers with light and money.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch's Modifier</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch.
<color=black>•</color> Provides 3 Lumos levels in a 5×5 area.
<color=black>•</color> When targeted by an Ultra Extreme Laser Artillery Desk, splits the beam forward into three Gold Lasers at 0° and ±10°, which drop 50 coins per zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color> Can receive Lumos energy from Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooters, up to 1000. When a Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter in a 3×3 area attacks, Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower consumes (1 + current energy/10) energy, each point increasing the Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter's damage by 1%.
<color=black>•</color> Each Lumos level increases the damage of both lasers above by an additional 0.1×.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. 1% Damage increase to lasers for every 1000 Coins you have
2. Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower Subspecies Uunlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump <-> Road Lantern Flower</color>

plants.name: Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder
plants.introduce: <color=#3D1400>Wicked Untertater is the Arbiter's loyal undertaker, roaming the battlefield with a wicked grin. No plant escapes his scrutiny, and those who fall in his shadow are not simply gone, they are transformed into fuel for his dark magic of soul conjuring and curse cleansing. Some of the fallen may be reborn as echoes of life, giving the world a chance to marvel at his grim handiwork.</color>
plants.info:
On explosion, reincarnates nearby plants, counters curse-casters, and summons a Rigid Corpse Soul.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable with Death God Big Mouth Flower's Modifier</color>
<color=black>Arming Time: </color><color=#8B0000>30s</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Subspecies of Death God Big Mouth Flower. Short plant.
<color=black>•</color> When armed and then triggered, releases Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect and craterless Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect, destroying plants in a 3×3 area with a 50% chance to drop destroyed plant's seed packet, and spawns a Rigid Corpse Soul of the highest-HP zombie within his tile. If the plant is cursed, the drop is guaranteed and the curse caster loses 15% max HP. Does not destroy Death God Big Mouth Flowers, Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunders, Fire Red Lilys or Titan plants.</color>
<color=black>Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Seed packet drop is now guaranteed
2. Rigid Corpse Soul damage transfer ×2 | Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder Subspecies Unlocked</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Conversion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Mouth Flower <-> Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter
plants.introduce:
<color=#3D1400>"Time works in strange ways. One moment I'm the last defender on a devastated lawn, and suddenly it's like all that fighting never happened, and we're using a slightly different strategy against the same crowd of zombies." The front head has many stories like this, but the back head just sighs. "Why do I always take the back seat in these jobs..."

-Written by Boxpone</color>
plants.info:
Receives, channels, transfers, and uses Lumos energy to annihilate targets in spacetime.

<color=#3D1400>Usage Conditions: Odyssey Mode | Unlockable</color>
<color=#3D1400>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40</color>
<color=#3D1400>Range: </color><color=#8B0000>5 Tiles Forward</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Every 0.5s, gains Lumos energy equal to its current Lumos level. Storage cap 1000. Energy consumed for attacks or transfers = 1 + current energy × 10%.
<color=black>•</color> Can transfer Lumos energy to Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter in front in the same lane, or to selected Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower or Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower (not adjacent). Clicking on self makes it target zombies and attack.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes Lumos energy every 0.1s for transfer, supplying 10% of its own attack as Lumos energy to the target. Each energy spent doubles the supplied amount.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes energy every 0.2s to attack, increasing damage by the amount of energy spent. Attacks apply Chronoshift. Lasers are enhanced if there is an Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower or Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower transferring energy within a 3×3 area.</color>
<color=black>Main Odyssey Modifiers:</color>
<color=#8B0000>1. Lv1: Lumos energy cap increase from 1000 to 2000; Lv2: Lumos energy cap further increased to 10k
2. Boosts Transfer efficiency by 50%, and by 250% if target's energy < 1000</color>
<color=black>Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower Synergy Modifier:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> You must have unlocked all Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter and Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom's modifiers before this synergy becomes available in the shop for 20k.
<color=black>•</color> Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooters can send energy to Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flowers in other lanes. Lumos energy cap increases to 100k. Above 10k energy, enters Overcharge mode (attacks and gains extra Lumos energy every 0.02s). At max energy, collapses into a supermassive blackhole, rapidly pulls in and consumes non-boss zombies, then erupts in a blinding burst that deals 1M damage to all zombies 100 times.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Flow Light Middle Continue Shooter + Super Time Space Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Pea Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Actually, the Towards Sun Flower behind me is my sister," Pea Towards Sun Flower explained to everyone. "We've been inseparable since birth. She loves producing Sun, and I destroy zombies on her behalf." But everyone knows the truth: the cheerful Pea brother is a total siscon. After all, every zombie that gets near his sister mysteriously ends up vaporized by sunlight.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea Towards Sun Flower can fire Sun shots that occasionally produce Sun.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Every third shot drops 5 Sun when hitting targets.</size>
plants.cost: <size=36></color>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Towards Sun Flower</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You think I have red-hot anger issues? Me? Bah! You're red and hot! Your whole family is red!" Cherry Peach Shooter despised being teased about the color of his head. But the jokes didn't last long. It was just a happy incident. After eating special cherries, Pea Shooter found himself turning red and hot, and surprisingly, he could shoot cherries.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Peach Shooter fires powerful cherries.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Explode Bullet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"So… it's obvious… we are Pretty Cures, aren't we?" The two Towards Sun Flower sisters tried to suppress their excitement. "The world needs us to save it!" Their passion bubbled over as they shouted together, "Flash!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Explode Bullet can produce Sun after killing zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces 25 Sun for each zombie killed in the explosion.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I heard some zombies grumbling about their inability to eat cherries. Well, here I am!" The cheerful Cherry Peach Tough Fruit shook the leaves atop his head, boasting about his pure cherry flavor. "But first, you have to promise me something: when you have cherries, share a bit with me. In fact, just give me everything you've got! I was born for this!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Peach Tough Fruit can absorb explosion damage and restore Toughness.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Absorbs Cherry explosion damage to restore 200 Toughness.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Tough Fruit Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"No... don't call me ugly, or else... wait... I'll spray you." Tough Fruit Shooter has always struggled with his "unique" appearance. But he firmly believes that what's inside a plant matters more than how it looks. Seeking guidance, he humbly asked senior Bowling Nut for advice and eventually mastered the technique of rolling nuts like bowling balls.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit Shooter fires mini-nuts that can penetrate zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5 Seconds (Piercing) </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Tough Fruit</color></size>

plants.name: Super Tier Cherry Peach Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Meet Super Tier Cherry Peach Shooter, the ultimate plant killer. He's more irritable than ever—who would've thought the warm and friendly Cherry Peach Shooter would swallow another special cherry? Don't push your luck with him. That cherry stuck in his throat might just be his next shot—his face is already turning red!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots out explosive cherries that explode on impact.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Its bullets will deal area explosion damage.
<color=black>•</color> Has immunity to cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color> Reduces the Recharge of the last Cherry Peach Explode Bullet seed packet used for its fusion by 85%.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun Light Tough Fruit always sees himself as an angel, blissfully unaware that the other plants often talk behind his back. "You know, if he adds a few black lines, he'd look exactly like a bee!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Tough Fruit produces Sun while protecting your plants.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage Phases: </color><color=#8B0000>1333/2666</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces 25 Sun on damage phase transitions. Drops 50 Sun on death.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Tough Fruit</color></size>

plants.name: Pea Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pea Earth Bean Thunder may not have eyes, but he has his own special way of sensing zombies. "I feel it…" he murmured, "The zombies are getting closer… closer… closer…" Pea Earth Bean Thunder's heartbeat quickened, and so did his firing speed. Faster, faster… until, with a "bang," Pea Earth Bean Thunder exploded into a burst of potato-flavored fireworks.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea Earth Bean Thunder can attack before unearthing.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Fusion returns 50 Sun.
<color=black>•</color> Attacks faster as zombies get closer, with a minimum attack interval of 0.5s. Upon exploding, deals 1800 damage to zombies in a small radius and releases 36 projectiles in all directions.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Double Shot Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Double Shot Shooter lives by the motto "good things come in pairs." Whether it's fighting zombies or handing out presents, he does it all in twos. "But come on," Double Shot Shooter teased, "those cherries of yours aren't even close to ripe."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Peach Double Shot Shooter can fire two cherries at a time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Stop at red lights, slow down at yellow lights, and obey traffic rules!" Sun Light Earth Bean Thunder frequently warns zombies. But to the zombies, all they see is the disgusting green hue before them. He clutches his green leaves and pouts, wishing for more sunshine. "After all, sunshine is what fuels us all!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Earth Bean Thunder produces Sun until and after its explosion.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Fusion returns 25 Sun.
<color=black>•</color> Drops 50 Sun on explosion.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Earth Bean Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once seen as small and weak, Earth Bean Tough Fruit now stood tall and strong, boasting a pair of big eyes and firm flesh. Yet beneath that sturdy exterior, he felt fragile and feared shrinking back to his former size. The zombies quipped, "If you take another bite, you'll explode!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Earth Bean Tough Fruit can explode while being eaten and once when broken.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage Phases: </color><color=#8B0000>1333/2666</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>500/Phase Transition, 1800/Death</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Causes single-tiled explosions on damage phase transitions.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Pea Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Big Mouth Flower has always envied Pea Big Mouth Flower's ability to spit out zombie remains, and he's tried to learn the trick more than once. Little did he know, though, that the secret wasn't a special skill—it was just that Pea Big Mouth Flower's mouth was slightly deformed, causing bits of zombie to leak out while chewing.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea Big Mouth Flower can fire parts after biting.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour); 80/3s (Rigid Corpse part)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>30s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Spits out rolling zombie parts while chewing that deal 80 damage each and have infinite pierce.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Big Mouth Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As a young plant, Big Mouth Tough Fruit was notoriously picky about food, never swallowing zombies in one bite, which frustrated its parents. After much persuasion, Big Mouth Tough Fruit finally learned to consume zombies whole, just like its predecessors. "I'm not picky! I just want to imitate how zombies eat. I should try something new, right? It's definitely not because I don't have a neck!" Big Mouth Tough Fruit said while chewing on a zombie.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Big Mouth Tough Fruit can restore Toughness after eating zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Restores 1000 Toughness after digestion.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Big Mouth Flower savors every meal, despite his smaller mouth. "Big Mouth Flowers are sloppy and don't hit the gym; they fall apart on the front line," he scoffs. "I only eat the essence of zombie meat and spit out the rest," he grins, though his backyard is filling up with leftovers.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Both a bulwark and fierce attacker.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000> 200/1.75 (Chomp); 80/3s (Rigid Corpse part)</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Chomping zombies restores 200 Toughness and deals 200 damage. Spits out rolling zombie parts after that deal 80 damage and pierce infinitely.
<color=black>•</color> Instantly kills unarmored zombies with less than 500 Toughness, restoring 400 Toughness. Also spits out parts that knockback zombies. 
<color=black>•</color> Every 40s, devours a zombie and restores to max (up to 16k HP). Excess Toughness drains at 200 per second.
<color=black>•</color> Damage taken per hit is capped at 1/3 Toughness.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Tough Fruit + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone was curious about how Sun Light Big Mouth Flower transformed the zombies it devoured into sunlight, but it always hesitated to share its secret. One day, Towards Sun Flower discovered that her Plant Food content had significantly diminished, revealing the truth: it wasn't actually turning zombies into sunlight.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Big Mouth Flower can produce Sun after swallowing zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces 100 Sun after swallowing a zombie.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Earth Bean Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Delicious and enticing, Earth Bean Thunders taste just like self-heating mashed potatoes, earning rave reviews from zombies. Among them, fries take the top spot in popularity. As zombies flock to the tantalizing aroma of French fries, they have no idea they're also indulging in tasty potato chips. "Just wait and see," Earth Bean Big Mouth Flower said with a mouthful, "Their nutrients will soon become new mines."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>After swallowing a zombie, the Earth Bean Big Mouth Flower will grow Earth Bean Thunders in front.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>20s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Fusion returns 75 Sun.
<color=black>•</color> Plants a fully armed Earth Bean Thunder in front of it upon finishing digesting a zombie. Also explodes like a Earth Bean Thunder on death.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ever since her drink with Cherry Peach Explode Bullet, Big Mouth Flower has been constantly "buzzing." She turned into an absolute menace every meal. The sound of chewing transformed into explosive pops as plates and bowls flew everywhere, leaving everyone unwilling to dine with her. After a show of hands, Cherry Peach Big Mouth Flower ended up eating in the yard… at least she no longer has to buy new tableware.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces a cherry explosion upon eating a zombie.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour) + 1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Creates a 3×3 Cherry explosion in the tile directly ahead on successful biting.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Big Mouth Flower</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Machine Gun Shooter's barrel was always red hot. He assured everyone that it was preheated to ensure faster firing. Everyone bought the story—until they caught him eating special cherries without even removing the barrel.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Peach Shooter's final form!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×4/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Machine Gun Shooter + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Pea Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Don't let my size fool you; even a small body can contain a lot of energy," Pea Little Spray Mushroom cautions those who underestimate him. "We all began as tiny mushrooms, making progress a little at a time. With dedication to a sunny breakfast, you can become just like me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pea Little Spray Mushroom shoots further than Little Spray Mushroom.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Double Shot Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Who am I? The double-shot holds the answer!" exclaims the little Double Shot Little Spray Mushroom, proudly flaunting the twin leaves atop its head. With double the firing rate and double the cheer, these spirited beings thrive in groups, eagerly pouring their firepower onto the battlefield, showcasing that size doesn't define their strength.</color></size>
