plants.info:
<size=36>Double Shot Little Spray Mushroom can fire two small peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Pea Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I carry my ancestors' spirit - I won't fall here!" Iron Bucket Pea Shooter declared. When told his helmet looked like Iron Bucket Rigid Corpse's, he retorted, "Then let's invoke their will and ride again!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Iron Bucket Pea Shooter has the ability to crack armor.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Metal plant. Recovers 500 Toughness when fed metal object.
<color=black>•</color> Takes half the damage from explosive cherries.
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles knock back zombies and instantly break Type 2 armor (before damage reduction).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Tough Fruit Little Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Nut or mushroom? Why worry about labels? Tough Fruit Little Mushroom isn't about to tell you it's actually a matsutake in disguise anyway.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit Little Mushroom can be your stalwart defender despite its size.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Little Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"As a kid, I believed zombies were nothing more than fairy tale monsters," Charm Confuse Little Mushroom said softly. "Now, don't get it twisted—I'm just restoring them to the fairy tale form they were always supposed to have."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shrinks a zombie and makes it fight for you!

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Makes a zombie smaller (cuts Toughness to 70%) and fight for you.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The colorful Charm Confuse Big Spray Mushroom makes a grand debut! With a blast of perfume, it can turn zombies around in an instant. Some claim it's a secret technique passed down by the mushroom family, while others believe it's a cutting-edge military weapon. Charm Confuse Big Spray Mushroom just smiles and says, "It's all thanks to Charm Confuse Mushroom helping me rinse my mouth everyday."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charm Confuse Big Spray Mushroom sprays fumes that can hypnotize zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s (Piercing) </color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Chance to hypnotize zombies with less than 50% Toughness. The lower the zombie's HP, the higher the chance, up to 25%.
<color=black>•</color> Hypnotization threshold is removed for zombies already hit by Charm Confuse Little Courage Mushroom.
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, then reverts to a Big Spray Mushroom.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Little Courage Mushroom has always been afraid of zombies. In order to reduce her fear, Charm Confuse Mushroom tells her a bedtime story every day: "Actually, there are good people among zombies." Over time, Little Courage Mushroom was finally brainwashed. Now she can use spores to brainwash zombies. Of course, she is still very afraid.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charm Confuse Little Courage Mushroom can fire spores in 7 colors.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Randomly fires 1 of 7 types of spores. When a zombie is hit by all 7 types of spores, it will be hypnotized. Each time it is hit by a type of spore, the hypnotize probability of the Charm Confuse Big Spray Mushroom will increase.
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, then reverts to a Little Courage Mushroom.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom + Little Courage Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Big Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Courage fills me, no fear remains~ Whether it's spring, fall, winter, or summer~" Big Courage Mushroom no longer shrinks in the face of zombies. "I used to tremble, but Senior Big Spray Mushroom told me, 'If a zombie gets near, spray your spores. Hiding won't solve anything.'"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Big Courage Mushroom is ready to take on the zombies, near or far!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s (Long range); 30/1.5s (Short range, piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Shoots 2 spores at once. When zombies get within 4 tiles in range, sprays piercing fumes instead.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Little Courage Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Charm Confuse Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Charm Confuse Mushroom speaks with a soft smile, "Each spore carries my love, and when they bloom, it's like a spring breeze caressing the air." She even twisted her head into a heart to express her feelings. Her eyes shine with sincerity, hoping that maybe, just maybe, the zombies will understand her love.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Tier Charm Confuse Mushroom can fire explosive Charm spores.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Deals 40 no-falloff splash damage in a 1-tile radius.
<color=black>•</color>  Has a chance to hypnotize zombies with < 60% Toughness (ignoring Type 2 armor).
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, then reverts to a Big Courage Mushroom.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Little Courage Mushroom + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Tall Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The taller you are, the more powerful you become." Tall Tough Fruit firmly believed in this, which is why he always stayed on the front line. Other plants would urge him to take it easy, but he'd just smile and say, "It's fine, I'm tall. As long as you fight quickly, the zombies won't have time to eat all of me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tall Tough Fruits are heavy-duty wall plants that can't be vaulted or jumped over.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. Blocks Pole-vaulting Rigid Corpses, Dolphin Riders and Jump Jump Rigid Corpses. Cannot block Yeti Riders and charged Pogo jumps. Can only be placed on existing Tough Fruits.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>125</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Olive Tall Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Olive Tall Tough Fruit looked fierce, causing some small plants that didn't know the truth to feel scared by his appearance. However, the plants that understood Olive Tall Tough Fruit knew that beneath his serious exterior lay a strong determination to protect his companions. The stolen helmet undoubtedly boosted his confidence.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Olive Tall Tough Fruit is able to hold a huge amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>16000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Metal plant. Can be fed metal objects to restore 500 Toughness.
<color=black>•</color> Tall plant.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Olive Hat > Tall Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants hold conflicting feelings about Iron Bucket Tough Fruit. As an exemplary soldier, he executes orders with unwavering precision, yet his cold demeanor leaves much to be desired. The rust at the corners of his mouth hints at a storied past. In the quiet moments, however, Iron Bucket Tough Fruit wrestles with an unspoken worry: "How do I prevent rust in a humid garden?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blocks the zombies' advance with a wall of iron.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can be fed corresponding metal objects to restore 500 Toughness. This also applies to other Metal Plants. All Iron Bucket plants receive half the damage from explosive cherries.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Double Shot Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Unlike his bright and cheerful brother, Double Shot Shooter leads a carefree life—until it's time to fight. He secretly mastered the art of double shooting but kept it hidden from Pea Shooter. "I just want him to live happily, without ever needing to learn these battle skills."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Double Shot Shooter fires two peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun Light Mushroom hates sun. He hates it so much that when it builds up in his system, he spits it out as fast as he can. He just won't abide it. To him, sun is crass.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sun Light Mushrooms give small sun at first and normal sun later.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>15→25/25s
<color=black>Growth Time: </color><color=#8B0000>120s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Machine Gun Shooter, the big brother of the Pea family, stands tall with his gun barrel, the very foundation of everyone's safety. His back is like a monument on the battlefield, admired by all. Yet, he smiles modestly, knowing that his daily life is actually managed by his younger brother, Pea Shooter. "I can't live without him," he admits quietly.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Machine Gun Shooter shoots four peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4/1.5s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Crack Pod Shooter + Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Twin Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Twin Towards Sun Flower are known as sisters, always working behind the scenes rather than on the battlefield's front lines. Their role is to support everyone from the rear, but make no mistake—you must protect them. If they're harmed, many plants will quietly shed tears.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Twin Towards Sun Flowers give twice as much sun as a normal sunflower.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25×2/20s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Towards Sun Flower</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The cold-blooded Cold Ice Shooter rarely displays his emotions to other plants. Some say his heart is even colder than the snow peas he fires. Cold Ice Shooter doesn't want to come off that way, but every time he opens his mouth, the bullets he launches plunge the atmosphere around him to freezing temperatures.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Shooters shoot snow peas that damage and slow the enemy.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each snow pea inflicts chill and adds 10 Cryo points. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Cold Ice Little Spray Mushrooms didn't set out to master refrigeration technology. During a hiking trip, they forgot their quilts and spent an entire night frozen atop a mountain, frost forming on their heads. Later, Cold Ice Shooter, captivated by their frosty appearance, gifted them some icicles to complement their new look.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Little Spray Mushroom fires icicles that slow down enemies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts chill and adds 5 Cryo points for every icicle hit. Pierce 2 times. Deals ×4 damage to frozen and chill-immune zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Little Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Smaller in size, same big abilities!" Cold Ice Little Mushroom's signature poker face never cracks as he delivers his jokes, and that might just be why zombies freeze on the spot.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Little Mushroom can temporarily freeze zombies they come into contact with.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Freezes zombies that eat it in place.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold Ice Big Spray Mushroom stands out among the Big Spray Mushrooms. His study abroad in the freezing Alaskan wilderness made him even cooler—literally. Though he only studied hair design for a few years, he's pretty proud of it.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Big Spray Mushroom's fumes can pass through and freeze zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s (Piercing) </color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000> Attacks inflict chill and add 5 Cryo points. Cold Ice Big Spray Mushrooms can be upgraded to Cold Ice Worry Gloom Mushrooms using a Fertilizer.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold Ice Little Courage Mushroom believes he stands apart from other scaredy-shrooms. Unlike them, he never shrinks in fear and joins in all activities without hesitation. However, that's only because when he gets scared, the air around him plummets in temperature, leaving everyone too afraid to startle him.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Little Courage Mushroom fires freezing spores.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict chill, add 10 Cryo points and deal ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Freeze nearby zombies when they get near.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit raised his icy spikes high, ready to confront the zombies. Others remarked on how "cold" and "silent" he seemed. Yet, his expression remained unchanged, resolute in his defense against the undead. The truth was his face had simply frozen in place.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tall Tough Fruits with a minty taste. They slow down zombies that bite them.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Rigid Corpses that bite it are chilled and accumulate 10 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tall plant. When affected by Cold Ice Mushrooms, heals 1000 Toughness.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Tall Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I will freeze the world, and silence will reign. The extreme cold will disrupt your body's temperature system, so it won't be very painful," Cold Ice Destroy Eradicate Mushroom proclaims. He seldom appears in battle, but when he does, a blizzard follows in his wake. With a flash of white light, even time seems to freeze.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Destroy Eradicate Mushroom can destroy zombies in the entire screen and freeze time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Freezes surviving zombies for 5 seconds. Also freezes the level temporarily – no new zombies will appear within 10 seconds.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Charm Confuse Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A frosty beauty? An untouchable flower? Cold Ice Charm Confuse Mushroom couldn't care less. She quietly took care of the frosty ornament on her head, always ready to hand her Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit headgear to the zombies at any time. "They'll appreciate the chill vibe," she remarks coolly.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>When a zombie eats a Cold Ice Charm Confuse Mushroom, it will transform into a Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpse that will fight for you.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Upon being bitten turns the zombie into a Hypnotized Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpse, freezes the full field and disappears.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>While some plants instinctively bury their heads when nervous, Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom thrives on excitement. His adrenaline spikes, causing his spores to fire at an increasing rate. It's wise to avoid provoking him again, or he might explode from all that pent-up energy.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom's attack speed increases as it attacks.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s (0.25s Minimum)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack will shorten the attack interval by 0.1s, to a minimum of 0.25s. Hides and resets when zombies get near. Will explode when zombies get near while peak attack speed is reached.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Destroy Eradicate Big Spray Mushroom, the misanthropic workaholic, can't stand the sight of zombies—too much of a distraction. He's got a small stash of bullets, but they're more than lethal enough. "Don't bother me unless it's urgent. If you want them dead, just shoot them yourself." Still, his sharp efficiency keeps everyone looking up to him.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destroy Eradicate Big Spray Mushroom can destroy most zombies in front of it.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800/30s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Click manually to attack all zombies in the row in front.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Little Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Destroy Eradicate Little Mushroom may be small, but his temper is explosive. Disagree with him, and he might blow up—no eye contact needed. It's best to admire him from afar—just don't get too close, or things might get messy.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destroy Eradicate Little Mushroom will explode when it comes into contact with a zombie.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Will explode when zombies get close.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Charm Confuse Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The plants have always wondered why zombies can't be killed for good. Recently, Destroy Eradicate Charm Confuse Mushroom uncovered the mystery: "I didn't really do much," it said modestly. "I just kindly helped the zombies activate their backup hidden power source. Doesn't that red zombie look especially harmless? I did warn them, though."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rigid Corpses that eat the Destroy Eradicate Charm Confuse Mushroom will get hypnotized, and explode after death.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Rigid Corpses that eat the Destroy Eradicate Charm Confuse Mushroom will be hypnotized and cursed. The cursed zombie will explode like a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom upon death/leaving the lawn, but also destroying the plants in its tile (if there is any).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frost has wrapped around his body, stripping away the innocence of his youth. His eyes, colder and deadlier than any gun's barrel, now only show disdain for his enemies. He's become the reaper, the end of the line. Anyone caught in his frosty sights would do well to leave one less meal prepared at home.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Tier Big Spray Mushroom can fire chilly doomspikes.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Add 10 Cryo points to zombies each hit. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Pierces 2 times. Splashes for 10 damage without falloff within a range of 1 tile.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Cold Ice Mushroom + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Squash Melon Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"He has three heads, and his base isn't even a leaf! He looks nothing like a regular pea!" Many plants cower at the sight of 3 Line Squash Melon Shooter's peculiar appearance. Yet, 3 Line Squash Melon Shooter remains unfazed. He thrives in his vibrant life, battling zombies, reading voraciously, playing chess, and winning every pool skipping contest.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>3 Line Squash Melon Shooter can fire small bouncing squashes.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×3/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Every time a mini-squash hits the ground, it inflicts 40 points of damage to nearby zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + 3 Line Shooter</color>

plants.name: Ground Spike Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ground Spike Tough Fruit is always glaring, always frowning. "I need them to know I'm not a snack," he insists. The zombies, however, just laugh—because when has a Tough Fruit ever been scary? Then they take a bite. Then they learn. The hard way.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ground Spike Tough Fruit punctures the tires of approaching Snow Sled Vehicle Rigid Corpses!!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Reflects 50 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color> Punctures incoming tires in exchange for 500 Toughness. It cannot protect against submarines or being stomped by Gargantuars.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: Fire Burst Tangle Surround Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Passion is like fire," and Fire Burst Tangle Surround Water Grass knows this saying all too well. No amount of water can quench their fervent flames! Too bad, the nearby zombies can only feel the heat of the "grilling". Look at them, they have already turned to ashes in this relentless fire!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fire Burst Tangle Surround Water Grass will burn the entire row of zombies upon contact.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown) + 1800 (Cremator)</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Squash Melon Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash Melon Water Grass stands out as a true philosopher among plants. It often ponders profound questions like, "Where does the grass come from, and where does it go?" However, its disregard for personal hygiene and unkempt hair make other plants shy away, preferring to keep their distance.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash Melon Water Grass can drag three zombies into the water.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown) ×3</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Drags three zombies into the water. Each drag also deals 600 damage to nearby zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Water Grass Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Line Water Grass Shooter basked in the sun, his eyes scanning the horizon. "Many plants are scared of my gaze," he chuckled. "But they'd understand if they had to wear three pairs of sunglasses for protection like I do!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can fire kelps that slow down aquatic zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s + Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 1 Tangle value.</color>
<color=#006400>Tangled Debuff: </color><color=#8B0000>Slows targets and stackable with Chill. Rigid Corpses affected receive more and more additional percentage damage from kelps based on the zombie's Tangle Value, until they're insta-killed when the Tangle Value is full (30).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Fire Torch Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's sweltering out here!" Super Tier Fire Torch Tree Stump fumed. Convinced that the intense weather was to blame for its skin, it noted how the flames on its head had also turned a vibrant red. Maybe it was the perfect time to kick off a summer adventure called the "Sledding Tour."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Tier Fire Torch Tree Stump can provide an even stronger damage boost to projectiles!

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Explodes like a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper upon death.
<color=black>•</color> Ignites projectiles for the following effects:
-Peas, Potatoes and Low-tier Ignited Peas: +40 damage
-Charm Confuse Pea Shooters: +30 damage
-Fire Spicy Pea Shooters: +30 damage, turn into phoenix peas
-Cold Ice Shooters: Turn into regular peas
-Cherries, Iron Peas, Suns: ×4 damage, Sun shots now drop 15 Suns instead of 5.
<color=black>•</color> Deals 40 damage-over-time to nearby zombies every 1.5s.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Fire Burst Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>High temperatures and spiciness always go hand in hand. Fire Burst Tree Stump may not grasp this concept, but his years of working at the barbecue stall have certainly infused him with a distinctive heat.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Projectiles ignited by the Fire Burst Tree Stump has greatly increased power.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Explodes like a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper upon death.
<color=black>•</color> Ignites projectiles for the following effects:
-Peas, Potatoes and Low-tier Ignited Peas: +30 damage
-Cold Ice Shooters: Turn into regular peas.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Fire Burst Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm not as impatient as my brother," Fire Burst Squash Melon stated calmly. "He rushes through everything, but I've learned that true success comes from patience and careful observation. Sometimes, it's best to wait and let the fire simmer."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fire Burst Squash Melon can burn a whole row of zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000> 1800 (Single tile, Squash Melon) + 1800 (Lane, Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>2 tiles to the left; 3 tiles to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Releases Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect when crushing zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Why is 3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump so rich?" the plants frequently pondered. "Oh, it's no big deal," he shrugged. 3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump then produced three peas from his hair and added, "I used to work as a magician in a circus."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits flaming peas into at most 3 lanes.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
Ignites peas:
<color=black>•</color> 1st ignition is exactly like Fire Torch Tree Stump;
<color=black>•</color> 2nd ignition splits into two peas on the rows above and below;
<color=black>•</color> 3rd ignition splits into three peas across all three rows;
<color=black>•</color> The cycle repeats.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Fire Torch Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Fire struggles to exist beneath the water, which means I can't use my flames to light the way," Fire Torch Water Grass admitted. "But once above the surface, my flames can shine once again."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ignites kelp shots and drags one zombie into the water.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Ignites peas and kelp shots for +20 damage. Ignited kelp shots can add 1 Tangle Value to all zombies in the splash range. For every 100 shots lit, a Flame Light Tangle Surround Water Grass is spawned in front.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Flame Light Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Flame Light Squash Melones jump out from the Squash Melon Fire Torch Tree Stump one by one, "It's getting hot in there; our entire body is melting!" they declared.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Just a Squash Melon grilled and glazed with delicious sap.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to the left; 1 tile to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Cannot be used for fusions.
<color=black>•</color> Can be converted to a regular Squash Melon using an Cold Ice Flower Pot.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Singe Black 3 Line Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Why does Fire Burst Spicy Pepper always get all the credit?" Singe Black 3 Line Shooter exclaimed, smoke escaping from his mouth. "If they only realized that fusing with Fire Burst Spicy Pepper burns your peas." He turned to Fire Torch Tree Stump with a serious look. "Trust me, you wouldn't want to munch on charred peas!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>A 3 Line Shooter who can't fuse because he's scorched.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces a line of flames that deal 1800 (Cremator) damage in three lanes when planted or fused.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Squash Melon Fire Torch Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's way too hot! Too hot!" Squash Melon yelled, trapped in the flames of Fire Torch Tree Stump. "Who put me here? I should be squashing zombies, not being the punchline at a barbecue party!" The heat was overwhelming, and as he reached his breaking point, he ignited, bursting forth from the torch to rejoin the battle against the zombies.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces a Squash Melon in front for each 60 peas that pass through it.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>For every 60 peas lit, a Flame Light Squash Melon is spawned in front.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Ground Spike King
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ground Spike King just got back from a trip to Europe. He had a great time, met some wonderful people, really broadened his horizons. He never knew they made museums so big, or put so many paintings in them. That was a big surprise for him.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ground Spike Kings pop multiple tires and hurt any zombies that step on them.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>450</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Can only be placed on existing Ground Spikes. Can puncture tires, but deducts 50 Toughness. Loses 50 Toughness when slammed on by Gargantuars and loses 150 when stomped on by Mecha Gargs.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>125</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Fire Torch Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm Fire Torch Ground Spike, the zombies' passionate barbecue chef! Ignite that little pea, and I'll throw them an unforgettable barbecue party. Rest assured, I'm a professional—I guarantee it will be crispy on the outside and tender on the inside!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fire Torch Ground Spike can ignite small peas and puncture vehicles.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Ignite small peas for increased, and splashed, damage.
<color=black>•</color> For every 100 small peas lit, a Flame Light Ground Spike is spawned in front.
<color=black>•</color> Can also pop the balloons of regular Air Ball Rigid Corpses.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Ground Spike + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Studies reveal that spiciness is actually a type of pain," Fire Flame Ground Spike announced, rattling the red thorns on his head. "I intend to let the unbelieving zombies experience this reality for themselves."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fire Flame Ground Spike pops tires and enflames zombies that step on them.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Enflamed Debuff. Fire Flame Ground Spikes can be upgraded to Fire Flame Ground Spike Kings using a Fertilizer.</color>
<color=#720026>Enflamed Debuff: </color><color=#8B0000> Damage taken increases by 50%; zombies with this debuff explode on death, spreading it further.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper + Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: Squash Melon Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Huh? Yeah." This catchphrase belongs to Squash Melon Ground Spike, who rarely speaks and often leaves others feeling uncertain. After dinner, the topic of thorns always becomes a favorite among the plants. It's said that on an ordinary afternoon, as Squash Melon prepared to crush a nearby zombie, he overlooked the thorns lurking beneath its feet.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rigid Corpses will be knocked back every time it attacks.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack will knock back zombies and fire 1 bouncing mini-squash.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Ground Spike Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Line Ground Spike Shooter rose to fame on Tumbler with his viral posts on weeding techniques, but when fans tried them near their lawnmowers, jammed engines and smoking hoods ensued. "Effective, not vehicle-safe," he shrugged.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires 3 weeds that deal enhanced damage to vehicles.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>5×3/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Weeds deal 30% maximum Toughness damage to vehicles at the cost of themselves.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter + Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We're off to join the army!" the three little mushrooms shouted with joy. Although their heights didn't meet the requirements and locating small helmets was a struggle, these challenges couldn't hold back the Machine Gun Little Spray Mushrooms. United as one, they set their sights on becoming the top trio in the army.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can be stacked three times to shoot 12 small peas at once!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Machine Gun Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Water Grass possesses a contemplative heart. If you hand him a glass of root beer, be prepared for a discourse on Nietzsche's or Kant's works.Although he has profound musings, sometimes he longs for lighthearted conversations.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires kelps that bounce upon contact and slow down water zombies, can also drag 3 zombies under the water.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×3/3s + Insta-kill (Drown) ×3</color>
<color=#006400>Tangled Debuff: </color><color=#8B0000>Kelps bounce upon contact, dealing 40 damage to nearby zombies when they land. Each kelp 1 Tangle Value upon contact.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Can drag 3 zombies under the water.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter + Squash Melon > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Cat Tail Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Woof!" says Cat Tail Grass. "Woof woof woof! Does this confuse you? Do you expect me to say 'Meow' like a cat because the word 'cat' is in my name and I also look like a cat? That's not how things work around here. I refuse to be pigeonholed."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cat Tail Grasss can attack any lane and shoot down balloon zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Can only be placed on existing Sleep Lilys.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>125</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Cold Ice Cat Tail Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm not just a cat... I'm... I'm a super blue cat!" declared Cold Ice Cat Tail Grass. "Do you have some cold catnip...?" His love for catnip shines through, and he has an undeniable fascination with all things cool.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Cat Tail Grass can attack any zombie in the lane and deal extra damage to chilled targets.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×2 damage to chilled zombies. Deals ×4 damage to frozen zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Cat Tail Grass</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Cat Tail Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"When I was young, I thought I'd be a regular Cat Tail Grass," Fire Flame Cat Tail Grass said, warming her tail with pride. "Turns out, I'm a blazing inferno of awesomeness!" Cold Ice Cat Tail Grass sighed from the corner, muttering, "Showoff."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fire Flame Cat Tail Grass can attack zombies in any lane and deal high damage.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×3 damage to Enflamed zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Cat Tail Grass</color>

plants.name: Worry Gloom Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've always enjoyed releasing heavy fumes," says Worry Gloom Mushroom. "I know a lot of people aren't cool with that. They say it's rude or that it smells bad. All I can say is, would you rather have your brain eaten by zombies?"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Worry Gloom Mushrooms fire heavy fumes in an area around them.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4/1.9s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Can only be placed on existing Big Spray Mushrooms.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>125</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color></size>

plants.name: Fire Flame Worry Gloom Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Fire Flame Worry Gloom Mushroom's ability to release hot steam has established him as a celebrated pastry baker. His signature spicy pastries are a favorite among many, cherished for their distinct flavors.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Releases high-damaging fire fumes around it.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×4/1.9s (Piercing)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts the Enflamed debuff when attacking zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Worry Gloom Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Worry Gloom Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dreaming of a career as a physicist, the Cold Ice Worry Gloom Mushroom dedicates his days to unraveling the complexities of the world, avoiding contact with other plants. "Why do I have multiple strings of icicles sprouting from my head?" he muses, the latest question occupying his thoughts. He's oddly adamant about calling them "strings."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Releases cold fumes around that can freeze zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×4/1.9s (Piercing)</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack applies Chill and adds 5 Cryo points.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Worry Gloom Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruit is a huge fan of the Olympics and passionately insists that Fire Torch Tree Stump be chosen as the Olympic torch. Cautious warning to the uninformed though: do not try to eat him. You may find yourself burning up from the spicy heat.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rigid Corpses will get enflamed when it is bitten.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>When affected by the Fire Burst Spicy Pepper, heals 3000 Toughness. Inflicts Enflamed debuff and deals 20 damage to zombies that bite him.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Tall Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Ground Spike King
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After his return from Alaska, Cold Ice Ground Spike King couldn't contain his excitement. Eager to freeze the zombies solid, he relished the thought of "ice" bursting beneath their feet. He made it a point that everyone use the term "ice." His skin still carried the chill from his Arctic adventure, and his eyes shimmered with the brilliance of unmelting snow.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can puncture tires and freeze zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>450</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict Chill and add 5 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits traits from Ground Spike King.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Ground Spike King</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Ground Spike King
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Not long ago, Fire Flame Ground Spike King traveled to Mexico and was swept away by the vibrant enthusiasm of the locals, quickly falling in love with tacos. Now, he's pouring all his energy into a taco museum alongside Cold Ice Ground Spike King, though Cold Ice Ground Spike King doesn't seem to share his enthusiasm.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Enflame zombies that step on it and also puncture vehicles.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>450</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×2/1s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits traits from Ground Spike King. Applies the Enflamed Debuff when attacking zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Ground Spike King</color>

plants.name: Sage Person Palm Sea Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"People often ask about my appearance, so let me clarify: I'm from the Namib Desert," Sage Person Palm Sea Mushroom said to anyone who inquired. "If you're familiar with geography, you'll know that a desert can be found right next to the ocean!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks flying zombies and airships, growing in size after a while.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20 → 20×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Growth Time: </color><color=#8B0000>120s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Sea Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Sadly, I am a mushroom, not a flower, so I can't be called a sea flower or anything similar," Sun Light Sea Mushroom admitted. "At times, this brings me down, but don't let it bother you. I may not be a sunflower, yet I can still use different physical and chemical reactions in the water to bring you sunshine!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces increasing amounts of Sun as it grows.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>15 → 25 → 50/15s</color>
<color=black>Growth Time: </color><color=#8B0000>20 Seconds → 40s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sea Lantern Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've been a light system at a pirate pool party, worked for an Amazon deep-water salvage company for three months, and even served as night fishing bait while I was sleeping!" Sea Lantern Mushroom shared, a mix of anger and pride evident in his voice. "Now, I'm looking for a stable job. Uncle Dave mentioned that the backyard pool needed lighting, but he forgot to mention it was infested with zombies!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Dispels fog and gives off light, growing in size after a while.

<color=black>Growth Time: </color><color=#8B0000>60s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Gives 1 Lumos Level to a 3×3 area, then 5×5 after growth.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). Inherits traits from Road Lantern Flower.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Flow Light Sage Person Palm
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"My adventures in the desert have made me remarkably brilliant," Flow Light Sage Person Palm boasted, but he never forgot to replenish his lamp oil each day to ensure he continued to shine.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing spikes and lasers, depending on the Lumos level.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Gets the following buffs depending on the Lumos Level:
<color=black>•</color> Level 1 = Pierce 2 Times
<color=black>•</color> Level 2 = Infinite Pierce Laser, Air Damage ×3
<color=black>•</color> Level 3 = Base Laser Damage → 40</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Shoots 2 times at once when attacking flying zombies.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + Sage Person Palm</color>

plants.name: Flow Light 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The silver candle illuminates the cold autumn canvas, while the light silk fan dances gracefully with the fireflies." This is Flow Light 3 Leaf Grass's beloved poem. His fascination with fireflies began in childhood, and he often enjoys the cool breeze by the water at night, admiring how their fluorescence rises gently from the wind, twinkling before softly falling back into the dark grass. Only zombies would overlook such exquisite beauty.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Dispels fog and increases the Lumos level of Lumos plants present.

<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Gives 1 Lumos Level for Lumos plants in the entire field for 30 seconds.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Flow Light Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Stars dance on the water as fishing lights prepare to rise into the sky. The waves carry away the moon while the tide brings forth the stars. As a child, Flow Light Foreign Peach dreamed of picking the stars, often gazing at their shimmer on the water. Meeting Road Lantern Flower taught her that one need not envy the brilliant stars above; even the faintest light, like fireflies, has its own warmth and beauty.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots stars that can track zombies if there's light.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60×5/3s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Gets the following buffs: 
<color=black>•</color> Level 1 = Stars can now track zombies in the same row.
<color=black>•</color> Level 2 = Stars are fired continuously regardless of zombies.
<color=black>•</color> Level 3 = Stars track zombies everywhere.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Float Sky Sage Person Ball
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Float Sky Sage Person Balls always move in groups, chirping arrogantly and looking down on others. The other plants are curious what such tiny creatures could possibly do, but the Float Sky Sage Person Balls remain unfazed: "If butterflies can stir up a storm, then of course we're far more powerful."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spits out thorns to attack zombies in the sky. Does not occupy any tile.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Hovering plant. Can be planted on top of another plant.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach Sea Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Though my name resembles that of an animal, it's just a stage name," Foreign Peach Sea Mushroom explained. "I'm a magician who can expel spores of various shapes." He harbors a deep dislike for diving zombies, worried they'll uncover the truth: he's simply a sea-shroom with a star-shaped water gun perched on his head.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks twice when fully grown.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×5 → 20×5×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>Growth Time: </color><color=#8B0000>60s</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Gather the stars around me and give them to those wishing upon a shooting star," Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass proudly declares, believing it to be a noble mission. However, not everyone appreciates it—especially when the star shower comes flying directly at them.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attracts stars to rotate around itself and launch them out.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attracts nearby star projectiles. After 1.5 seconds, shoots them out as tracking projectiles with twice the speed. If the projectiles already have tracking abilities before the acceleration, their damage is increased by 50% instead. Attracts up to 20 stars maximum.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Sage Person Palm Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sage Person Palm Foreign Peach has always been a bit of an oddity. The plants joke, "He's always on the ground but only fights the flying zombies. Why doesn't he go after the ground ones?" Sage Person Palm Foreign Peach, ever patient, says nothing, quietly protecting his secret: his poor vision only allows him to see the sky when he lies down.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can only attack zombies in the sky.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Thorny stars track flying zombies across the board.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: 3 Leaf Sea Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Leaf Sea Mushroom has aspirations as grand as a dragon's. Mastering the ancient art of "Feng Shui" from the East, he is well aware of both lucky and unlucky positions. Understanding that wind and water complement each other, he hopes to keep misfortune at bay, whether soaring in the sky or gliding through the water.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Dispels fog and blows back zombies in the water.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Dispels fog and pushes the zombies in his lane to the rightmost column.
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Flow Clear South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Flow Clear South Melon insists that he frequently encounters ghosts, but do they truly exist? Who can say for certain? Perhaps he was simply dragged into another round of Halloween festivities by someone eager for a good scare.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>In a small area, dispels fog like a Road Lantern Flower and increase the Lumos Level for the Lumos plants inside.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Provides 1 Lumos Level in a 3×3 area. Restores 150 Toughness per Lumos Level every 15s.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Sage Person Palm South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sage Person Palm South Melon might look like a distant relative of South Melon, but its current form comes from a desert adventure with 3 Leaf Grass. Strangely enough, it doesn't seem to have visible thorns, yet plants that try to hop into it always get poked, leaving them questioning how it happens.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Counterattacks the zombies that bite it.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Reflects 50 damage back to zombies biting it.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>People often wonder how many languages Foreign Peach South Melon must know to communicate effortlessly with all the plants. Foreign Peach South Melon smiles and says, "Actually, I only speak Foreign Peach's language, since he's the only one I work closely with."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Helps Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass retain more stars.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Increases the storage limit of Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass to 80, and Ultra Extreme 5 Leaf Grass to 240.
<color=black>•</color> Allows Sun Light Foreign Peach to use Sun to shoot automatically.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Crack Pod Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Crack Pod Shooter brothers always argued over the best direction to fire—forward or backward. But now they've found a clever solution: just let the peas rebound. Problem solved!</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Crack Pod Shooters shoot peas forward and backwards.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000> Peas shot backwards will rebound upon reaching the edge of the screen.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter + Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: 3 Leaf South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>For 3 Leaf South Melon, looking good is a top priority. He never leaves home without first spending a solid half hour perfecting the leaves on his head, ensuring his style is flawless.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Every so often a 3 Leaf Grass will spawn to blow away the fog.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces a 3 Leaf Grass every 30 seconds.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dining out sends shivers down Magnet Force South Melon's spine. He's always fearful that the iron cutlery will magically stick to his face, turning an enjoyable meal into an awkward experience.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can fuse with iron materials from zombies to absorb their properties.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System: </color><color=#8B0000>This plant will deal:
(20 * Amount of Magnetic Plants in System * Rigid Corpse Speed) to specific zombies every 6s. Only Rigid Corpses with magnetable materials OR mechanical vehicles can be damaged this way. Also, they must not be on the sky or underground. This trait carries into further fusions.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can fuse with Iron Bucket, Pickaxe and Jack-in-the-Box.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Magnet Force Foreign Peach harbors a lifelong dream: to suck the stars from the sky. He spends every night staring at the starry heavens, imagining the day when his dream becomes reality.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can fuse with iron materials from zombies to absorb their properties.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Deals double damage to iron zombies. Can fuse with Iron Bucket, Pickaxe and Jack-in-the-Box.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Play Doll Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Play Doll Foreign Peach often bore the burden of being seen as a circus clown, which left him feeling discontented. "I may appear comical, but I am, in fact, a superhero," he declared. "I commandeered the zombie's Jack-in-the-Box and put on the hero suit inside!" Perhaps the Magnet Force Mushroom who aided him in the heist never mentioned where the box came from.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots out stars that explode on contact.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Stars explode on contact, dealing splash damage in 1 tile with no falloff. You can use metal objects on it to heal it by 500.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jack-in-the-Box > Magnet Force Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Mine Worker Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's remarkably pickaxe-like," Mine Worker Foreign Peach commented, a hint of amusement in his tone. "I can feel part of myself nestled in the ground, and it's quite pleasant—unless you're bothered by insects like centipedes." With a cheeky smile, he challenged, "Why not take off my hat? You'll find I'm even more pickaxe-like than you!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Mine Worker Foreign Peach hides underground: zombies will not attack it.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Cannot be attacked and does not block zombies. You can use metal objects on it to heal it by 500.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pickaxe > Magnet Force Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>People often use the headshots of Iron Bucket Foreign Peach and Magnet Force Foreign Peach to hype up their relationship, which greatly troubles both of them. In fact, Iron Bucket Foreign Peach just wants to be himself - a star with a heart of stone that is hard to rust.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires stars lined with a metallic coating.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80×5/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Breaks Type 2 armor instantly (before damage reduction). You can use metal objects on it to heal it by 500.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Magnet Force Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I wish I were stronger," Iron Bucket South Melon muses. "Maybe if I were made of diamond..." Iron Bucket Foreign Peach smirks and replies, "Even that wouldn't be enough! You'd need to be netherite!" In their spirited banter, they forget a vital truth: they can enchant their own strengths.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Protects your plants with sturdy iron.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can be fed metal objects to restore 500 HP. Receives half the damage from explosive cherries.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Magnet Force South Melon</color>

plants.name: Play Doll South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Whenever I emerge, it signals the arrival of the clown. Everyone wonders what lies within his box, but the outcome remains a mystery. I caught a glimpse once, and that moment changed everything for me."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can block explosions caused by Jack-in-the-Box zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Nullifies Jack-in-the-Box explosion damage, protecting the plant inside. Can be fed metal objects to restore 500 HP.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jack-in-the-Box > Magnet Force South Melon</color>

plants.name: Mine Worker South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>South Melon is frequently used to protect the plants in the back from being attacked by miners. Curious about stopping the miners from drilling into the ground, he picked up their pickaxes and studied them. Ultimately, he developed new technology that forces miners to dig their way out of the ground in advance.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can block mining attempts by Mine Worker Rigid Corpses.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Forces Mine Worker Rigid Corpses to unearth prematurely. Can be fed metal objects to restore 500 HP.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pickaxe > Magnet Force South Melon</color>

plants.name: Flow Light Magnet Force Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Honestly, I wish I could be a simple Magnet Force Mushroom," Flow Light Magnet Force Mushroom confessed. "That way, I wouldn't have to be in the spotlight constantly or feel the pressure of using one magnet to do the work of two."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attraction range and cooldown time improves depending on the Lumos Level.

<color=black>Magnet Interval: </color><color=#8B0000>15 Seconds (LL0) → 11 Seconds → 7.5 Seconds → 5 Seconds (LL3)</color>
<color=black>Magnet Range: </color><color=#8B0000>+1 (LL1) → +2 → +3</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Higher Lumos Levels will significantly shorten the attraction interval and increase the attraction range. When it's Lumos Level 2, the attraction will cause 200 damage to zombies near the attraction target.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sea Magnet Force Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The other sea-shrooms couldn't comprehend why Sea Magnet Force Mushroom could absorb iron to become bigger and taller. "It's simple: E=mc²," he explained, even if most of the energy was lost in the air and went completely unused.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>That's weird... Why does the magnet get bigger as well when he grows?

<color=black>Magnet Interval: </color><color=#8B0000>15 Seconds → 10s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Grows after attracting 3 times.
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The plants often call Magnet Force 3 Leaf Grass "Magneto." He confidently casts his favorite spell, "Disarmament!" at the zombies, even though he has no idea how the conversion of wind energy to magnetic energy works behind the scenes.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sucks away all the iron objects present.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attracts up to 10 metal objects across the whole field. Takes 1 second to process each. Lasts for 10s before disappearing.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Sage Person Palm
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Magnet Force Sage Person Palm spent some time studying communications jamming at the Air Force Academy, often bragging to his friends about his stellar grades. What he doesn't realize is that his success was mostly thanks to his father, a high-ranking Air Force commander pulling strings behind the scenes.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can cause high damage to flying objects.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Deals double the damage to metallic armor.
<color=black>•</color> Deals 500 damage to Iron Bucket Air Ball Rigid Corpses.
<color=black>•</color> Dealing a certain amount of damage to Airships can cause it to crash, dealing 1000 damage to zombies near the crash site. Fly Ship Rigid Corpse = 10 Hits | Mini Kirov = 3 Hits | Kirov Fly Ship Rigid Corpse = 20 Hits</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Foreign Peach's favorite nights? The ones where fog takes a break and lets him chat with the stars. "They totally get me," he says, convinced they're just as drawn to him as he is to them. One day, he's sure, one will drop down and say hello. Until then? He'll keep talking.
plants.info:
<size=36>Summons a meteor that deal devastating damage.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60×5/3s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000>Lumos levels 1 to 3 has the same effect as Flow Light Foreign Peach. Upon reaching Lumos Level 4, summons a Lumos meteor that has a separate 50s cooldown from the original meteor. Lumos meteor does 1800 damage upon impact and splits into 180 homing lumos stars that each do 40 damage.</color>
<color=#666699>Magnetic System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each plant connected to the Magnetic System will increase the damage of the stars by 5%, up to a maximum of 120.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>For 1/4/7/10/13 Super Tier Foreign Peachs on the lawn, a meteor spawns every 50/40/35/30/25 seconds, dealing 1800 damage and breaking into 180 stars that each deal 20 damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + Magnet Force Mushroom + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Double Shot Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Whatever happened to you?" a curious plant asked Cold Ice Double Shot Shooter. He chuckled softly and said, "I'm still a Double Shot Shooter at heart. I just forgot to snuggle under a blanket during winter nights."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots two snow peas in succession.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 5 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"His hands are cold, his face is cold, his heart is cold, and even his blood is cold… Is he frozen?" someone wondered aloud. Cold Ice Machine Gun Shooter shivered, reassuring the concerned plants, "I'm not frozen! The barrel of my machine gun is still burning hot!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Machine Gun Shooter shoots four snow peas at a time.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×4/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 5 Cryo points.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Machine Gun Shooter + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Crack Pod Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Don't let his icy facade mislead you; there could be a hidden warmth," someone suggested. But Mine Worker Rigid Corpse sneered, "Don't make foolish assumptions. This guy has nothing but cold sides!"</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots snow peas forwards and backwards.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×3/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack adds 5 Cryo points.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Crack Pod Shooter + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Crack Pod Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Shooter crawled out of the trench, bewildered. "Who threw that bomb?" he demanded. "Sorry, brother," Cherry Peach Crack Pod Shooter replied sheepishly, "I saw you pointing your gun at us and thought you were a zombie."</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry Peach Crack Pod Shooter shoots cherries forward and backwards.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Crack Pod Shooter + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Snipe Strike Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Admired for her sharp vision and robust strength, Snipe Strike Shooter is cherished by her Pea comrades. However, during their formation marches, her gun barrel often finds its way into the backs of their heads, making for some tense moments along the way.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Snipes zombies all over the map to deal massive damage.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>500/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Headshot once every 6 attacks, insta-killing zombies. You can glove a Machine Gun Shooter onto a Snipe Strike Shooter to create another Snipe Strike Shooter seed packet.</color></size>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>600</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>7.5s</color>

plants.name: Super Tier South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier South Melon always kept three books on its shelf, their titles concealed from the curious eyes of the other plants. One day, a Float Sky Sage Person Ball's curiosity led it into the study, where it uncovered the titles: "Guide to Succulent Plant Cultivation," "Postpartum Care for South Melons," and "30-Second Sage Person Palm Quick Flight Tutorial." The Float Sky Sage Person Ball chuckled at the unexpected collection.</color></size>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns a Float Sky Sage Person Ball that moves around the field to attack flying zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s (Drone), 30×2/1s (Wingman)
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits Sage Person Palm South Melon traits. Always has a Float Sky Sage Person Ball wingman with him when he appears. Generates a Float Sky Sage Person Ball on top of a 3×3 area every 30s (first time 10s).</color></size>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm > 3 Leaf Grass > South Melon OR 3 Leaf Grass > Sage Person Palm > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some people ask why Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower's little Suns disappear when thrown over the roof's right side. Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower just smiles: "Where do you think the front yard's Suns comes from?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches solar cabbages to attack zombies and can also generate Sun.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>50/5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Returns 100 Sun upon fusion. Each shot bounces once after hitting a zombie. For every 200 Sun, it can bounce one more time; each bounce drops 5 Sun.</color></color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Towards Sun Flower

plants.name: Roll Heart Vegetable Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm not just a pot to hold cabbages, and Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower is not the weakest plant! Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower and I are best buddies," Roll Heart Vegetable Flower Pot says confidently. Their friendship might have come to be because... one of them is balding, and the other is already bald.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Provides attack speed bonus to Cabbage-type plants above it.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Lowers the attack intervals of Ultra Extreme Thrower and Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable above it by 25%, other Cabbage plants by 33%.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Jade Rice Roll Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Jade Rice Roll Thrower always wonders why, despite learning skills from Jade Rice Thrower and performing well on the battlefield, Dave finds it hard to look at him and even avoids him. In truth, it's because Jade Rice Roll Thrower resembles a taco too much, and every time Dave sees him, he just wants to pick him up and eat him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches tacos that can bounce once, and can also throw butter.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
