<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles bounce once. Has a 1/4 chance to throw butter, dealing 60 damage and immobilizing zombies for 4s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Jade Rice Thrower</color>

plants.name: Jade Rice Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Jade Rice Flower Pot believes he's more than just delicious. In his view, buttered corn provides more nutrients than soil, especially for fungi. Jade Rice Flower Pot's favorite plant is the Jade Rice Thrower, his favorite food is butter, his favorite container is a cup, and his favorite song is "Buttercup."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Increases the butter chance of all Kernel-type plants above it from 25% to 50%.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Raises the butter chance from 1/4 to 1/2.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Protecting the plants around me is my duty." As a professional cosplayer, "Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella" is so skilled that no one realizes he's actually a corn cob with a butter wig, who loves to stand on his head.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Knocks back zombies that try to approach and immobilizes them with butter.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Knocks back nearby zombies, dealing 40 damage and immobilizes them with Butter for 2s at the cost of its Toughness. 
<color=black>•</color> 1 Rigid Corpse: -100 Toughness
<color=black>•</color> 2~4 Rigid Corpses: -150 Toughness
<color=black>•</color> 5 or more Rigid Corpses: -250 Toughness</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Ice Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Ice Melon once confessed to West Melon Thrower, "I wasn't always this frosty. I just went into the freezer for a popsicle one day, and… well, here we are." </color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches frosty melons that slow zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Applies 50 Cryo points to zombies hit. Rigid Corpses hit in the splash area gain 5 Cryo points. Deals 4x damage to Frozen zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Garlic Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"In the 90's, people widely believed that the best way to deal with zombies was with cornmeal and black dog blood. For us plants, garlic is a strategic resource," Garlic Jade Rice Thrower says with a wise demeanor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws small cloves at the zombies; sometimes they're buttered.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Each attack deals an additional 5×(target Poison value) damage and then accumulates 1 Poison point. 
<color=black>•</color> At 5 points, the Poisoned Debuff is applied.
<color=black>•</color> Has a 1/4 chance to throw garlic butter with 60 damage, immobilizing zombies for 4s, immediately poisoning the zombie for 9s and raising the Poison value cap to 30 points.
<color=#5E1675>Poisoned Debuff: </color>Rigid Corpses lose (20×Poison point) Toughness per second while poisoned.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Garlic Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The combination of cabbage and garlic is fresh, delicious, and healthy, and it's simple to make. Adding a few cloves of garlic before serving enhances the flavor," explains Chef Big Garlic. Eating garlic is also said to have some effect on preventing hair loss.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches stinky, garbage cabbages at the zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> See Garlic Jade Rice Thrower for details on the Poison System.
<color=black>•</color> Each time it hits a zombie with Poison Points greater than 0, it can bounce again. There is no limit to the amount of times it can bounce.
<color=black>•</color> Each hit deals an additional 5×(target Poison value) damage and then adds 1 Poison point.
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Launches a projectile that bounces once.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Garlic West Melon Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Few dare to put on airs in front of Garlic West Melon Thrower. Most take a detour when they see him, though he doesn't intend to be intimidating. He no longer seeks the popularity he had as a chef, but he does hope to make friends who appreciate the benefits of allicin. Now, plants finally embrace his unique charm, garlic and all.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs large garlic melons that break on impact.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/3s</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> See Garlic Jade Rice Thrower for details on the Poison System.
<color=black>•</color> Direct hits deal an additional 20×(target Poison value) damage. Splashes deal an additional 5×(target Poison value) damage. Accumulates 1 Poison point for all zombies within the garlic melon's splash radius.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Garlic + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Jade Rice Cannon Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Jade Rice Cannon Artillery is quite the intellectual powerhouse—rumor has it that it studied at Harvard and once worked at a prestigious law firm in New York. Known for its immense power, a single shot from Jade Rice Cannon Artillery can decimate a large area of zombies. However, the true source of its formidable energy remains a mystery.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can be manually operated to launch deadly corn cobs that cause cremator damage.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time: </color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Must be planted on two side-by-side Jade Rice Throwers.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>300</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color>

plants.name: Jade Rice Melon Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Jade Rice Melon Thrower is often seen frowning. When asked why, he says nothing. "People keep asking me if Buttered Corn is sticky or sweet," Jade Rice Melon Thrower sighs. "Why ask me? I don't eat it. Only the zombies would know."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws large corns at the zombies; sometimes they're buttered.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Has a 1/4 chance to throw a Buttered Corn with 140 damage, immobilizing the main target for 4 seconds and zombies in the splash range for (4 / total splash spread) seconds (minimum of 0.5).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower + Jade Rice Thrower</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Cannon Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Fire Flame Cannon Artillery has a booming popcorn business. The fiery aroma sends zombies running, adding a sizzle to any event. It's even considering a hot pot session with Fire Burst Spicy Pepper soon.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Use manually to fire an explosive, high-damage flaming projectile that scorches zombies and infuses nearby plants with Fire Burst Spicy Pepper.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts Enflamed debuff and then does damage, and infuses plants in its blast radius with Fire Burst Spicy Pepper.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper > Jade Rice Cannon Artillery</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Cannon Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Despite his icy exterior, Cold Ice Cannon Artillery is warmhearted, especially to friends. In his free time, he enjoys skiing, drumming, and exploring caves. His best party trick? A cold joke to "chill" the crowd.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Use manually to fire a freezing projectile that damages zombies and infuses plants with Cold Ice Mushroom.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts Chill and infuses plants in its blast radius with Cold Ice Mushroom (except Flower Pots).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Jade Rice Cannon Artillery</color>

plants.name: Roll Heart Melon Thrower
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"Peel away the green exterior, and you'll find a heart of roses within." This phrase means don't randomly walk into an unfamiliar barber shop—it will be a mind-blowing decision.
West Melon Flower Pot: "After finishing a watermelon, wearing its rind on your head is something everyone did as a kid." Flower Pot remarks, "Honestly, it's kind of silly."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires melons that bounce once.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Projectiles bounce once.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: West Melon Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Frugal West Melon Flower Pot can't stand to see West Melon Thrower throw melons without a thought for cost, so after defeating the zombies, West Melon Flower Pot secretly collects the shattered melon fragments scattered on the ground. "This is called soilless cultivation," West Melon Flower Pot explained. "Not just any plant can be grown in the ground here; every inch of soil is precious."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Enhances melon-type plants.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Returns an extra 150 Sun on fusion.
<color=black>•</color> Doubles the splash damage of Melons above it, with no falloff; damage remains at 2/3 of base damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"When I was little, everyone asked what kind of Pult I wanted to be," says Super Tier Thrower. "They thought you couldn't have it all. But I decided I wanted everything—even back then."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can catapult mixed projectiles in rapid succession.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>140/5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>42% chance of rapid-firing. Projectiles split into a mix of corn on the cobs (1/4 chance for buttered corn) and Roll Heart Melon Throwers upon hitting zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Jade Rice Thrower + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Come, give Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella a hug. You focus on opening the door; let Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella handle the rest! The RV doesn't matter; it's the brains inside that count!" Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella says. "And one more thing—fight zombies with zombies! And pour some tea for Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella while you're at it! Rigid Corpses, zombies, go away!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Knocks back zombies and forces them to switch lanes.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Knocks back nearby zombies, dealing 40 damage, at the cost of Toughness, forcing them to change lanes. See Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Garlic + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>When asked about her secret to success, Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella replied, "Actually, I just really enjoy letting balls rest on my head." She paused, "But the other plants all praise me as a top-notch protector."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can bounce catapult-type projectiles to increase their damage. 

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Prioritized by catapults for targeting. Increases projectile damage by 75%.
<color=black>•</color> If there are no zombies, it can store projectiles for a while.
<color=black>•</color> Knocks back zombies at the cost of Toughness. See Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Machine Instrument Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some may not realize it, but Tough Fruits have inventors in their community. Inspired by zombie weaponry, they built their own war machines. "Rigid Corpse technology, ironically, only destroys itself," says Machine Instrument Tough Fruit.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can receive attributes from Fire Burst Spicy Pepper or Cold Ice Mushroom, with effects upon death.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Changes form when affected by Cold Ice Mushroom or Fire Burst Spicy Pepper, healing 3000 Toughness upon transformation.
<color=black>•</color> Releases the current form's effects upon death.
<color=black>•</color> Absorbs damage for other plants in a 3×3 radius but with the damage doubled.
<color=black>•</color> Healing can exceed maximum Toughness (up to 4×).
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 1k HP when fed metal objects. When metal objects on the lawn disappear and no Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruits are present, every Machine Instrument Tough Fruit restores (1k / total number of Machine Instrument Tough Fruits) HP. </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Mecha Fragments > Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Big Garlic Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Big Garlic Flower Pot has long wanted to help the plants in its pot get a thorough sterilization, especially those on the front lines in direct contact with zombies. However, it seems only garlic-type plants are willing to grow in its pot. "Some plants would rather face zombies than catch my garlic smell," Big Garlic Flower Pot sighed. "Now I can only use garlic to disinfect garlic, and they just say it's a perfect match."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Reduces the biting damage taken by garlic-type plants on top, and has a garlic effect itself.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Forces zombies to move towards the middle row.
<color=black>•</color> Reduces the biting damage taken by garlic-type plants on top  to 10.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Garlic > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: West Melon Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Give me a melon; I'll repay you with kindness." West Melon Protect Guard Umbrella has always admired this saying from ancient poetry. Plants don't need to bribe him for help—whatever they give, he returns. Well, except basketballs. He's a total basketball fan.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Deflects basketballs and returns a catapulted melon.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Can reflect zombie projectiles except tridents (return as melons if they are lobbed projectiles); loses 200 HP for reflecting projectiles that explode; loses 50 HP for reflecting Snow Balls.
<color=black>•</color> Each reflection of projectiles stores energy equal to the projectile's damage, releasing it all on zombies for extra damage when the next knockback occurs.
<color=black>•</color> Knocks back and deals 80 damage to zombies at the cost of Toughness. See Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella. </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: West Melon Grenade Bullet Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>West Melon Grenade Bullet Artillery is a fervent advocate of the "overwhelming firepower" doctrine: "If one shot doesn't do it, try two, three, or even four!" This approach has made it a powerhouse on the battlefield—and a hit at summer parties.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Use manually to launch a barrage of melons from above.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>200/Melon. Up to 40 melons in a 3×3 area without splash falloff. Randomly hits within a 5×3 area.</color>
<color=black>Reloading Time: </color><color=#8B0000>36s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe:  <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower ∞ [Jade Rice Thrower] ∞ West Melon Thrower < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place On Middle)</color>

plants.name: Protect Guard Umbrella Flower Pot
plants.introduce: Other flower pots are puzzled by the dense foliage of Protect Guard Umbrella Flower Pot, but Protect Guard Umbrella Flower Pot simply says, "I just read the book The Pot's Guide to Hair Care."
plants.info:
<size=36>Enhances umbrella-type plants.

<color=black>Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella:</color> <color=#8B0000>+2 Seconds immobilization, +50% knockback distance</color>
<color=black>Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella, Umbrella Ultimate moves:</color> <color=#8B0000>Knockback distance ×2</color>
<color=black>West Melon Protect Guard Umbrella, Aegis:</color> <color=#8B0000>Damage of reflected projectiles ×2</color>
<color=black>Roll Heart Vegetable Protect Guard Umbrella, Midas:</color> <color=#8B0000>Can attack zombies on adjacent lanes
<color=black>Other Umbrellas: </color><color=#8B0000>Knockback distance +50%</color></color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Silver Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Besides a shiny silver exterior, Silver Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower also has a heart of silver. Silver Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower dreams of becoming a teacher and already has a catchphrase in mind: "Silver Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower Instructor, at your service."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches silver cabbages to attack zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Goblet Flower + Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower</color>

plants.name: Gold Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gold Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower isn't just about its dazzling appearance—it has a heart of pure gold. It relishes fighting alongside plants against zombies and dreams of one day being honored as the "Heroic Cabbage of Gold."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks zombies by throwing golden cabbages. Its ultimate move unleashes cabbages on all zombies!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins, Cooldown: 2s; throws a Golden cabbage with 160 damage at every zombie, instantly killing those with Toughness below 300.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>1000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Silver Flower Pot
plants.introduce: "People are always saying 'gold this, silver that,' as if we have a hierarchy," Silver Flower Pot said. "Gold Goblet Flower is silver, yet it's still called a Marigold." His words might have been more convincing if his gaze weren't fixed on the coffee bean by the roof's edge.
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates extra Coins for you.

<color=black>Coin Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Goblet Flower > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Gold Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Many wealthy folks treat money like dirt, but I'm different," Gold Flower Pot explains. "That's how I became rich in the first place."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates extra Coins and amplifies the ultimate ability of any golden plant above it.

<color=black>Coin Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>When you trigger an ultimate of a Golden Plant above it, all Golden Plants on other Gold Flower Pots with an equal or less ultimate cost trigger their ultimates too. </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>2000 Coins; each existing Gold Flower Pot will double the cost</color>

plants.name: Silver Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Why throw silver coins at zombies? Why, why? Even if zombies are just game data, we still ought to show them some final respects." Silver Jade Rice Thrower was once an usher in a theater, but after discovering his knack for lecturing, he entered the world of public speaking, bringing along his butter and corn kernels.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires silver kernels and silver money bags to attack zombies, with a chance to earn Coins.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Has a 1/4 chance to throw a silver money bag, dealing 60 damage, immobilizing the zombie for 4 Seconds, and dropping 25 Coins.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Gold Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gold Jade Rice Thrower ponders words like "golden phrases" and "precious gems." But maybe true treasure lies in imported butter and gold missiles... or "Just Gold."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws golden kernels and butter at zombies, with a chance to generate Coins. Its ultimate fires golden poppin' popcorns at zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>25% chance to throw a money bag, dealing 80 damage, stunning zombies for 4 Seconds, and dropping 100 Coins.</color>
<color=black><color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 2s; launches four golden corn bombs, each dealing 450 damage in a 3×3 area without damage falloff.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>2000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Twin Gold Goblet Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"It's time to make gold coins!" one of the Twin Gold Goblet Flower sister declares. But the other sister insists, "Now's the perfect time for a silver coin!" Since they can never agree, they each produce their own share independently, which might actually be for the best. "Double opinions, double efficiency—isn't that right?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces double the amount of Coins!

<color=black>Coin Output: </color><color=#8B0000>Generates Coins twice every 20 seconds, otherwise identical to Gold Goblet Flower.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Goblet Flower + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Silver West Melon Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silver West Melon Thrower sometimes considers itself the most valuable melon—until it remembers the more prestigious Gold West Melon Thrower. "A melon is a melon, whether it's silver, gilded, or made with garlic or gold," Silver West Melon Thrower chuckles. "We all have our place in the soil."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Launches silver melons to attack zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/3s</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Goblet Flower + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Gold West Melon Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gold West Melon Thrower doesn't mind questions about its golden rind and seeds, but never ask if it's seedless—it has no patience for that question.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hurls golden melons at zombies; its ultimate rains golden melons across the screen.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 2s; launches 60 golden melons, each dealing 120 damage with no falloff, landing randomly across the screen.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>3000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Silver Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silver Protect Guard Umbrella is always anxious about someone stealing his money when he's away, so he carries his fortune with him everywhere—even into battle against zombies. He thinks this keeps his wealth safe, but it only adds new risks. "That's my money; you can't take it!" he complains, though no one ever listens.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates extra money for you when it deflects basketballs.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Drops 25 Coins each time it activates and knocks back approaching zombies, dealing 40 damage, at the cost of Toughness. See Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Gold Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Gold Protect Guard Umbrella doesn't like this place—after a mishap in the water, it was shipped here alongside Silver Protect Guard Umbrella. The memory still frustrates him. "It's unfair! Why am I the freebie here?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Deflects basketballs, generating extra Coins, and its ultimate move can knock airborne imps and repel all nearby zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Drops 50 Coins every time it deflects a basketball; knocks back approaching zombies, dealing 40 damage, at the cost of Toughness. See Yellow Oil Protect Guard Umbrella.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 2000 Coins, Cooldown: 7.5s; knocks back all nearby zombies, drops 25 Coins/zombie, restores 1000 Toughness, yeets airborne imps, and drops 3 diamonds.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>1000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Silver Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Does a garlic made of silver still smell like garlic? Probably not, but neither the plants nor the zombies were eager to test it. However, zombies soon regretted their curiosity after a taste!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Possibly an even more pungent garlic? Maybe.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>600</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Goblet Flower + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Gold Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Beneath its dazzling exterior lies an unbearable garlic scent. Gold Garlic muses, "True value is only in appearance, not in the details." But everyone knows this "golden" garlic is just a regular garlic with a shiny coat.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A stronger, gold-scented garlic that can force all zombies in front to switch lanes with its ultimate move.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>900</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins, Cooldown: 2s; forces all zombies in its lane to change lanes.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>1000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Tough Fruit has a soft spot for zombies: "There's something oddly pleasant about the way they nibble on me. It's not like scratching an itch… let's just call it affection from prolonged contact," it says, philosophically.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Hypnotizes zombies and summons a Hypnotized Blind Box Rigid Corpse every 30 Seconds!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Each time it's bitten, there's a 4% chance to hypnotize the zombie.
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 100 HP when hit by a Charm Confuse Little Courage Mushroom spore, and stores one spore of that color each time it's hit (up to 3).
<color=black>•</color> When it collects 7 different spore colors, it consumes one of each and summons a Hypnotized Yellow Gold Blind Box Rigid Corpse, then fully heals.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Protect Guard Umbrella is a tycoon among plants, providing jobs for zombies and plants alike. "I maximize their value," it declares with a gilded flourish to its spectacles.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>High-risk, high-reward!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Has the traits of both Big Garlic Protect Guard Umbrella and Gold Protect Guard Umbrella.
<color=black>•</color> Prioritized by 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpses.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 7.5s; inherits traits from Gold Protect Guard Umbrella; knocks back all nearby zombies, turning those with less than 25% Toughness into silver statues worth 1000 Coins, or gold statues worth 3000 Coins if below 10% Toughness. Rigid Corpses without statues drop Coins directly.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Gold Garlic + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella / Gold Protect Guard Umbrella + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Fire Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The plants always feel that red-rinded watermelons carry the festive vibe of New Year, crackling and popping with excitement. But Fire Melon explains, 'I didn't put firecrackers in the melon! It's just that sealed food explodes when heated—and you can't rush eating a hot watermelon!'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs blazingly hot melons!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts the Enflamed debuff.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Suck Gold Magnet
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After working countless hours at an accountant firm, the Suck Gold Magnet realized its terrifying attracting potential and switched careers to become a fighter. 'Honestly, this is way more fun than counting money,' it remarks. 'After all, money doesn't grow on trees, but they do somehow from crops.' That said, its plant companions often end up suffering from its antics.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attracts projectiles!

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attracts straight-shooting projectiles from adjacent lanes and produces a 25 Coin for every projectile attracted.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit has always been passionate about environmental protection. 'I have a love-hate relationship with zombies—they pollute the environment, but they also bring me wealth. Isn't owning property and a trailer the hallmark of success? The lawn is clean all thanks to me!'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can store up Toughness and protect your plants.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Metal plant. Anti-crush. Max damage received is capped at 8k.
<color=black>•</color> Healing can exceed maximum Toughness without any cap. Spawns with 80× Toughness as initial HP.
<color=black>•</color> Redirects damage to itself in a 3×3 area.
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 4.8k HP when fed metal objects. When metal objects on the lawn disappear, every Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit restores (4.8k / total number of Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruits) HP.
<color=black>•</color> Using a Tough Fruit on it restores 8k HP instantly and summons a Super Tier Machine Instrument Sea Pig Rigid Corpse (stationary if on land with 1/3 the HP of the Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit).
<color=black>•</color> At most 10M HP can be restored per round; this cap is affected by healing-reducing effects accordingly.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Giga Mecha Fragments > Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Iron Bean Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Iron Bean Little Spray Mushroom has a constant worry: he's terrified of Magnet Force Mushroom accidentally pulling him in. 'Where did my screws go?' As Crazy Dave walks up, it seems he is about to have a brand-new concern.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Iron Bean Little Spray Mushrooms can knockback zombies too.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Short plant. Projectiles knock back zombies and instantly destroy Type 2 Armor (before damage reduction).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Pea Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Crack Pod Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The front head declares, 'My turn to use the eyebrow!' The back head replies, 'Guess we'll have to split it.' Born just two minutes apart, their eternal battle over the eyebrow shows no signs of stopping.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots small peas both forward and backward.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×3/2.25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Backward peas rebound if no zombie is hit.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Crack Pod Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Magnet Force Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Have you heard? Sun Light Magnet Force Mushroom's been glowing with wealth lately! 'I don't produce iron; I just do the delivery,' she says proudly. 'This is all from years of hard work.' Word is, she's even opened business beyond the lawn! </color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Produces metal objects and turns metal objects to Sun.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Produces a random metal object every 30s (10s for initial production). Drag a metal object on it and it will produce 25 Sun. Produced metal object is automatically given to Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom, Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom or Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom directly in front.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Flame Light Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After the test of fire, he's still the same old Ground Spike, just wiser, shinier, and ready to give the zombies a warmer welcome!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A hot Ground Spike? What's the difference between him and the cooler Ground Spike?

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Cannot be used in fusions.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Flame Light Tangle Surround Water Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Managing a hot spring isn't easy, but Flame Light Tangle Surround Water Grass takes pride in having zero customer complaint. In fact they seem to enjoy their dip a little too much to the point of never returning.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rumor has it that this Kelp also thrives in lava.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Cannot be used in fusions.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After countless days and nights of research, Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom finally mastered the art of the magnetic charm field. 'Now I can better persuade zombie friends to fight alongside us,' he said. 'Some think I threaten them with metal tools, but one day, the truth will come to light.'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes metal objects and summons the corresponding zombies to fight for you.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Uses metal objects to spawn hypnotized zombies with 40% HP.
<color=black>•</color> Auto-uses metals generated from Sun Light Magnet Force Mushroom behind itself and those consumed by Magnet Force Mushrooms in the same Magnetic System.
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, then reverts to a Magnet Force Mushroom.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>'I used to ferment bread,' Magnet Force Big Spray Mushroom explained, 'but now I collect metal to build the bread ovens.'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Putting an Iron Iron Bucket on him might have interesting results.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×2 damage to Metal Rigid Corpses.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>'I got canned again!' cries Iron Bucket Big Spray Mushroom, who was Magnet Force Big Spray Mushroom just a moment ago. 'All I did was accidentally make a coffee maker instead of an oven!'</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>There could be another twist if you give him a Olive Hat?

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>50/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals ×3 damage to Type 1 armors.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Magnet Force Big Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Olive Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've always dreamed of being a Football player, and now I've finally got this hat of glory," said Olive Big Spray Mushroom proudly. "But today, I've decided to take a break on the sidelines." In reality, he's just a stadium security, keeping the overenthusiastic fans out with his spores.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays fumes that penetrate all kinds of armor!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>3000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Counts as an Advanced Fusion. Deals damage to armor and the zombie in the armor at the same time.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Olive Hat > Iron Bucket Big Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desk
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As one of the ultimate weapons of the Pea family, the Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desk is always taught not to lie down without reason. "But my head is really heavy!" Sometimes, when being scolded, he complains like this. Of course, he doesn't know that the Pea elders tell him not to lie down just because it's actually kind of cute when he does.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Unleashes pure pea hell onto zombies!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>(20×3×2.25)/0.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Fires 3 peas at once.
<color=black>•</color> Firing speed increases the longer the turret fires and has 3 stages. After shooting 100 rounds, attack speed is increased by 50% (to 150%). After shooting another 200 rounds, attack speed is increased by another 50% (to 225% the original).
<color=black>•</color> Firing speed returns to normal when its attack resets.
<color=black>•</color> Peas may miss Little Devil Rigid Corpses due to the turret's height.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter ∞ [3 Line Shooter] ∞ Double Shot Shooter < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place On Middle)</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Earth Bean Thunder is a top chef, and his "hash cherries" and "potato jam" are highly praised in the plant world. If he runs out of ingredients, he will cheerfully say: "I'll go buy some."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits into 8 Earth Bean Thunders in surrounding tiles.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Explodes like a Earth Bean Thunder and spawns Earth Bean Thunders that only need 5s to arm themselves in a 3×3 range upon defeat.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Spicy Pepper Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spicy Pepper Earth Bean Thunder is a capable assistant to Cherry Peach Earth Bean Thunder, but most of her dishes are given low ratings by customers. "What's going on—" Spicy Pepper Earth Bean Thunder feels really guilty but doesn't know why. The truth is, she is not sensitive to spicy flavors and always adds too much chili.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits into 7 Earth Bean Thunders in her lane. 

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Explodes like a Earth Bean Thunder and spawns up to 7 Earth Bean Thunders that only need 5s to arm themselves in her lane upon defeat.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach South Melon is a distant relative of Cherry Peach Tough Fruit, but every time Cherry Peach South Melon meets Cherry Peach Tough Fruit, he is always late. "I want to come early too," Cherry Peach South Melon says, "but I can't resist jumping to anything red."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin that cannot be exploded by cherries!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Absorbs explosive cherries and heals 200 Toughness instead.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As the general commander of the Pea family, Cold Ice Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter has an aura that makes plants and zombies shudder even from miles away. But regarding his proud freezing ability, Cold Ice Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter always keeps quiet about it, until one day a small pea accidentally opened his diary: "If I had known, I wouldn't have bet against the Fire Flame Snipe Strike Shooter. Not only did I almost freeze to death in the ice fields, but I also ended up like this. Tonight, I'll make that gal eat three big bowls of chili—"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots snow peas at zombies, with a small chance of shooting a massive barrage!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×6/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>20×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of snow peas each attack, lasting 5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Selling well is also a skill." said Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom. Only Magnet Force Mushrooms can turn hate into love. He once hated cherries the most. Actually, he still does, but perhaps he has discovered a business opportunity?</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Transmutes metal objects into explosives!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attracts metal objects and turns them into explosives. Each object can be turned 5 times before consumption. Metal objects can be actively given to the Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom for it to initiate an attack.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Magnet Force Mushroom + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Snipe Strike Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other snipers envy Fire Flame Snipe Strike Shooter for being a reliable assistant to the commander, even though she is still a little one. "Talent is one thing, but... I have to thank the commander for cultivating me!~"Fire Flame Snipe Strike Shooter says, but in reality, it's because Cold Ice Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter is naturally cold and always keeps Fire Flame Snipe Strike Shooter as a warm-up buddy.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Marks and blows up zombies anywhere on the map!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks inflict the Enflamed debuff and deal 100 damage to nearby zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Snipe Strike Shooter + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Faced with the crazy zombies and powerful teammates, Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter, who came to the yard for more challenges, feels immense pressure, and his temper is getting worse... However, the plants are always shocked by the extreme violent tendencies of the Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter, who fires peas madly from a distance. Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom has already decided to ask for his contact information.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots peas at zombies, with a small chance of shooting a massive barrage!

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×6/1.5 Seconds
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>?×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of random peas (regular peas, ignited peas, snow peas, hypno peas, but all flattened to 20 damage) each attack, lasting 5s. You can switch between Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter and Snipe Strike Shooter with Pea Shooter.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Snipe Strike Shooter + Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Armed Equipped South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once, a pair of pumpkins dreamed of joining a circus. But after a magnetic mishap left them stuck together, they discovered a better calling: standing their ground as an impenetrable shield. The circus can wait.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Protect two tiles at once!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>12000</color>
<color=#3D1400>Special: <color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Can only be planted on plants that occupy 2 tiles. When moving the plant inside Armed Equipped South Melon, the Armed Equipped South Melon moves with it.
<color=black>•</color> Plants within the Armed Equipped South Melon become immune to cherry and Jack-in-the-box explosions.
<color=black>•</color> Restores full HP when absorbing Jack-in-the-box explosions, restores 200 HP when absorbing cherry explosions, and can consume metal objects to restore 500 HP.</color>
plants.cost: <size=35>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Play Doll South Melon ∞ [Magnet Force Mushroom] ∞ Cherry Peach South Melon < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place On Middle)

plants.name: Earth Bean Little Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some plants asked: "Why is the top of Earth Bean Little Spray Mushroom red?", to which he replied, "Well, let me ask you first..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can reproduce itself!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Spawns a new Earth Bean Little Spray Mushroom in the same tile after 20 Seconds. Each Earth Bean Little Spray Mushroom can only reproduce once. Upon death, it deals 300 damage to nearby zombies</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Earth Bean Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Why does Earth Bean Little Courage Mushroom explode after a few attacks? His explanation is quite touching: "Every attack I make is burning my life!" But the truth is—he's just a magician who doesn't want to do much work. After a few attacks, he decides to use a potato firework to perform a grand "fungus" transformation.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Consumes Toughness to fire high-damage spores!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>600/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack costs 75 Toughness. If kept alive for 20 seconds after being planted, his red light will turn off with attack power reduced by 90%, but attacks will no longer cost Toughness. Upon death, it deals 600 damage to nearby zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom + Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Big Garlic Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>With a pale skin, a hairstyle that could rival a cathedral dome and a grin full of crooked teeth, Big Garlic Spray Mushroom looks like it's auditioning for the villain in a fairytale. Ironically, he usually gets the role of a vampire.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Sprays poison gas at zombies!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s (Piercing)</color>
<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>Attack adds 1 Poison point to zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Rigid Corpses that bite it are forced to switch lanes.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold on the outside, fiery on the inside. This is how other plants describe Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom. "Don't be fooled by my calm appearance, my explosive energy is beyond your imagination," murmurs Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom. Oh, by the way, he's also quite skilled at making ice-cream.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Has both the properties of Cold Ice Mushroom and Fire Burst Spicy Pepper!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Loses 20% Toughness every 3 seconds. While present, absorbs damage for all plants. Upon death, triggers Fire Burst Spicy Pepper in his row (ignores damage reduction) and fullscreen Cold Ice Mushroom.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Giant Size Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Giant Size Big Mouth Flower won the grand prix in an Gourmet king contest, finishing 10 giga garg cakes in 44 seconds — with 3 of those seconds wasted because he didn't hear the starting whistle. "If there's another event like this, please call me. The buffet near the garden won't let me in anymore," said the Giant Size Big Mouth Flower during the interview.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Swallows all zombies that get too close!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> [8 + 3 × ln(Sum Toughness of Rigid Corpses)]s</color>
<color=black>•</color><color=#8B0000> For reference: Rigid Corpse - 24.8 Seconds | Iron Buckethead - 29.9 Seconds | Red Eye Gargantuar - 34 Seconds | 10 Red Eye Gargantuars - 41s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Can swallow all zombies in a 1.5 tile range, including Gargantuars. Unable to swallow other zombies that have immunity to Big Mouth Flowers. </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Mouth Flower ∞ [Big Mouth Flower] ∞ Big Mouth Flower < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place on Middle)</color>

plants.name: Sea Demon Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sailors whisper of the Giant Kraken of the Northern Sea, its name alone enough to turn the bravest hearts cold. But Sea Demon Mushroom? He's got no time for legends. He didn't come to terrify—he came to play. And his favorite game? Pushing zombies around like driftwood.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can repel zombies in front.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=#006400>Tangled Debuff: </color><color=#8B0000> Adds 1 Tangle Value per hit, dealing additional damage based on the Tangle Value.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Repels approaching zombies (single target) and deals 100 damage.
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tangle Surround Water Grass ∞ [Sea Mushroom] ∞ Tangle Surround Water Grass < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place On Middle)</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Plants are always curious why Charm Confuse 3 Leaf Grass pulls the zombies back. Charm Confuse 3 Leaf Grass explains: "Since 3 Leaf Grass always pushes zombies to the opposite direction they face, I believe it's only natural for me to do the same to hypnotized zombies."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can pull back hypnotized zombies!

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Pulls all hypnotized zombies back, lasting for 5s, but reduces their HP by 10% max Toughness (except for zombies in the leftmost column).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Twin Steel Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Twin Steel Leaf Grass's two heads are constantly arguing — one swears spinning is the best approach, while the other insists launching saw blades is superior. Somehow, their teamwork still cuts through the competition.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Attacks nearby zombies with its blades and can also strike at a distance!

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>8/0.02 Seconds (Melee); 16/1.5 Seconds (Ranged)</color>
<color=black>Special:</color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> The front head attacks like a regular Steel Leaf Grass, while the back head targets all zombies on the screen (prioritizing flying zombies).
<color=black>•</color> Gains 5 points of Shield every 0.5s, up to 300 max.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Steel Leaf Grass + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Tree Stump's Afro bounces rhythmically, as if dancing to a beat only it can hear. Some say his groove inspires his fiery creations, while others just appreciate the spectacle — both the style and the explosions leave a lasting impact.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spawns explosive cherry drones that seek out zombies.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Generates a homing cherry drone for every 30 peas that pass through.
<color=black>•</color> Converts any explosive cherry that passes through into a cherry drone.
<color=black>•</color> There can be up to 3 cherry drones at once.
<color=black>•</color> Upon death, it triggers a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet explosion.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Business is booming for Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper, but the zombies aren't celebrating. Every time a firecracker goes off, they end up singed, dazed, and fuming—literally. "Oh, lighten up," Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper teases. "You look great in charcoal black.
plants.info:
<size=36>Propels himself towards the zombies, causing damage and knocking them back.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> After being planted, waits for 1s before flying forward in his lane, knocking back zombies it encounters and causing 300 area damage each impact.
<color=black>•</color> Deals ×15 damage to Nian zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Breaking news from the first Plants vs. Rigid Corpses Hockey Tournament! Cold Ice Ground Spike skated to victory, leaving the Bobsled Rigid Corpses scrambling. But now, they're calling foul! "I did nothing wrong," Cold Ice Ground Spike insists, adjusting their icy spikes. "And these springs? Just a little pre-game safety gear."
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold Ice Ground Spike can slow down zombies that walk on it.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1 Second</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Ground Spikes can be upgraded to Cold Ice Ground Spike Kings using a Fertilizer.</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>Each hit inflicts Chill and adds 10 Cryo points.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Ground Spike + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Garlic 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Garlic 3 Leaf Grass used to have a simple life, working at a bustling barbecue joint where business was booming. "Ah, those were the days," it sighs. "Customers used to leave with a green glow of happiness after I blew away the overwhelming garlic. Now? Things just aren't the same."
plants.info:
<size=36>Garlic 3 Leaf Grass can poison zombies.

<color=#5E1675>Poison System: </color><color=#8B0000>Inflicts 5 Poison Points to every non-poisoned zombie in the screen and applies the Poisoned debuff. Inflicts an additional 1 Poison Point and increases the time the debuff stays by 5 more seconds.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Forces Rigid Corpses to change lanes. </color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Garlic + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Extreme Cold Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"One input, one output. That's the rule." Extreme Cold Tree Stump prided himself on his structured logic. "That's why I counteract Fire Torch Tree Stump's flames with pure, unyielding frost." But put them together? Things got... messy. Fire and ice, heat and cold—sometimes they balanced, sometimes they clashed, and sometimes, well... physics just gave up.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can turn normal peas into snow peas or polar ice peas, and water orbs into ice blocks.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Turns the normal peas that pass through into snow peas, and the snow peas that pass through into polar ice peas for ×2 damage and ×2 Cryo points.
<color=black>•</color> Turns the water orbs from Water Drop Shooters into ice blocks.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach Little Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Foreign Peach Little Mushroom would be all over Dave's house, on the floor, on the table, on the dinner plate - Dave always forgot about the Doc's reminder - who cares, Daisy loved the gummy vitamins anyway!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A small mushroom that shoots mini-stars.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×5/2.25 Seconds (Equivalent to the DPS of 10 Pea Shooters) </color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"What do you guys think 'flower pot' means, huh?" Sun Light Flower Pot snapped. "Is it a pot for growing flowers? Or is it a pot that is a flower? Either way, let's get one thing straight—I am a flowerpot. End of discussion."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates extra Sun for you.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>15/25s</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Beyond the fog, she watches, a prophet untouched by mortal blindness. When God willed light into existence, she stepped forth. "By decree of the Almighty, I have come to the land of Seth. The fire looms, but with this sacred light, I shall protect the lost from its grasp."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>It can dispel fog and block bullets.

<color=black>Energy Limit: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Shield & Light Range: </color><color=#8B0000>3×3</color>
<color=black>Special: <color=#99582a>Lumos System</color></color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Provides 1 Lumos Level and dispels fog like a Road Lantern Flower.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes Energy to block projectiles. Each block consumes Energy based on the damage of the projectile (excluding basketballs). Tridents cannot be blocked.
<color=black>•</color> Restores (25 x Lumos Level) Energy every second, pausing to rest for 5 seconds when it is completely exhausted.
<color=black>•</color> Reduces Energy first to absorb damage, where 5 Energy = 1 Toughness.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Road Lantern Flower + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Sage Person Palm Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sage Person Palm Protect Guard Umbrella just dropped his latest song, "Prickly Sage Person Palm." With a hopeful glint in his eyes, he mused, "Maybe one day, people will like me as much as they love roses. I know it won't happen overnight, but I'll keep trying my best."</color>
plants.info: <size=36>Can shoot down flying zombies and repel airships.
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Silver Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Who says sunflowers only bask in the sun? Silver Towards Sun Flower has a knack for more than just growing—she's a master silversmith! With techniques passed down from her brewer, she forges dazzling silverware and jewelry, each piece shimmering with history. As they say, "A brewer's legacy lives on, and elegance never goes unnoticed."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates Sun faster.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/15s</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Gold Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: Standing guard over a trophy had been so last season. Now? She was ready to shine—and not just under the sun. "Look, I love a good tan, but let's be real... I was made for the fight!"
plants.info:
<size=36>Generates Sun faster... faster!

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Every 10 seconds, 50 Sun is accumulated, up to 10,000.
<color=black>•</color> The Sun limit in the level is adjusted to 50,000.
<color=black>•</color> The excess will be stored in the available Gold Towards Sun Flowers.
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins; makes all Gold Towards Sun Flowers release their stored Sun.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>3000 Coins; each existing Gold Towards Sun Flower will double the cost</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold Ice Tough Fruit huffed as he hit the ground again. "Do the janitors ever remember to put up 'Caution: Slippery Floor' signs!?" he grumbled. But in his frustration, he failed to realize something very concerning—he was shrinking.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rigid Corpses that bite him are slowed down.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Rigid Corpses that chew it will be slowed down and will accrue Cryo points. Cold Ice Tough Fruits can be upgraded to Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruits using a Fertilizer.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Earth Bean South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Once a chip shop owner, Earth Bean South Melon had a simple business model: cut the fries in half but keep the price the same. The customers disagreed. Now in the Garden, he's offering a different kind of deal—one that ends with a bang. Yet, for some reason, people still bring up his old menu.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A shorter South Melon.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles). However, non-"short" plants inside it will be hit. Each time it is damaged, a small explosion will occur, causing 500 points of damage to zombies.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Sage Person Palm
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Destroy Eradicate Sage Person Palm is a firm believer in the Art of War of Plants: bide your time, strike hard, and leave nothing standing. Whether it's zombies shambling through the battlefield or armored rats scurrying for cover, one well-placed explosion is all it takes to turn the tide.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires destructive thorns.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each attack has a 0% starting chance of unleashing an Ultimate attack. If it fails, the chance is increased by 5% for the next attack.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Shoots a large number of thorns forward, which can hit airborne units.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Sage Person Palm + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>In the Big Mouth Flower's Big Eater Championship, Destroy Eradicate Big Mouth Flower was a force to be reckoned with—until he took things a little too far. "He didn't just eat his cake—he incinerated mine!" a fellow contestant recalled. Unsurprisingly, he was disqualified for excessive destruction.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Devours a zombie to produce a Doom explosion.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>60s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Each time it successfully bites a zombie, a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion is released, causing a crater to appear in front of it (does not trigger explosion if in the rightmost column).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Mouth Flower + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As the head chef of the restaurant, performing a fiery dragon dance on the teppan is a must-have show for every dinner. But every time, at least one guest ends up getting burned. Word has it that to make up for it, the Fire Flame Big Spray Mushroom gave them an encore performance.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Flamethrower incarnated.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>33/1.5s (Piercing, deals frame damage of 1 33 times)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals fire damage and inflicts Enflamed debuff. Fire Flame Big Spray Mushrooms can be upgraded to Fire Flame Worry Gloom Mushrooms using a Fertilizer.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: Big Spray Mushroom + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper<color=#8B0000></color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooter and Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom are great friends—one's a hothead, the other’s laid-back. But together, they're the perfect pair. "We may be opposites, but we bring out the best in each other."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A damage-scaling Pea Shooter and the perfect partner for Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks penetrate Type 2 armor. Damage increases by 1 each attack, up to 60. If a Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom is planted 1 tile behind it, Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooter gains Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom's attack speed and Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom gains Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooter's attack damage.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Flow Light Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The Flow Light Flower Pot always emits a warm glow, so it is often used as a nightlight. If you look closely, you will also find a small inscription on the edge of the pot that says, "Firefly habitat, please do not disturb."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Flower Pot that can be used as a small Road Lantern Flower, providing 1 Lumos level for its tile.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Dispels a small patch of fog, providing 1 Lumos level for its tile.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Flower Pot > Road Lantern Flower</color>

plants.name: West Melon Bounce Bounce Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Holding your breath, focusing, and striking with precision!" West Melon Bounce Bounce Mushroom is very patient, always waiting for the perfect moment to make a move. If you ask him how he manages to stay calm, he will always mention his mentor, Model Imitater.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A big shroom with coiling vines that lob watermelons after charging.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/4s</color>
<color=black>Range:</color><color=#8B0000> 4 tiles ahead</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Charges when not attacking for at least 4.5s to increase damage to (1 + charge time × 0.5) times the base damage. Maximum charge time: 30s.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After graduating from university, Foreign Peach Tree Stump returned to the mountainous region to teach. "From the moment I received an education, I understood that knowledge is meant to be passed on like a 'spark'!" The flame of knowledge ignited the students' enthusiasm and also the zombies.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Fire Torch Tree Stump shaped like a Foreign Peach, ignites star projectiles.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Ignites passing star-shaped projectiles (except thorn stars and jack-in-the-box stars), adding 20 damage and removing their other traits. Ignited stars do splash damage in a similar way to ignited peas.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Fire Burst Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Fire Burst Foreign Peach silently glares, while the other starfruits keep their distance: "He looks too scary." But Fire Burst Foreign Peach doesn't care; he is focused on creating an ultimate piece of art. He firmly believes that when he finally blooms, everyone will take notice.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Explodes and releases high-damage spicy stars.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100 × 25</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Does not trigger the Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect Immediately when fused. Explodes instead 1 second after fusion, releasing Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect and exploding into 25 spicy stars.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Burst Spicy Pepper + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Remaining Ember Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Whenever someone asks Remaining Ember Tree Stump, "What's the secret to grilling?" he just silently collects and repurposes the embers. It's not that he's indifferent; if he spoke, you'd just end up with a face full of ash.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Remaining Ember Tree Stump keeps burning even after a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion and it takes burning to the next level.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> When its Irradiation value is 0, it behaves the same as Fire Torch Tree Stump.
<color=black>•</color> When the Irradiation value is not 0, turns peas and regular ignited peas into Irradiated peas, with +30 damage and a no falloff 1/3 splash damage. Irradiated peas inflict the Irradiated debuff.
<color=black>•</color> Can also use 10 Irradiation values to strengthen Doom peas or Mini Destroy Eradicate Mushroom projectiles, ×2 or ×6 their damage respectively, and to enhance their splash effect to be the same as an Ultimate Doom Shell.</color>
<color=#7303fc>Irradiation value: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Initial: 60, Maximum: 60, 1 point is lost per second.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 60 points when affected by Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosions, and 10 points when any zombie within a 5×5 area dies with the Irradiated debuff. After igniting 60 projectiles, instantly restores Irradiation points to 60 the next time it reaches 0.
<color=black>•</color> Irradiated can coexist with the Chilled, Enflamed and Poisoned debuff:
- Chilled: Irradiated adds another 10% to the slow factor.
- Enflamed: Irradiated adds another 10% to the extra damage.
 - Poisoned: Irradiated makes Poison lasts indefinitely.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Strengthen Courage South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Trust me, it's very safe inside." Strengthen Courage South Melon gently reassures Little Courage Mushroom, as the built-in phonograph and fairy tale books help them no longer worry about the zombie horde.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pumpkin with the color of the Little Courage Mushroom. Scaredy plants inside the pumpkin will not be afraid.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Scaredy plants inside the pumpkin will not be afraid (Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom and Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom will not self-destruct).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Guys in the distance, no matter who you are, except for the circus people, don't come over!" The Foreign Peach Little Courage Mushroom, trembled, "I, I am very powerful!" He kept attacking, thinking that this would scare off those with ill intentions, but he didn't notice that his bullets weren't even hitting straight ahead.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Foreign Peach Little Courage Mushroom shoots stars faster and in 5 directions, but also gets frightened more often.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20×5/0.75s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Keeps shooting stars in 5 directions like Foreign Peach, but becomes afraid and stops if there is a zombie in its range.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach + Little Courage Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Squash Melon South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Squash Melon South Melon has never met a match in arm wrestling, has diligently learned various techniques for skipping stones, and is very good at selecting stones—his only bane is that he is very afraid of water and can only watch others skip stones.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>The cozy nest of Squash Melones. When there are specific plants in the shell, it can spawn squashes.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>225</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Squash Melon plants in Squash Melon South Melons lose their ability to detect enemies.
<color=black>•</color> When there are Squash Melon or Squash Melon Fire Torch Tree Stump plants in Squash Melon South Melon, a baby squash with a maximum jump distance of 1.5 tiles is spawned and jumps forward, damaging zombies when it lands. It disappears after 6 jumps and regenerates 3s after the last baby squash disappears.
<color=black>•</color> Depending on the type of Squash Melon inside it, the baby squashes have different effects:
- Squash Melones and Squash Melon Tough Fruit: Baby squash does 1/8 the original damage.
- West Melon Squash Squash Thrower: Baby squash drops a melon on landing that does the same damage.
- Squash Melon Fire Torch Tree Stump: Baby squash does 225 damage.
- Jade Rice Squash Squash Thrower: Baby squash has a 25% chance to drop a butter on landing that does the same damage.
- Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch: Baby squash does 1800 damage and releases a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect each time it lands.
- Core Burst Squash Melon: Baby squash releases a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet effect each time it lands and also a ring of 12 pieces of Nuclear Debris the last time. Both do 1/8 the original damage.
<color=black>•</color> Abilities do not work in water lanes.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
