Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Jade Rice Little Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The results of this experiment: dense planting is not conducive to plant growth, and the corn ears have obviously shrunk." Dave bent down, took out a magnifying glass, and looked at the Jade Rice Little Thrower, "Not suitable for making corn rolls anymore." Jade Rice Little Thrower said angrily, "The results of this experiment show that the concentrated ones are all the essence!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A tiny Jade Rice Thrower, with a chance to throw a small butter that shrinks zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Short plant. Has a 25% chance to throw a small butter that deals 40 damage, which shrinks the size and health of non-shrunken zombies by a factor of 0.7, otherwise it will be stunned for 1.5s, while Little Devil Rigid Corpses are killed instantly. Prioritizes zombies that are not shrunken.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Float Sky Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After resigning, Float Sky Protect Guard Umbrella embarked on a journey around the world. "Sailing with the wind to the places your heart desires, isn't that very romantic?" He compiled his experiences into a book, which received praise from all walks of life.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A smaller floating Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella that can only protect the 1 tile below.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Hovering plant. He shares the same traits as Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella, but can only protect the plant right below it.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Many plants were curious about how Charm Confuse South Melon had only subdued one zombie. "I'm a dedicated person, so of course I need a dedicated zombie," Charm Confuse South Melon said, scratching his head.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Charm Confuse South Melon makes a hypnotized zombie stay by your side.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Has a 4% chance to hypnotize zombies eating him. Forces up to 1 hypnotized zombie to stay in his tile, and uses that zombie as a shield first when under attack.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Charm Confuse Mushroom > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Tough Fruit Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Tough Fruit Protect Guard Umbrella is the trendiest hairstylist in the garden, known for its ability to create cool hairstyles on hard nut shells. Although the lifespan of this hairstyle is short, it doesn't stop people from loving it—and the opening of the sixth nut hair salon chain.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit Protect Guard Umbrella has the traits of both his fusion ingredients.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Has the characteristics of Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella and Tough Fruit. Can repel approaching zombies, dealing 40 damage every time.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrella
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrella has changed to a new hairstyle, making it look even more rebellious and irritable, like a delinquent wandering the streets. But don't be fooled by its appearance; it actually has a soft heart and even helps the barber clean up the fallen leaves.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>When repelling, it causes small-scale cherry explosions, and harnesses the power of cherry explosions to protect surrounding plants.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>600</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Inherits the traits of Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella.
<color=black>•</color> Repel approaching zombies and release a small-range cherry explosion with a damage of 300. 
<color=black>•</color> Immune to explosive basketballs.
<color=black>•</color> For every instance of Cherry-fused defensive plants or Cherry Peach Flower Pot healing through cherry explosions in the surrounding 3×3 area, it gains 1 level of energy, up to 100 level. 
<color=black>•</color> Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrella uses 2 levels to absorb any damage in the surrounding 3×3 area.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella</color>

plants.name: Super Time Space Pea Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Nothing has been born earlier than the universe, and nothing will perish slower than the universe. But for life, his/her body is not as enduring as the death of a star; his/her spirit is even more eternal than the universe. Cherish the present, seize the future, even if it's just for a day or two, that is still a mayfly's life." — "Chronicles"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Pea Shooter with the power to warp space and time, firing neutron peas that inflict the Chronoshift effect, erasing every trace of the target from the time continuum.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks deal no damage but apply Chronoshift for 1.5s, or extend the duration by 1 second if the target is already affected. Deals only 100 damage to Mini-bosses.</color>
<color=#00008B>Chronoshift: </color><color=#8B0000>Rigid Corpses under this effect receive a countdown of (HP / 30) seconds, after which they are instantly erased. If the effect ends early, they take 30 × (elapsed seconds) points worth of damage.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Pea Shooter</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"The elderly also need to learn to keep up with the times," the Magnet Force Jade Rice Thrower said, "This new force of magnetism has truly opened my eyes." Of course, there is a small problem; it always makes the neighbors think he's a scrap collector.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>The Magnet Force Jade Rice Thrower can fuse with metal objects and changes into the corresponding form based on the type.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Has a 25% chance to throw a magnetic butter with 80 damage, and stuns the target for 4s. Can fuse with Iron Bucket and Chrono Core.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jade Rice Thrower + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"You've seen Interstellar, right?" Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower often brings up his favorite sci-fi movie. "The male protagonist drives into a cornfield at the beginning and then pilots a spaceship into a black hole at the end. There must be some connection between the two!" Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower insists.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower has a chance to throw a neutron butter that generates a mini black hole.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Has a 25% chance to throw a neutron butter with 100 damage, which generates a mini black hole when it hits. The mini black hole massively slows zombies down and explodes after 2 seconds, causing 100 damage and reducing the countdown of zombies with the chronoshift effect by 30s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Magnet Force Jade Rice Thrower</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Jade Rice Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Iron Bucket Jade Rice Thrower has been considering buying some anti-rust paint lately, as his butter always ends up with a bit of a rusty taste, which seriously hinders his ability to make butter cakes for his brothers. "Butter with a rusty taste might only be good for fighting zombies."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Iron Bucket Jade Rice Thrower throws Iron kernels or Iron butter that is miraculously effective against Type 1 armor.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Has a 25% chance to throw an Iron butter with 100 damage, which stuns the target for 4 seconds and removes their Type 1 armor instantly.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Magnet Force Jade Rice Thrower</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Cherry Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The plants all say that Cold Ice Cherry Peach is calm, introverted, and taciturn. "I occasionally confide in the other cherries," Cold Ice Cherry Peach said, "they call it 'explosive news.'"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cherry mold made of ice, he absorbs cherry projectiles from plants to generate Cherry Peach Explode Bullet seed packets.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Absorbing cherries, ignited cherries, and explosive cherries grants 1, 2, and 10 energy points respectively. For every 100 energy points collected, a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet seed packet is generated. Upon death, unleashes a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet explosion and freezes all zombies in its range for 10 seconds.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Using magnetism to confine nuclear energy is a topic that Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom has been researching for a long time. This is a difficult task, and timing is crucial; numerous laboratories of his are now in ruins. However, it seems that the zombies are more eager for him to succeed than the plants.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom is stabilized by magnetic force and can be fused with metal to transform into a corresponding form.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Does not explode until further fusion.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Time Space Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Time travel personnel have passed through, complete. The time tunnel has exited the target world, complete. Observed impact is within the expected range, complete. Proceed to the next step, destroy the tunnel to prevent use by others or organizations." — "Time Planning Bureau"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Super Time Space Destroy Eradicate Mushroom possesses the power of hyperspace bending. Its explosion inflicts chronoshift to any foe unfortunate enough to be caught in its effects.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Cremator) </color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Destroy Eradicate Mushroom. Explosion applies the Chronoshift effect for 30s or resets the remaining duration to 30s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Super Time Space Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Other plants often hear Super Time Space Tough Fruit recount the mysteries on his adventures — like a Sphinx with a zombie’s head, a minivan that only beeps, and the 1001 kinds of machines developed by GFishtus Corps.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Tough Fruit with spacetime powers. He has a chance to teleport back attackers and can rewind health once when near death.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> 25% chance to teleport biters to the far right of the same row (10s cooldown).
<color=black>•</color> When taking lethal damage, rewinds HP to what it was 3s ago and becomes invulnerable for 3s (single use ability).</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Chrono Core > Tough Fruit</color>

plants.name: Float Sky Pea Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Float Sky Pea Shooter sees himself as the future of garden warfare. "Support-type aerial drones — a weapon of a new era." Unfortunately, he has little time to promote his ideas — he works three jobs to pay off his soilless cultivation loan.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A peashooter drone that enhances firepower when coordinating with straight-shooting plants below.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Hovering plant. If the shooter directly beneath it attacks faster than once every 1.5 seconds, Float Sky Pea Shooter syncs its attack rate to match.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Steel Wood Bower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>In the snowy plains, it’s said that the taller the Christmas tree, the happier the next year will be. So who can place the star on top? That's a job for the Steel Wood Bower and his unmatched aim.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing saws that leave spinning spruce needles on zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s; 1×75/1.5s (Spinning spruce needle)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Projectiles pierce once (including ice blocks) and leave spinning spruce needles on the first zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color> Spinning needles deal 1 damage every 0.02 seconds for 1.5 seconds.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Water Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>After equipping a high-pressure water jet, Water Leaf Grass greatly improved her cutting efficiency. But there's one downside — flowing water is hard to come by on the snowy plains.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Cold-resistant, deals more damage when it's sufficiently cold and applies chill when there are ice charges.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>8/0.02s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/15 ice charge when affected by snowball/snow trident/Cold Ice Mushroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color> With ice charges, attacks deal double damage, inflict Deep Chill and add 1 Cryo Point, but have an 1/9 chance to use up a charge. </color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Steel Leaf Grass + Water Drop Aloe</color>

plants.name: Water Drop Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Can an archer compete without a bow? Water Drop Shooter shrugs: "It's just waterbending."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Bends and shoots water orbs; consumes ice charges to launch ice blocks instead.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>50/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/15 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Cold Ice Mushroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color> Uses 1 ice charge to shoot an ice block with double the damage that inflicts Deep Chill and adds 40 Cryo points, dealing ×4 damage to Frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower + Water Drop Aloe</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Cloud Spruce
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Cloud Spruce is stern, cold, and strict—perfect traits for a top-tier coach.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots spinning hydro-needles that cling to zombies. Consumes ice charges to shoot spinning cryo-needles instead.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>5×75/1.5s</color>
<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/15 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Cold Ice Mushroom respectively.
<color=black>•</color> Spinning hydro-needles deal 5 damage per 0.02 seconds and last 1.5 seconds.
<color=black>•</color> Uses 1 ice charge to shoot spinning cryo-needles with double the damage that inflict Deep Chill and adds 1 Cryo points, dealing ×4 damage to Frozen zombies.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower + Water Drop Aloe + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Lily Flower Cloud Spruce
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"People talk about iron trees blooming or old trees flowering," Lily Flower Cloud Spruce murmurs. "But I’m neither iron nor old. I just... never mind." He stops talking to admire his blossoms.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spruce with snow lotus blooms and a reduced cost for healing nearby plants.

<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1 ice charge passively every 10 seconds.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/blizzard respectively.
<color=black>•</color> Awakens at 5 charges, firing an ice orb that deals 100 damage with 3×3 splash (no falloff) and inflicts Deep Chill.
<color=black>•</color> While awake, consumes 1 charge per sec to heal a 3×3 area by 50 HP. Returns to sleep when charge is exhausted.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower + Cold Ice Lily Flower</color>

plants.name: Steel Leaf Lily Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Her bunny ears are so cute!" "She’s adorable even when asleep!" "Like a rose!" Steel Leaf Lily Flower sleepily swats away the fans that lack a sense of personal space—yes, she's thorny like a rose, but that hasn’t stopped the admiration.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A steel-leaved Lotus that heals nearby plants and gives them shields.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits Cold Ice Lily Flower traits. Healing also grants 50 points of Shield to each plant. See Steel Leaf Grass for shield mechanic explanation.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Lily Flower + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Cloud Spruce Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cloud Spruce Pine Furnace always carries dry spruce leaves. He claims they're excellent "green" fuel—flammable and easy to collect. Right now, he's sun-drying a batch.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Little Pine Furnace that absorbed Cloud Spruce Bower, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Little Pine Furnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Little Pine Furnace after 210s.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Cloud Spruce Bower</color>

plants.name: Steel Leaf Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Using potassium as fuel not only provides ample heat, but also gives off beautiful flame colors," Steel Leaf Pine Furnace enthusiastically explains. "And this fan, modified from a circular saw, helps blow hot air right to you." As a top employee of the snowfield sauna, he's always committed to providing the best service.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Little Pine Furnace that absorbed Steel Leaf Grass, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Little Pine Furnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Little Pine Furnace after 120s.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Lily Flower Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I was born extraordinary," claims Lily Flower Pine Furnace. He thinks he glows from phosphorus fire — but actually, it’s just fireflies hiding from the cold inside him.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Little Pine Furnace that absorbed Cold Ice Lily Flower, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Little Pine Furnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Little Pine Furnace after 60s.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Cold Ice Lily Flower</color>

plants.name: Aloe Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Aloe Pine Furnace has upgraded its air system to better regulate temperature in small areas. The only problem: the water dripping from the condenser tends to freeze quickly in the snowfield.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Little Pine Furnace that absorbed Water Drop Aloe, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Little Pine Furnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Little Pine Furnace after 90s.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Water Drop Aloe</color>

plants.name: Aloe Medicine Master
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Doctor Aloe Medicine Master is the most beloved young doctor in the hospital. It's not just due to his diligence and skill — it might also be his mustache-like leaves. After all, patients tend to trust older-looking doctors.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Throws aloe extract upwards; upon falling, it heals surrounding plants and temporarily boosts their attack speed.

<color=#0077b6>Cryo System: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1 ice charge passively every 5 seconds.
<color=black>•</color> Gains 1/1/15/60 ice charges when affected by snowball/snow trident/Cold Ice Mushroom/blizzard respectively.
<color=black>•</color> Every 5 seconds, consumes 5 charges to heal all plants in a 3×3 area for 50 HP and boost their attack speed by 30% for 5 seconds.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>
Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Water Drop Aloe + Cold Ice Lily Flower</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>To tame its hot temper, Cold Ice Squash Melon locked itself in the freezer for three days and nights. Now it keeps the mood ice-cold — so cold that the other plants don't dare say a word to 'set it off.' As for zombies… let's just say, no one's allowed to 'break the ice' with it.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash Melon imbued with freezing power.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash Melon) + 600 (3×3)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to the left; 1 tile to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Upon landing deals additional 600 damage to zombies in a 3×3 area and freezes them for 4s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I've finally realized zombies really are our friends,"said Charm Confuse Squash Melon, who quickly joined the Zombuddies Club. The only problem: his extremely radical way of showing friendship turned all the other members into conservative ones.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Squash Melon that overwhelms zombies with charm.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800 (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to the left; 1 tile to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Hypnotizes the zombies he crushes, deals 1800 damage instead if the zombie cannot be hypnotized.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Squash Melon + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Big Garlic
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Big Garlic doesn't quite fit in with the rest of the garlic family — he's far too popular for that. Loved and envied by his kin, he pays them no mind. All he wants is to pull his hat low over his eyes and enjoy a peaceful nap whenever he can.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Big Garlic with a shroomy hypno-cap mushroom on its head.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Causes hypnotized zombies that touch him to switch lanes.
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, forces it to switch lanes, then reverts to a regular Big Garlic.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Garlic + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Earth Bean Thunder isn't one for rushing. It believes every zombie deserves a second chance — preferably before it explodes. Contradictory? Maybe. But it's perfectly in line with its five personal principles, which it refuses to share.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Earth Bean Thunder with an explosive charm.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Hypnotizes the zombies exploded, deals 1800 damage instead if the zombie cannot be hypnotized.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Tangle Surround Ground Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Originally a naval mine tossed ashore by a powerful tsunami, this fella now lies half-buried in the soil. Though the kelp outside has withered, the explosives inside remain deadly.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Earth Bean Thunder tangled with kelp.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> When armed, insta-kills the first approaching zombie and triggers a Earth Bean Thunder explosion.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tangle Surround Water Grass > Earth Bean Thunder</color>

plants.name: Tangle Surround Water Thunder
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Beware, ships — reefs ahead!" Tangle Surround Water Thunder serves as the river's safety officer, signaling danger with a red light. He does a solid job, since wherever he appears, danger is never far behind.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tangle Surround Water Grass that's as explosive as Earth Bean Thunder.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Drown)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Insta-kills the first approaching zombie and deals 600 damage to zombies in a 3×3 area.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Super Tier Little Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Super Tier Little Pine Furnace brings warmth and life to the frozen wilderness. Despite his odd appearance, the local kids adore him. "Sugar cube, anyone?" he offers cheerfully. "Helps keep the heat in!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Stable high-temp Little Pine Furnace that periodically provides charges or healing to nearby plants.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Inherits traits of Little Pine Furnace, with a 3×3 protection range.
<color=black>•</color> Cannot be placed near other Little Pine Furnaces.
<color=black>•</color> Provides 1 ice charge to protected Snow plants every 3s.
<color=black>•</color> Heals protected plants for 50 HP every 15s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Aloe Medicine Master</color>

plants.name: Fire Flame Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Always wear a smile"—that’s rule number one for Fire Flame Tough Fruit, the ever-patient restaurant server. Even when half-melted Cold Ice Tough Fruit is slipping all over the floor yelling about the lack of a 'Wet Floor' sign, he just keeps smiling. And sizzling.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Spicy-flavored nut that scorches biters.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Deals 20 damage to biters and inflicts Enflamed debuff. Fire Flame Tough Fruits can be upgraded to Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruits using a Fertilizer.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Fire Burst Spicy Pepper</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Destroy Eradicate Tough Fruit is a huge fan of Batman. He rarely speaks, preferring to lurk in shadows, and only shows up at the occasional Comic-cons. One time, he startled McCornics in a hallway. "When did Destroy Eradicate Mushroom get... this bulky?" the old corn muttered.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit with nuclear potential. 

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to non-physical explosions. 
<color=black>•</color> Prevents Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Rigid Corpses in a 3×3 area from exploding. 
<color=black>•</color> Heals for 100 HP when a zombie with Irradiated debuff dies in a 5×5 area.
<color=black>•</color> Triggers Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect on death.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Tangle Surround Water Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Spike-Kelp always felt like the runt of the spikeweed family—small, unnoticeable, and half-submerged. The others tried to cheer him up: "Hey, at least you're still more popular than that prickly old Ground Spike Tough Fruit."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ground Spike but aquatic and tangly.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks add 1 Tangle Value. Takes 10 damage every time he attacks a vehicle.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Ground Spike > Tangle Surround Water Grass</color>

plants.name: Tangle Surround Ground Spike
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Founder of the now-famous aquatic foot massage empire, Tangle Surround Ground Spike has redefined spa therapy. With branches in every biome and a new line of vehicular massage lanes, business is booming—especially with traffic this bad.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Ground Spike that tangles zombies even on land.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attacks add 1 land Tangle Value (1/3 the efficacy of aquatic Tangle Value).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tangle Surround Water Grass > Ground Spike</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Boom! A reality-defying burst of high-speed nuclear fission tears zombies apart, breaking down their atoms and rearranging them into the most stable form known to plantkind: iron. "Why iron buckets?" Iron Bucket Destroy Eradicate Mushroom pauses, then replies, "Because I was born that way."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Powerful Destroy Eradicate Mushroom that turns the ashes from his explosion into Iron Buckets.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Every zombie he kills drops a Iron Bucket.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Earth Bean Thunder
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Line Earth Bean Thunder loves playing tricks underground. It shoots out surprises not once, not twice, but thrice—like a cheeky prankster with a never-ending stash of boom. Watch your step, or you might get a triple whammy that’ll blow your boots off.

- Written by Mrs. Draco</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>3 Line Earth Bean Thunder resurfaces after exploding and fires potatoes across three lanes.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Attacks faster as zombies get closer (down to 0.5s per attack).
<color=black>•</color> When armed, explodes on contact, dealing 5400 damage, knocks back for 1 tile and retreats into the ground.
<color=black>•</color> Re-emerges 15s after exploding. Explodes and disappears immediately upon contact with vehicles.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Earth Bean Thunder + 3 Line Shooter</color>

plants.name: Lantern Cage Big Mouth Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>They say Lantern Cage Big Mouth Flower has never gone hungry—not once. Every chomp lands a juicy zombie. He even published a book sharing his secrets: "Wiggle... wiggle... zombies love a gentle glow." — From his work Lantern.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lures in zombies to snack on with his lophos.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>Insta-kill (Devour)</color>
<color=black>Digestion Time: </color><color=#8B0000>40s</color>
<color=#99582a>Lumos System: </color><color=#8B0000> Each Lumos level reduces digestion time by 10s to a minimum of 10s.</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Upon successful digestion, pulls a nearby zombie from adjacent lanes to its lane, if there are no zombies in its lane.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Mouth Flower + Road Lantern Flower</color>

plants.name: Play Doll Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Hey clowny!" the zombies jeer. Play Doll Destroy Eradicate Mushroom just glances their way in silence. He doesn’t need to argue: his masterpiece will speak for itself. Too bad none of them will be around to see how it ends.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom with enhanced explosive powers able to cause chain explosions.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Cremator)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>For every zombie eliminated, creates a Jack-in-the-Box explosion that deals 1800 damage at its position.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Jack-in-the-Box > Magnet Force Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cherry Peach Flower Pot would rather give up her pay at the Zen Garden than be mistaken for a plant."Those lunatics can't get real cherries, so they're out here trying to eat anything cherry-flavored!" Just talking about it makes her shudder.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A pot with a passion for cherry explosions, using them to heal the plant on her own tile and briefly empower cherry-type shooters.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color> Heals the plant on herself by 20 HP when affected by cherry explosions.
<color=black>•</color> While healing, also grants an attack speed boost (50%) for 5s to cherry shooting plants.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: 3 Leaf Little Cherry Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Leaf Little Cherry Peach always cares about appearances—whether or not anyone's watching. Ground or air, if you mess up his hair, you’ll get blasted. Hard.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cheeky cherry delinquent that floats through the air and dive-bombs zombies in style.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>300</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Every 15s, targets one zombie in a 3×5 area and dive-bombs them, causing a cherry-style explosion in a 1-tile radius.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Big Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>A seasoned sunlight banker, Sun Light Big Mushroom offers high interest on your deposits."You chose a time deposit," he says sternly to a frustrated Sun Light Emperor Fruit. "Withdrawals aren't allowed just yet."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A visionary sun producer that absorbs and multiplies nearby sun, paying out in bursts.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/20s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Absorbs dropped Sun within a 5×5 area, multiplies their value by ×1.3, and stores them.
<color=black>•</color> Releases as much Sun as possible in batches of 25 along with the next production.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Big Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sun Light Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sun Light Little Courage Mushroom's been working on a new breathing method to quickly vent all that awful sunlight. But… "Ahh! Rigid Corpses!!" And just like that, he's curled up, trembling, forgetting everything. As for the breathing method? He'll figure it out when the zombies walk away.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A timid sun producer that tries to work faster until it panics.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Production interval gradually shortens to 10s.
<color=black>•</color> Cowers in fear when zombies approach, resetting interval back to 25s and producing 25 Sun immediately.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Little Courage Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cloud Spruce Ballista Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Pulling a giant ballista is exhausting, so even Cloud Spruce Ballista Artillery needs a vacation. Thanks to Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Tough Fruit's help, he found a job in another world: Helping to launch angry avians at some very green, very smug pigs.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires giant spruce bolts that pierce through zombies and detonate with a short delay.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Must be planted on two side-by-side Cloud Spruce Bowers.
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Bolts pierce up to 2 times (can pierce ice) and explode 0.3s after hitting a zombie, dealing AoE damage in a small area.</color>
plants.cost:
<size=36>Cost: <color=#8B0000>300</color>
Recharge: <color=#8B0000>50s</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Towards Sun Flower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Garden games sometimes come down to pure luck. That's when Destroy Eradicate Towards Sun Flower steps up."Why always me?" "Because you're destined. Or doomed."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Towards Sun Flower that plants Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Spores around herself, which grow and detonate remotely.

<color=black>Sun Output: </color><color=#8B0000>25/25s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Every 50s, plants one Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Spore randomly in a 3×3 area around herself.
<color=black>•</color> Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Spores take 30s to grow and once mature, if a zombie enters their blast radius, they detonate like a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Towards Sun Flower + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Spore
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Quietly growing on the lawn, Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Spore hums the lullaby taught by Destroy Eradicate Towards Sun Flower, dreaming of becoming a rising sun... and of no longer being mistaken for a rusty bolt.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A dormant spore radiating destructive power — just give it some time.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Takes 30s to grow and once mature, if a zombie enters his blast radius, detonates like a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Squash Melon Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Dragged from a kids' playground by his stem and dumped on the lawn, Squash Melon Tough Fruit was rejected for being a deformed rubber ball. Now, furious and bumpy, he bounces wildly, yelling: "I'm gonna play all I want! ALL I WANT!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A bouncy nut who's all tantrum and impact.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>160/1.5s (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Bounces in his tile when a zombie gets close, dealing splash damage on each landing. Does not block zombies while airborne.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Squash Melon</color>

plants.name: Silver Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Silver Destroy Eradicate Mushroom turned destruction into a money-making venture — and a lucrative one at that. Of course, he spent his first fortune immediately... on a fancy new skin.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Destroy Eradicate Mushroom that swapped bang for bling.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Does not explode.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Gold Destroy Eradicate Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ahem, eyes over here." That's how Gold Destroy Eradicate Mushroom begins every Tough Fruit Street summit. The other tycoons fear him—not just for his wealth, but for his power to erase their wealth in one glorious blast.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Turns money into ruin.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Does not passively explode.</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 3000 Coins, Cooldown: 30s; releases a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect that does not leave a crater.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>6000 Coins</color>

plants.name: Iron Bucket Squash Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Iron Bucket Squash Melon armored up in cold steel, harder, heavier and packs more harm. Just don't mention the "rivets" on his face. He insists they're structural... not acne.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A metal-plated Squash Melon with terrifying weight.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1000</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>3240 (Squash Melon)</color>
<color=black>Detection Range: </color><color=#8B0000>0.5 tiles to the left; 1 tile to the right</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Metal plant. Can be fed corresponding metal objects to restore 500 Toughness. Receives half the damage from explosive cherries.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Iron Bucket > Squash Melon</color>

plants.name: Sea Roar Cloud Spruce Ballista Artillery
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sea Roar Cloud Spruce Ballista Artillery once served proudly atop the castle walls, convinced his power was like a roaring tsunami. Turns out, everyone was just talking about the screech his strings made when reloading. Embarrassed but undeterred, he found salvation in aloe juice. Now his bolts are smoother, deadlier, and most importantly, much quieter.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires tidal bolts with a tsunami's force; targets struck become more vulnerable to chill.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/1s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Fires 4 bolts in quick succesion before resting for 3s.
<color=black>•</color> 90% chance to fire Tidal Bolts. Applies Soaked for 5s. A soaked zombie will be frozen instead of chilled when hit by any cryo-system attack. The status is then cleared and cannot be reapplied for 10s.
<color=black>•</color> 10% chance to fire Ice Bolts. Applies Deep Chill.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Water Drop Aloe > Cloud Spruce Ballista Artillery</color>

plants.name: 3 Leaf Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Some claim zombies have mastered the martial arts to be able to harm plants with falling petals. Most plants dismiss it. But 3 Leaf Tough Fruit disagrees. "It's true," he says, floating overhead. "I've blocked such blows. Three times."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A hovering nut that shields his tile from damage.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Absorbs damage for his own tile.
<color=black>•</color> If undamaged for 10s, regenerates 50 HP per second.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Sage Person Palm Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sage Person Palm Tough Fruit proudly insists he's the true Ground Spike Tough Fruit. "Look at these spines! This color!" he declares constantly. One day, someone finally asked, "Wait… who's Ground Spike Tough Fruit again?"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cactus-covered nut that punishes attackers and disables balloon zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Reflects 50 damage back to zombies biting it.
<color=black>•</color> Can pop Balloons.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Sage Person Palm</color>

plants.name: Foreign Peach Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Foreign Peach Tough Fruit lives under a rock and rarely moves. It's not because he's lazy, but because he's got standards. He'll only act if invited by a certain square friend to jellyfishing… or to prank a cephalopodic neighbor.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A reactive defender that counters with little stars.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Fires five 20-damage stars in all directions when damaged.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Foreign Peach</color>

plants.name: Lily Flower Winter Bamboo Road Block
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every winter, Lily Flower Winter Bamboo Road Block tries to impress potential mates with a dazzling petal display. But his performance often goes… too fast. And too cold. The girls walk away before he even finishes blooming.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A self-healing barricade that grows stronger with nearby allies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Heals himself by 50 HP when charged.
<color=black>•</color> Recovers 40 HP every 1.5s. This HP recovery is increased by 100% for each adjacent Winter Bamboo Road Block-type plants.
<color=black>•</color> Resilience (defaults to 1): Incoming damage is divided by resilience. Max HP is treated as multiplied by resilience. Resilience is increased by 0.3 for each adjacent Winter Bamboo Road Block-type plant.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Winter Bamboo Road Block + Cold Ice Lily Flower</color>

plants.name: Water Drop Winter Bamboo Road Block
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Water Drop Winter Bamboo Road Block loves to travel and promote his snowy hometown. But no one ever seems interested. "They always think the pack on my back is just a bump from getting whacked," he complains. "No wonder they think the tundra's an unforgiving place."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An ice-hardened barricade that thrives against cold-based zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Gains ice charges like Water Drop Aloe.
<color=black>•</color> Resilience (defaults to 1): Incoming damage is divided by resilience. Max HP is treated as multiplied by resilience. Consumes 1 charge to raise resilience by 2. Gains 1 resilience when fighting chilled/frozen zombies (not stackable with previous ability).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Winter Bamboo Road Block + Water Drop Aloe</color>

plants.name: Winter Bamboo Bower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The zombies thought they could avoid any road accidents by steering clear of Winter Bamboo Road Blocks. But ever since the Winter Bamboo Bower arrived, sharpened shoots started flying their way. Scattering in panic, they fled while shouting, "Shoot! Shoots!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires piercing bamboo shoots!

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1800</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>60/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Immune to freeze from Snowballs and Blizzards.
<color=black>•</color> Shots pierce like Cloud Spruce Bower's.
<color=black>•</color> When a shot hits a zombie: If HP is higher than the zombie's, deals damage equal to the HP difference to self and the zombie is instantly killed. If lower, HP is reduced to a minimum of 300, and the zombie takes damage equivalent to the difference. This ability does not activate if HP is 300 or lower.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cloud Spruce Bower + Winter Bamboo Road Block</color>

plants.name: West Melon Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Whenever zombies come to buy watermelons, the melon stand owner Aloe Medicine Master always sells them the biggest one—the West Melon Tough Fruit. After the zombies crack their teeth on it, Aloe Medicine Master refers them to a nearby dental clinic to get them fixed, and, naturally, that clinic also belongs to Aloe Medicine Master.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows a temporary shield and retaliates with a melon after taking a certain amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> When taking damage, stores 1.5× the damage taken as Retaliation Charge. If the damage exceeds 100/500/1000, stores 3/4.5/6× the damage instead.
<color=black>•</color> Retaliation Meter is capped at max HP.
<color=black>•</color> When the Retaliation Meter exceeds 1000, consumes all charges to launch a watermelon dealing the same amount of damage and gains a shield of equal value that fully decays over 5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + West Melon Thrower</color>

plants.name: Roll Heart Vegetable Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Every year, Cabbages can't wait to sprout, but Roll Heart Vegetable Tough Fruit is always the exception. He wraps himself up tightly before stepping out. "Rigid Corpses don't have the patience to peel layer after layer. Trust me."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows a temporary shield and retaliates with a cabbage after taking a certain amount of damage.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> When taking damage, stores 1× the damage taken as Retaliation Charge. If the damage exceeds 100/500/1000, stores 2/3/4× the damage instead.
<color=black>•</color> Retaliation Meter is capped at max HP.
<color=black>•</color> When the Retaliation Meter exceeds 1000, consumes all charges to launch a cabbage dealing the same amount of damage and gains a shield of equal value that fully decays over 5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower</color>

plants.name: Yellow Oil Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"They're terrifying, just like in disaster movies." Yellow Oil Tough Fruit trembles as he hides his face behind butter. But the chance to observe zombies up close fills him with curiosity, and in the end, he can't help but peek out from behind the butter, studying these creatures frozen in the last frame of their lives.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Rigid Corpses are immobilized each time they bite - now that's what you call a "head-butter awakening."

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, immobilizes the attacking Rigid Corpse with Butter for 2s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Jade Rice Thrower</color>

plants.name: Steel Leaf Winter Bamboo Road Block
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"We're supposed to be barriers, yet zombies always gnaw on us like we're snacks," Steel Leaf Winter Bamboo Road Block laments. Determined, she sets out to master tougher parrying and counterattack skills. Whether she's succeeded is unclear, but she sure looks tastier than ever.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Winter Bamboo Road Block that steadily generates a protective shield.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>1500</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Generates 60 points of Shield every 1.5s, up to (max HP×1 + 60) points.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Winter Bamboo Road Block + Steel Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Winter Bamboo Pine Furnace
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As the tallest bodyguard from the Winter Bamboo Road Block Security Company, Winter Bamboo Pine Furnace stays hidden yet alert. Across all his zombie encounters, he's never got injured—not even once. That's a pretty dazzling record.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>An upgraded Little Pine Furnace that absorbed Winter Bamboo Road Block, with an expanded protection range.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Inherits the traits of Little Pine Furnace but with range expanded to 3×3. Reverts to regular Little Pine Furnace after 60s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Pine Furnace + Winter Bamboo Road Block</color>

plants.name: Castle Rampart Tough Fruit
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>The plants always complain that Castle Rampart Tough Fruit is an obstacle to the view, and that despite being so large he does nothing to get rid of the zombies in front of him. "He's lazy, I don't think he got here on his own," some said. "He rolled down a mountain and ended up here," others mocked. But Castle Rampart Tough Fruit had no intention of answering them because like his shell, his will was hardened to protect the plants that needed him, after all.

-Written by Ultra Badlander</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>The more types of defensive plants are on the field, the higher its own defense.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>32000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Tall plant.
<color=black>•</color> Anti-crush, damage received is capped at 1/3 Toughness.
<color=black>•</color> After Damage Cap, damage is reduced by dividing it by (1 + 0.1×number of defensive plant types on the field).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit ∞ [Tall Tough Fruit] ∞ Tough Fruit < Fuse Together Ocean Taro (Place On Middle)</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Pea Shooter
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>"Simply making Rigid Corpses into our allies isn't enough. We need to equip them with a little extra firepower, and have them look more like us in the process!" Charm Confuse Pea Shooter says in an alluring tone.

-Written by Mr. Etc.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Shoots hypno peas that turn killed zombies into friendly Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpses.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Hypnotized Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpse upon killing a zombie.
<color=black>•</color> Abilities do not work in water lanes.
<color=black>•</color> Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpse: 270 HP, fires a 20-damage Charm Confuse Pea Shooter every 1.5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Pea Shooter + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Double Shot Shooter
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Double Shot Shooter talks fast and finishes most sentences before anyone else starts speaking. "Reality's a loop! I've fired this shot before, twice!"

-Written by Ocean Soul</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Double Shot Shooter that fires Charm Confuse Pea Shooters.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×2/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Hypnotized Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpse upon kill.
<color=black>•</color> Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Double Shot Shooter + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Crack Pod Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I feel dizzy!" "Actually it's not that bad." "No, I'm totally disoriented." "But your head's in the back." "That's just a figure of speech." "And I'm being literal." "These two brothers are arguing again," says Charm Confuse Pea Shooter, "probably their 3,682nd time."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Crack Pod Shooter that fires Charm Confuse Pea Shooters.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Summons a Hypnotized Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpse upon kill.
<color=black>•</color> Tap to auto-fuse with a free Pea Shooter 15s after planting.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Crack Pod Shooter + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Machine Gun Shooter is a star in the Zombuddies Club. "There's nothing wrong with my eyes. I know which zombies can be redeemed." He harshly criticizes the radical Charm Confuse Squash Melon: "He's too violent, we should be friendlier with our potential collaborators." Their debate is now so intense that only the two of them remain in the club, besides the one who started it all.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Machine Gun Shooter that fires Charm Confuse Pea Shooters.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×4/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Summons a Hypnotized Charm Confuse Pea Shooter Rigid Corpse upon kill.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Machine Gun Shooter + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: 3 Line Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>This trio in particular showed serious dedication at the Pea Squad Bootcamp, always firing in unison, and settling arguments with each other in record time. They earned the title of First 3 Line Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter, and had the 3 stars split across each of their helmets.

-Written by Mr. Etc.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Fires copious amounts of peas in three lanes.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>(20×6)×3/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>60×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>6% chance to shoot a barrage of peas each attack, lasting 5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Line Shooter + Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter</color>

plants.name: Death God Snipe Strike Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Ever heard plants whisper in the dead of night?" He wipes his old rifle. "She's slow, but she's never let me down…" A dark light cuts the air. "Time to beat my 48 out of 50 hit record."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Piercing shots and rapid fire; charged shots deal massive area damage.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>100/0.3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Unlimited pierce; +1 Doom & Frenzy charge per hit.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes 300 Doom charges to trigger a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom blast (72× base damage) at the location of the first zombie hit.
<color=black>•</color> Consumes 100 Frenzy charges for double the fire rate, lasting for 8s.
<color=black>•</color> 10% chance to crit for 6× damage (crit is guaranteed against zombies with the Irradiated debuff).</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Snipe Strike Shooter + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: 3 Leaf Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce:
<align=left><size=36><color=black>3 Leaf Little Courage Mushroom cares for his friends. Even though he can fly away from the danger of zombies, into the clouds of high above, he can't simply abandon his roots. In an attempt to protect them, he covers them with his leaves and begs the zombies not to hurt them. And the zombies, for some reason, listen.

-Written by Ultra Badlander</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Floats above ground, providing camouflage to nearby Little Courage Mushrooms hiding from zombies.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Hovering plant.
<color=black>•</color> Rigid Corpses won't eat hiding Scaredy-type plants in a 3×3 area around the 3 Leaf Little Courage Mushroom.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom + 3 Leaf Grass</color>

plants.name: Cherry Peach Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>The meekest Cherry in the family, no tantrums, no shouting, and loved by many. "I… kinda want to swear sometimes," she admits. "But… I'm afraid someone might yell back."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Frightened easily, but causes an explosion when it happens.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>When scared, hides and sets off a Cherry Peach Explode Bullet blast that deals 600 AoE damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Little Courage Mushroom + Cherry Peach Explode Bullet</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cat Melon just wanted a stronger fan… but not even nuclear power can seem to meet her requirements. "This is a terrible model," Zomboss noted. "All that heat and waste product? Blasted straight out."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Blasts zombies with high-temp wind laced with ash and nuclear fallout.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Lasts for 10s before disappearing.
<color=black>•</color> Every second, deals 180 Cremator damage to all zombies on the lawn. Damage is doubled against zombies with the Irradiated debuff.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice 3 Leaf Grass
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Cold Ice 3 Leaf Grass is a -4°C air conditioner. When his chilly breeze blows, it feels like stepping straight into winter. Even Cold Ice Shooter is frozen, the cold wind actually froze his own projectiles. What could possibly be colder than that? Answer: The atmosphere after Extreme Cold Ice Bean's told one of his totally tone deaf jokes.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>3 Leaf Grass of a freezing breeze that constantly applies chill.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Lasts for 10s before disappearing.
<color=black>•</color> Every second, deals 1 damage and applies 20 Cryo points to all zombies on the lawn.
<color=black>•</color> Converts all snow peas on screen to polar ice peas.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>3 Leaf Grass + Cold Ice Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Destroy Eradicate Foreign Peach
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I could destroy almost the entire planet if I wanted to," boasts Destroy Eradicate Foreign Peach, "and they'd all blame it on the biggest star in the sky..."</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Transforms himself into a Doom Meteor and crashes into the ground.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Disappears after 3s and summons a Doom Meteor that deals 1800 area damage on impact and splits into 180 spore stars each dealing 20 damage.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Foreign Peach + Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Big Garlic Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Big Garlic Tough Fruit believes even zombies deserve a balanced diet. He'll always stand between them and your brains, gently nudging them toward healthier options like Roll Heart Vegetable Tough Fruit.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A tough nut with garlic properties, poisonous and hits instantly.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>When bitten, poisons attacker for 10s and gives them 1 Poison point.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Big Garlic</color>

plants.name: Magnet Force Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Everyone knows magnets attract metal, but Magnet Force Tough Fruit? People wonder why he's no longer doing that. Magnet Force Tough Fruit himself claims to prefer the security of a orbiting shield of projectiles over pulling nails and screws.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Pulls friendly straight-shooting projectiles nearby and makes them orbit him.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Attracts nearby plant straight-shooting projectiles, making them orbit at a radius of 1.5 tiles; can hold up to 100 projectiles at once, each lasting up to 20s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Magnet Force Mushroom</color>

plants.name: West Melon Little Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>West Melon Little Throwers love to share, even with zombies. They chop their melons into small slices and toss them over. Strangely, zombies are terrible at catching them…</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Melon slices lose the ability to do splash but are now twice effective against shrunken zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>80/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Melon slices no longer do splash damage but deal double the damage to shrunken zombies.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Roll Heart Vegetable Little Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>People say Roll Heart Vegetable Little Thrower holds the magical power to shrink zombies. And the secret, they claim, is in the bounce. But only Jade Rice Little Thrower knows the real reason: there's a tiny pat of butter hidden inside. The cabbage leaves are just too thick for it to pop out… so of course it needs to bounce first to shrink a zombie.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs sprouts capable of passing on the shrinking effect.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>40/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> Shots bounce twice. If a shot hits a shrunken zombie, it gains the ability to shrink the next zombies hit.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower > Little Spray Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Tough Fruit Fire Torch Tree Stump
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Today's menu features roasted nuts." Even Tough Fruit Fire Torch Tree Stump can't help but smile at the thought of having made such a treat. It's the perfect picnic snack, except that no actual Tough Fruits are around. The "roasted nuts" are bread replicas, so realistic that they make real Tough Fruits uneasy.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Capable of producing Flame Light Tough Fruits.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>For every 50 peas lit, a Flame Light Tough Fruit is spawned in front.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Fire Torch Tree Stump</color>

plants.name: Flame Light Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Light, grant me warmth, grant me strength." Flame Light Tough Fruit smiles, radiating a delicate glow… and the scent of cumin. Fresh from a barbecue party, his crispy shell draws hungry eyes from everyone, zombies included.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A Tough Fruit formed in intense temperatures, but not much different.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Cannot be used for fusions.
<color=black>•</color> Can be converted to a regular Tough Fruit using an Cold Ice Flower Pot.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Silver Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I'm a valuable item," says Silver Tough Fruit, "Handle me with care." After quitting his job at the bowling alley, he thought about starting the "Nonferrous Metal Protection Association," but nothing came of it, as he'd spent all his money keeping his silver paint in perfect condition.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit made of silver, with higher toughness.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>6000</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit + Gold Goblet Flower</color>

plants.name: Gold Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Rigid Corpses just can't resist biting into Gold Tough Fruit's shell to see what's inside. It's not magic; there's simply a rumor among zombies that he's a chocolate truffle wrapped in gold foil.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Tough Fruit made of gold, with even higher toughness; can use Ultimate to boost max HP and restore health.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>8000</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>Costs 1000 Coins, Cooldown: 5s; Increases max Toughness by 1000 and restores health equal to its full Toughness.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Upgrade Cost: </color><color=#8B0000>1000 Coins, 1 instance of Ultimate included</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse West Melon Thrower
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse West Melon Thrower loves making friends, painting, and mixing drinks. She's the star bartender at a bar, and her iced hypno melon juice is even more popular than classic cocktails. Some of her more eccentric fans have even dressed up as zombies just to get a taste.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Lobs hypno melons capable of hypnotizing hordes of zombies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>120/3s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Both direct hits and splash damage have a 25% chance to hypnotize zombies with less than 50% max HP.
<color=black>•</color> When bitten, hypnotizes the attacker, then reverts to a West Melon Thrower.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>West Melon Thrower + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Cold Ice Flower Pot
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Summer is when Cold Ice Flower Pot is most active. "Heehee, feeling hot? Want to come cool off here?" he says. "Just be careful not to slip on the ice. And if you're a watermelon seeking shade, watch out! Once you turn into a chilled watermelon, someone might just eat you!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can materialize plants forged in fire.

<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Every 10s, transforms a specific Roasted plant on its tile into its base form usable for fusion.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Cold Ice Mushroom > Flower Pot</color>

plants.name: Fire Torch South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Fire Torch South Melon dislikes loud, showy gestures. He's calm, reserved, and quietly helps any peas in need. Even at a barbecue, if he's served half-raw food, he won't complain; he'll just tuck it inside himself and take it home. It'll be perfectly cooked by then anyways.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Can ignite peas and produce Flame Light South Melons.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>For every 50 peas lit, a Flame Light South Melon is spawned in front.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Fire Torch Tree Stump > South Melon</color>

plants.name: Flame Light South Melon
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"Happy Halloween!" calls Flame Light South Melon, handing out bags of candy to mischievous little plants. And when the candy's gone, don't forget to come see his stage play—he might just play the Headless Horseman himself!</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A South Melon formed in intense temperatures, but not much different.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>4000</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Cannot be used for fusions.
<color=black>•</color> Can be converted to a regular South Melon using an Cold Ice Flower Pot.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>

plants.name: Snipe Strike Little Team
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>As the Snipe Strike Little Team say: "In the great tides of history, what's long divided must unite, and what's long united must divide… you included." In downtime, they love reading Romance of the Three Kingdoms. "The past is just old tales. Right now We're the sharpest shot there is!"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Splits for pinpoint snipes, merges for explosive crowd control.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>500×3/3s (Split), 1500/0.5s (Merged)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Short plant (evades straight-firing projectiles).
<color=black>•</color> In split mode, every 6th shot is a headshot dealing 1M damage.
<color=black>•</color> After 15 shots, merge for 15s before splitting again.
<color=black>•</color> In merged mode, attacks do AoE splash damage in a 1-tile radius.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Snipe Strike Shooter > Little Spray Mushroom×3</color>

plants.name: Sea Shark Big Spray Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>"I come from the vast ocean," Sea Shark Big Spray Mushroom boasts. "With this shark mimicry, I can scare off any predator. It's an evolution only possible in the deep sea." He loves telling tales of his past to Sea Mushrooms, but never reveals why he left the ocean: the disguise often attracts real sharks.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>A cannibalistic Big Spray Mushroom that "feeds" on Sea Mushrooms, borrowing the menace of Sea Demon Mushroom to drive away enemies.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>
<color=black>•</color> Using a Sea Mushroom seed packet on him extends his range to the full lane for 10s.
<color=black>•</color> Knocks back zombies knocked back by Sea Demon Mushroom within the last 3s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Big Spray Mushroom > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Charm Confuse Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Charm Confuse Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter is hopelessly smitten with zombies. She painstakingly paints every pea pink and admires the bright flash when they ignite. "It's a gift for the zombies," she says, eager to send as many as possible.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Constantly fires loads of Charm Confuse Pea Shooters.

<color=#4A2900>Usage Condition: Odyssey Mode</color>
<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>30×6/1.5s</color>
<color=black>Ultimate: </color><color=#8B0000>30×3/0.02s</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>2% chance to shoot a barrage of hypno peas each attack, lasting 5s.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter + Charm Confuse Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sea Mushroom Tough Fruit
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sea Mushroom Tough Fruit loves spending time with the Water Beads, watching them soak up water and grow, its round body shimmering with rainbow light, reflected in innocent eyes. "Time is like a blue butterfly fluttering past the stream~ Once it's gone, you'll never see it again~"</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Grows bigger by absorbing water, then rolls forward to crush zombies.

<color=black>Toughness: </color><color=#8B0000>2000 (initial), 6000 (max)</color>
<color=black>Special: </color><color=#8B0000>Grows at 10s and 20s after planting, increasing HP and durability by 2000 each time. At 30s after planting, turns into a bowling nut rolling forward, dealing 600 damage every 0.02s on contact.</color>
plants.cost: <size=36>Fusion Recipe: <color=#8B0000>Tough Fruit > Sea Mushroom</color>

plants.name: Sea Conch Little Courage Mushroom
plants.introduce: <align=left><size=36><color=black>Sea Conch Little Courage Mushroom drifts like a hidden reef, timid, still, but dangerous to the unwary. When the surrounding water shifts, he rouses and ferociously defends himself, then settles back beneath the waves as if nothing happened.</color>
plants.info:
<size=36>Too shy to attack until he sees a Sea Mushroom dive.

<color=black>Damage: </color><color=#8B0000>20/0.5s</color>
